title: Influencer & UGC Outreach Assistant (Fashion Brand)
description:
We’re a fast-growing fashion brand looking for a proactive and detail-oriented Outreach Assistant to help us connect with content creators and influencers.



This is not a generic VA role. We’re looking for someone who understands social media, moves quickly, and can follow a clear system to drive results.



What You’ll Be Doing

Finding relevant creators on TikTok and Instagram daily

Reaching out via DMs and
 (high volume outreach)

Personalising messages to increase response rates

Following up with creators consistently

Tracking all outreach and responses in a spreadsheet

Helping manage relationships with creators

Daily Targets

Source 50 to 100 creators per day

Send 50 to 100 outreach messages per day

Maintain accurate tracking of all activity

What We’re Looking For

Experience with influencer outreach, lead generation, or social media

Comfortable sending high volumes of messages daily

Strong written English (natural, conversational tone)

Highly organised and reliable

Able to follow systems and improve them over time

Interest in fashion, TikTok, and social media trends

Experience using Google Sheets

Your availability (hours per day or week)



We’re looking for someone who can grow with us long-term. If you’re proactive, organised, and enjoy social media, this could be a great fit

title: Video Editor Viral Short-Form Content / Reels - TikTok - YouTube Shorts
description:
PLEASE READ CAREFULLY. LOOKING FOR A "WOW" EFFECT.



We are a creative media team working on two exciting projects: the launch campaign of an emerging music

artist and the promotional campaign for a feature film releasing in October. We are looking for talented

Filipino video editors who understand what makes content go viral on Western social media platforms and

can produce high-quality short-form videos consistently.



What you will be working on



You will edit short-form videos for two distinct campaigns running simultaneously:



MUSIC CAMPAIGN

Pairing songs of a new artist with fitting video clips

– animal footage, anime edits, epic cinematic

scenes, landscapes, emotional



The goal: organic virality that puts the music in

people's heads.





FILM CAMPAIGN

Creating appetite-building clips from film footage –

suspenseful cuts, emotional hooks, engaging

subtitles – designed to make people curious and

talk about the film before its October release 2026 in all german cinemas and on Netflix.





What we are looking for



 Strong instinct for what makes content go viral on Western platforms (TikTok US/EU,

Instagram, YouTube Shorts)



 Proficiency in at least one professional editing tool (CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci

Resolve, Final Cut Pro, or similar)



 Good PC/laptop and reliable internet connection – you must be able to handle video files and

deliver on time



 Ability to follow creative briefs and direction closely while bringing your own creative sense to

the execution



 Good English comprehension – you will receive instructions and feedback in English



? Available 4–6 hours per day, on a consistent schedule, for a duration of several months



Nice to have

Experience creating viral content yourself · Knowledge of current trends on Western TikTok /

Instagram Reels · Skills in subtitle styling and motion typography · Portfolio or examples of past edits

Compensation



Base rate: €4 EUR / hour 



Rate is performance-based and can go higher or lower depending on

quality, consistency, and results. 

Strong performers will be rewarded.



We are looking for a long-term working relationship, not a one-off.



Selection process

Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a practical editing test: we will send you raw video material

and a brief set of instructions. You will independently create a short-form video from this footage

according to our guidelines. This test is how we evaluate your instinct, creativity, and ability to follow

direction – no lengthy interviews, just your work speaking for itself.



How to apply

1. A short introduction – who you are, your editing background, and which tools you use

2. At least 2–3 examples of your video editing work (links to YouTube, TikTok, Google Drive, etc.)

3. Your available hours per day and time zone

4. Your PC specs and which editing software you currently use



We are actively looking for young, hungry talent who genuinely understand social media and want to grow

with us. If you have the eye and the drive, we want to hear from you

 Ads for local or home services

 campaigns for?

 Ads?



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Content Production Coordinator (Social Media & Video)
description:
Studio Reeljoy is a Singapore based social media agency focused on crafting personal branding and producing engaging short-form videos for brands, with a strong focus on Singapore property and real estate content. We help property agents and brands create scroll-stopping videos that educate, engage, and convert.



As we grow, we’re looking for someone who can help manage our clients' content workflow, support content creation, and keep everything running smoothly behind the scenes.





About the Role

This is a hands-on execution role combining project coordination, content writing, and AI-assisted photo editing.



You’ll play a key role in making sure:

• Content gets produced on time

• Visual quality is consistent and high

• Posts are ready to go out consistently

If you enjoy structured work, clear tasks, and creative execution, this role is for you.



What You’ll Be Doing

1. Project Coordination 

• Track all ongoing content projects (reels, edits, posts)

• Follow up with editors to ensure deadlines are met

• Schedule content for review and posting

• Maintain and update the content calendar



2. Content Production & Execution

• Format and prepare content for posting

• Create simple static posts using Canva

• Do basic video edits (cutting clips, adding text/subtitles)



3. AI Photo Editing & Image Preparation 

• Use AI tools (e.g. Google Flow or similar) to remove clutter from property photos

• Enhance images with lighting, color correction, and minor touch-ups

• Ensure photos look clean, spacious, and market-ready

• Organize and prepare high-resolution image sets

• Maintain consistency in editing style across projects



4. Ad Campaign Execution

• Set up and run basic social media ad campaigns (Meta / Instagram)

• Prepare creatives and copy provided by strategist

• Monitor performance and report simple metrics

• Make basic optimizations based on guidance



**Important: Singapore Property Context**

You’ll be working with content related to:

• Property buying/selling in Singapore

• Real estate tips, trends, and insights



*You don’t need to be an expert but you should be:

• Be able to understand basic content context

• Follow provided direction accurately

• Be open to learning quickly



Who We’re Looking For

• Organized and detail-oriented

• Reliable and proactive

• Comfortable executing tasks independently

• Basic familiarity with social media tools and ads

• Quick to learn new tools and systems



How to Apply

Please send to 
 :

• A short intro about yourself 

• Any relevant experience (content, coordination, editing, or ads)

• 2–3 caption samples OR a short piece of content you’ve written

• One content idea for a Singapore property video



Feel free to include a short Loom to introduce yourself and your experience.

Shortlisted candidates will go through a short interview, followed by a paid work to assess fit.

title: Marketing Launch Coordinator — Fervae (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
Marketing Launch Coordinator — Fervae (Remote, Full-Time)





ABOUT FERVAE



Fervae is the first social media management platform built specifically for science communicators, researchers, and educators. Founded by a molecular biologist and science communicator (Forbes 30 Under 30, PhD in Science Education), Fervae helps knowledge-sharers publish with integrity across platforms like Instagram, Bluesky, Threads, TikTok, YouTube, and more.



We're preparing for our public launch and need a sharp, self-directed marketing professional to drive awareness and early adoption.





THE ROLE



You'll be the first dedicated marketing hire — owning the launch marketing strategy and execution across multiple channels. You'll work directly with the founder.





WHAT YOU'LL DO



Social Media Marketing

- Manage Fervae's brand accounts (Instagram, Threads, Bluesky, TikTok, LinkedIn)

- Create and schedule content that showcases the platform's features

- Build community among science communicators and educators

- Track engagement and iterate on what works



Outreach & Partnerships

- Research and contact university communications departments, science educators, and research institutions

- Build outreach lists and run personalized
 campaigns to potential users

- Identify and engage science communicators and influencers for early adoption

- Support partnership conversations with institutions



Content &
 Marketing

- Write blog posts, case studies, and landing page copy

- Build and manage
 sequences (welcome, onboarding, feature highlights)

- Create newsletter content for early adopters

- Help develop help center articles and onboarding materials



Launch Support

- Coordinate launch timeline and marketing milestones

- Monitor and report on key metrics (signups, conversions, engagement)

- Manage early adopter community and gather feedback





REQUIREMENTS

- 3+ years in digital marketing (SaaS, tech, or education sectors preferred)

- Strong English writing skills — you'll be writing copy that represents a PhD-founded brand

- Experience with social media management and content creation

- Familiarity with
 marketing tools (ConvertKit, Mailchimp, or similar)

- Self-starter who can own projects end-to-end with minimal supervision

- Comfortable working in US Eastern time zone (or with significant overlap)





NICE TO HAVE

- Experience marketing to universities or academic institutions

- Interest in science communication or education

- Experience with early-stage startup launches

- Basic graphic design skills (Canva, Figma)

- Familiarity with SEO and content strategy





COMPENSATION



Starting at $600/month USD, full-time (40 hrs/week). Performance-based raises potentially available as you grow with the company. This is a long-term position — not a short-term project.





HOW TO APPLY



Tell us:

1. A brief intro and why this role interests you

2. A link to a brand or product you've helped market (with your specific contribution)

3. A short writing sample — could be a social post,
, or blog excerpt

4. Include a frog emoji somewhere in your response so we know you read this far



Please do NOT send a generic application. We're looking for someone who actually read this posting and can speak to why Fervae's mission resonates.

title: Appointment Setter (US Market)
description:
We are hiring a high-volume outbound caller to contact US home service businesses (plumbers, roofers, HVAC, electricians).



Your role is to:



Make outbound calls daily

Have short, natural conversations

Identify interested prospects

Get them onto a live setup call OR schedule a setup call



This is a fast-paced role.



You are NOT doing long demos or complex sales.



But you DO need to:



sound natural, guide the conversation, and move people to action



WHAT YOU WILL DO

Make 300–600+ calls per day

Ask simple, direct questions

Handle basic objections (briefly)

Guide interested prospects into a setup call

Transfer live or schedule immediately



IDEAL CANDIDATE

Clear, neutral English

Sounds natural (not robotic)

Can think on their feet

Not overly polite or passive

Comfortable guiding conversations

Has some outbound / call experience (preferred)



IMPORTANT



This role requires:



speed

confidence

conversational control



You must be able to:



keep the call moving and get a clear next step



SCRIPT STYLE



Calls are short and direct, for example:



“Hey — quick question — are you taking new jobs right now?”



From there, you guide toward:



“Let me get you set up — we can do it right now.”



PAY

$300–$400/month base

Performance bonuses per successful setup



HOURS

35 hours/week

Must align with US hours

9 PM - 4 AM local time Philippines Time



 APPLICATION (CRITICAL FILTER)



To apply, send:



Voice recording (30–60 sec)



Your experience with outbound calling

title: Female Remote Inbound Appointment Setter (Med Spa)
description:
We help med spas pack their calendars with lip filler and 
 appointments using
 ads. You will be the first voice our clients’ leads hear. That means you are not “just a caller” – you are the front line of revenue.



We have a lot of fun, but we take our work very seriously. The goal is simple:

Be the best.

Have fun doing it.



We do not hire people to “try sales.” We hire people who want to get very good at it. If that sounds like you, keep reading. 



Schedule: flexible 5 days per week, must be available to help out some weekends, Here are the hours in EST 

Morning shift: 8 am – 3 pm EST

Evening shift: 3 pm – 11 pm EST



What You Will Do:

You will live in two modes all day: Hunting leads and Closing leads



Hunting:

Call new leads within 60 seconds every time you are not already on a call. This is non negotiable. Speed to first contact is the biggest driver of show rates. 

Work all clients’ leads in priority order:

Use GHL, Slack and our internal workflows so no lead is ever left behind.

Run our C.L.O.S.E.R. scripts word for word, naturally.

Clarify their goals, label their problem, understand what they’ve tried, then book them into the right offer.

Handle concerns and reinforce their decision so they actually show.



What Success Looks Like...

You are winning here if:

New leads are called in under 60 seconds 

You rehearse the script so much you can breathe it

You follow up a lot, and you personalize them based on the lead’s goal



Compensation:

Base: $500 USD per month + $1,000 Performance pay for doing minimum daily tasks: + (100% of current setters hit this, it is the standard, not a stretch)

Bonuses:

Monthly performance challenges up to +$500 USD extra

Uncapped +$5 USD bonus  for every low ticket booking you generate

Realistic monthly earnings for a solid performer: $1,500 USD





We pay for results and consistency. If you show up, work the system, and hit your numbers, you will earn well above typical VA roles.

Requirements

title: *Female* Full?Time Night?Shift Appointment Setter (Inbound Med Spa Leads)
description:
Full?Time Night?Shift Appointment Setter (Inbound Med Spa Leads)



Salary: 1,500 USD / month realistic ($500 base + 1,000 performance + bonuses)

Work Hours: Night shift PH time, 5 days/week (including weekends)



About the Role

BeautyGrow helps US med spas fill their calendars with lip filler, facial balancing, and Botox appointments.



We run the ads. Leads come to us.

Your job: turn those warm leads into booked appointments by calling and texting fast, every day, following our proven system. We obsess over speed, because calling leads in under 60 seconds massively increases shows and sales. 







This is full?time, long?term, and performance?driven.



What You’ll Do (Daily)

You will live in two modes: HUNTING and CLOSING.



HUNTING (whenever you are not on a live call):



Call all new leads within 60 seconds of them opting in, unless you are currently on a call. 



,

Work all our client accounts in this exact order:

New leads

Callbacks

Warm replies (people asking to book or pay)

Smart?list follow?ups (older warm leads)



Use GoHighLevel (GHL) and Slack so no lead is left untouched during your shift.



CLOSING (when you are talking to a lead):



Follow our C.L.O.S.E.R. script word?for?word, but naturally.

Ask about their goals, clarify their problems, explain the treatment simply, and book them into a time that works.

Handle basic concerns on price / fear / timing and then lock in their appointment so they actually show.



You will be setting for multiple med spa clients, not just one.



What Success Looks Like

You are considered a strong setter here if:

New leads are called in under 60 seconds 



Your queues (new, callbacks, warm, follow?ups) are cleared every shift.



You hit and beat your daily booking targets and help drive high show rates. 





Your notes are clear, your tone is professional, and clients compliment your responsiveness.

Compensation

Monthly performance bonuses may be up to +$500 USD (on top of $1500 salary)

Uncapped +5 bonus USD for every low?ticket booking

Realistic total for solid performers: around 1,500 USD+ per month

We reward consistent execution, not politics.



Requirements (Non?Negotiable)



You are based in the Philippines and comfortable working US EST night shifts (including weekends).

Strong spoken English with a clear, neutral accent that works for US patients.



Stable home setup:

At least 100 Mbps up and down internet.

No frequent power outages, or you have a reliable backup solution.

Good headset and quiet work environment.



You are hungry to get very good at sales / appointment setting, not just “have a job.”

Experience in call centers / outbound sales / appointment setting is a plus, but we will train the right person who has the work ethic and coachability.



Culture & Training

We joke a lot, but we take our work very seriously. The goal is:



Be the best.

Have fun doing it.

You get:



A detailed Appointment Setter Handbook explaining exactly how to win here.

Script rehearsal, roleplays, and call reviews so you “breathe the script,” not just read it.



Clear KPIs and coaching so your skills and income grow over time.

We like people who show up every day, do the boring work, take feedback, and raise the bar for the whole team.



—--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**HOW TO APPLY**



Send over a voice recording from 
 talking about:



- Why you think you’d be a fit for this role

- Any relevant experience (preferred, not required)

- A goal want to achieve (can be short or long term)



If I like how it sounds, I’ll respond with the next steps for getting started

(5) You will play a key role in ensuring that all

(4) You will be expected to follow defined processes while also proactively identifying performance improvements.

_____________________

FORM HERE >

title: EA + Team Support Lead | Path to Full-Time | Fast-Growing US Trademark Law Firm
description:
This is not a task-monkey VA role.



This is a chance to become the right hand of a fast-moving CEO, prove yourself quickly, and grow into a long-term seat inside a business with real 
ntum. If you love bringing order to chaos, staying one step ahead, and being the person a team can truly count on, keep reading.



About Indie Law

Indie Law is one of the top trademark-only law firms in the United States. We help business owners protect their brands, and we do it fast. We are not a slow, traditional law firm. We are a modern, systems-driven team that moves with urgency. In the past year, we have grown from $40k months to $200k months. We communicate directly, we take care of our people, and we hold a high bar for excellence.



What this role actually looks like

About 10 hours per week goes toward direct executive assistant support for our CEO: inbox, calendar, scheduling, follow-ups, and helping protect his time. The rest of your hours go toward support work across our sales, marketing, and admin departments.



On a typical day, you might clear the CEO’s inbox, prep notes before a tea
eting, follow up on a stalled marketing project, and help a sales tea
mber track down a client document. No two days look exactly the same, and that is part of what makes this role great.



What you will do

Support the CEO with inbox, calendar, scheduling, and follow-through

Join tea
etings, take clear notes, and track action items

Follow up with teammates so projects and decisions do not stall

Keep documents, details, and information organized

Provide backup support across sales, marketing, and admin

Step in when teammates are out or when extra hands are needed

Spot loose ends and gaps before they become bigger problems

Bring calm, structure, and reliability to a fast-moving team





What we are looking for

Strong written and spoken English

Excellent organization and attention to detail

Follow-through you can be proud of

Good judgment and the ability to work independently

Calm, professional communication even when priorities shift

A proactive mindset, not a wait-to-be-told mindset

High trustworthiness and a genuine sense of ownership

Curiosity and resourcefulness





This might be a great fit if you:

Love bringing order to busy, fast-moving situations

Like being the person who keeps everything on track

Enjoy variety over doing the same task on repeat every day

Notice details that other people miss

Want a role where your reliability genuinely matters

Want to grow with a business that already has real traction





Compensation and growth path

This role starts at up to 100 hours per month.

First 30 days: $7/hr, up to $700/month

After 30 days: $8/hr, up to $800/month

Within 90 days: growth to 160 hours/month at $1,280/month, based on performance





The path to full-time is real and intentional. We are not looking for a short-term hire. We are looking for someone who wants to prove themselves, grow with us, and become a long-term, deeply valued part of this team. Additional hours beyond the monthly cap must be pre-approved and are paid at the same hourly rate.



If this sounds like you, follow the steps below thoroughly, like your future depends on it, because this could be the dream job you’ve been looking for ...



1. Take the following test: 
/cgi-win/jtypes2.asp

2. Complete our job post form here: 
/to/dCp7UPAV



The opportunity for growth is here ... just show us your magic!



--



PS: We are looking for detail-oriented individuals. Having errors in your resume does not reflect well on your attention to detail. To ensure fairness to all applicants, please be aware that any errors found in your resume will negatively impact your application.

title: Project Manager
description:
Job Title: Project Manager (Digital Marketing & Coaching Focus)

Remote | Full-Time | Cross-Functional Teams



We’re looking for a highly organized and proactive Project Manager with a passion for digital marketing, personal development, and coaching. In this role, you won’t just manage timelines—you’ll lead client and internal projects from start to finish, ensuring everything runs smoothly, efficiently, and with purpose.



If you thrive in fast-paced environments, enjoy working with creative and strategic teams, and know how to keep digital campaigns on track while fostering positive relationships, this one’s for you.



As our Project Manager, you’ll own multiple client and internal projects across the coaching and digital marketing space. You’ll lead initiatives related to content creation, campaign launches,
 marketing, funnel builds, virtual events, and more—coordinating across departments like design, copywriting, and tech.



You’ll be the central point of alignment, keeping deliverables on track, supporting client needs, and ensuring deadlines are met without sacrificing quality.



Key Responsibilities

-Lead the planning, execution, and delivery of digital marketing & coaching-related projects

-Serve as the primary liaison between internal teams, stakeholders, and clients

-Define project goals, timelines, and deliverables aligned with business and coaching outcomes

-Coordinate across content, design, automation, and client success teams

-Manage timelines using tools like ClickUp, Trello, or Asana

-Run daily/weekly stand-ups, team syncs, and progress check-ins

-Create and improve SOPs, workflows, and systems that enhance team efficiency

-Maintain organized documentation, task tracking, and communication logs



What We're Looking For

-2–5 years of project management experience, preferably in digital marketing or coaching industries

-Proven ability to lead cross-functional teams and juggle multiple active projects

-Familiarity with marketing campaigns, launches, or coaching program operations

-Strong experience using project/task management tools (ClickUp, Asana, Trello, etc.)

-Exceptional communication and leadership skills

-Highly detail-oriented, results-driven, and comfortable in remote work environments



Bonus: Experience with funnels,
 platforms (e.g., HighLevel, ActiveCampaign), and coaching client onboarding



What We Offer

-100% remote work with a collaborative, mission-driven team

-The opportunity to manage high-impact projects in coaching and personal development

-Flexible schedule with a culture of ownership and accountability

-Room for growth into strategic or leadership roles

-A team that values clarity, purpose, and transformation—in work and in life

URGENT HIRING. MUST HAVE EXPERIENCED IN END-TO-END ECOMMERCE OPERATIONS

Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



We are seeking a confident and experienced tea
mber who can independently oversee e-commerce operations, take proactive initiative, and consistently deliver results with minimal supervision, ensuring long-term success and stability in the role.

title: AI Creative Producer
description:
We are looking for an AI Creative Producer / Prompt Operator who can turn ad ideas, concepts, and references into high-quality AI-generated visual assets for performance marketing.



This role is not just about writing prompts. You must know how to take a creative direction and execute it across tools like Kling, Sora, Veo, and image generation workflows, while managing iterations, matching references, organizing outputs, and maintaining consistency with our creative system.



You will work closely with the creative director to produce A-roll, B-roll, UGC-style visuals, hooks, scenes, and variations for paid ads.



What You’ll Be Doing

1. Turn ad concepts, scripts, and rough ideas into AI-generated visual outputs

2. Generate A-roll and B-roll scenes using AI video and image tools

3. Run and manage workflows across tools such as Kling, Sora, Veo, Midjourney, Nano Banana, Seedance, or similar

4. Create prompts based on specific visual direction, framing, emotion, pacing, and style

5. Match references closely, including subject look, environment, camera angle, lighting, and mood

6. Iterate quickly based on feedback and improve outputs until they meet creative standards

7. Organize generations, versions, naming systems, and folders clearly for team use

8. Follow internal prompt systems, style rules, and output guidelines

9. Help build repeatable workflows for generating scalable ad creatives

10. Support the team in producing multiple ad variations efficiently



What We’re Looking For

1. Strong experience with AI prompting for image and video generation

2. Good understanding of how different AI tools behave and when to use each one

3. Ability to generate visuals that feel natural, believable, and ad-ready

4. Strong eye for composition, lighting, realism, continuity, and reference matching

5. Fast iteration speed and strong attention to detail

6. Organized working style with clean file/version management

7. Able to follow creative direction closely without needing excessive hand-holding

title: 3D Artist & AI Design Workflow Developer
description:
3D Artist & AI Design Workflow Developer



USD Pay · Long-Term · Philippines



What We're Building



We build AI-powered consumer products, game experiences, and developer tooling across multiple verticals. Our team ships fast using AI coding agents as core workflow — and we need someone who brings that same velocity to visual asset production.



We're looking for a 3D artist who works alongside AI tools the way our developers work alongside AI coding agents: not as an afterthought, but as the default way of working.



What the Work Looks Like



The immediate project is a browser-based multiplayer strategy board game that needs a full set of stylized low-poly hex terrain tiles, game pieces, tokens, and environmental decorations — modeled in Blender, exported for multiple targets. We work with existing CC0 asset libraries (like KayKit) as a starting point, extending and creating new assets that match established art direction rather than starting from scratch every time.



Beyond that, we have ongoing needs across:

- An AI image and video generation consumer app that needs marketing assets, app store graphics, and visual content for social media

- Multiple web properties that need design assets, icons, and branded graphics

- Internal tooling and design system work that bridges design platforms with developer workflows

- 3D printing pipelines where game assets are exported as physical products



3D Asset Production

- Model, texture, and export hex-based terrain tiles and game pieces in Blender for use in both real-time 3D (Three.js/WebGL) and pre-rendered isometric sprite pipelines

- Build and maintain a library of modular hex tiles at KayKit quality level — stylized low-poly with clean geometry, consistent art direction, and print-ready topology

- Extend and adapt existing CC0 asset packs to match project art direction, kitbashing and creating new pieces that feel native to the set

- Export the same models for multiple targets: GLB for web rendering, isometric PNG renders for lightweight 2D fallback, STL for 3D printing

- Create game pieces, tokens, UI elements, and environmental decorations that work across terrain themes and player color palettes



AI-Assisted Design Workflows

- Develop reusable Blender scripts and automation for batch rendering (isometric camera setups, spritesheet generation, STL export with print-ready wall thickness)

- Build and test prompt libraries for AI image generation — iterating on style consistency, scene composition, and output quality across multiple models

- Create and refine AI agent skills for graphic design tasks: asset generation, style transfer, background removal, format conversion, batch processing

- Research and evaluate new AI image/video generation models as they release — test them against real production needs, not benchmarks



Design for Product & Marketing

- Create assets for social media campaigns, app store listings, and web properties across multiple products

- Produce stylized artwork, promotional graphics, and short-form video assets using AI generation tools with manual polish

- Test and iterate on prompts for a consumer AI image generation app — evaluating output quality, style accuracy, and edge cases across different AI model backends

- Develop visual content that maintains brand consistency across product lines



Design Tooling & Integration (Nice to Have)

- Work with design platforms (Penpot, Figma, or similar) through MCP server integrations to bridge design systems with developer workflows

- Build or extend design tool integrations so AI agents can programmatically create, query, and export design assets

- Help establish design-to-code pipelines where assets flow from design tools into product builds with minimal manual handoff



How We Work



Same pattern as the rest of the team: see a gap, research what's available, build it or adopt the best option, ship it, share it with the team.



We needed a pipeline that produces game assets for 3D rendering, 2D fallback, and physical 3D printing from a single source model. So we're building one. We needed AI agents that can batch-render assets, generate spritesheets, and export print-ready STLs without manual intervention. So we're building the skills for that. We needed prompt libraries that produce consistent styled output across 20+ terrain types. So we need someone who will build and test them.



A new AI image model drops — by the end of the week, you've tested it against our production prompts and reported back. A new Blender addon appears — you've tried it on a real asset batch. A new design integration shows up on GitHub — you've evaluated whether it solves a real problem for our pipeline.



What We Expect From You



You ship assets, not concepts. Moodboards and style explorations are means to an end. The end is exported, optimized, production-ready files in the correct formats at the correct resolutions.



You automate before you repeat. If you've rendered the same tile at 6 rotations manually twice, the third time should be a script. Blender Python, headless batch rendering, and CLI pipelines are part of the job — not a nice-to-have.



You experiment with AI tools constantly. New image generation models, new ControlNet techniques, new style transfer approaches — you try them on real tasks and form views about what works. You maintain and improve prompt libraries based on what you learn.



You work in version control. .blend source files, export scripts, prompt libraries, and asset manifests live in git. You write commit messages that explain what changed and why. You work on the team's development branch alongside AI coding agents who may be modifying the same project.



You communicate visually and early. When you're iterating on a style direction, share work-in-progress renders — not a message saying "working on it." When something looks wrong at game-board scale, flag it before you've rendered the whole set.



Required Skills



- Blender — modeling, texturing, UV unwrapping, materials/shaders, Python scripting for automation, headless batch rendering

- Low-poly 3D art — clean topology, stylized aesthetic, consistent art direction across large asset sets (50-200+ pieces)

- Multi-target export — understanding of GLB/glTF for web, STL for 3D printing, PNG sprite rendering for 2D fallback

- AI image generation — hands-on experience with at least two of: Midjourney, Stable Diffusion (ComfyUI/A1111), Leonardo.ai, DALL-E, or similar. Ability to write, test, and iterate on prompts for consistent output

- Git workflow — comfortable committing binary assets, resolving conflicts, working on shared branches

- Visual design fundamentals — color theory, composition, typography for social media and marketing assets



Nice to Have



- Experience with hex grid or tile-based game art

- Experience with isometric rendering pipelines (pre-rendered sprites from 3D models)

- Familiarity with MCP (Model Context Protocol) or willingness to learn — we use MCP servers to connect design tools to developer workflows

- Experience with Penpot, Figma, or OpenPencil for design system work

- 3D printing knowledge — understanding of wall thickness, overhangs, support structures, FDM vs resin constraints

- Experience with Three.js, glTF optimization, or web 3D asset pipelines

- Substance Designer or procedural texture experience

- Video editing or motion graphics for short-form social content



Tech Stack You'll Touch



Core:

- Blender (modeling, scripting, batch rendering)

- AI image generation tools (multiple models and platforms)

- Git, CLI tools, headless rendering pipelines



Product Integration:

- glTF/GLB for real-time 3D web rendering

- PNG/WebP spritesheets for 2D game rendering

- STL for 3D print export

- SVG/CSS for UI elements and icons



Design Tooling:

- Penpot, Figma, or similar for design system work

- MCP design server integrations (emerging — you'd help build these)

- Asset management and CDN deployment



You don't need to know all of this on day one. You need to be the kind of person who opens Blender on day one and starts modeling a hex tile.



Schedule & Availability



The immediate game asset work is a full-time engagement. After that initial push, the role transitions to part-time with ongoing work across our other products and web properties. Part-time to start is also acceptable if needed.



The team currently works 4pm–12am PHT (Manila time), but other schedules overlapping with US Eastern business hours can also be accommodated. We work this window as a team.



Compensation



Starting rate: $2.50–$4.00/hr USD, paid via OnlineJobs.ph / Payoneer. We're a bootstrapped startup pre-launch. Compensation scales once we launch and have revenue — early tea
mbers who prove themselves will be first in line for increases.



What you get:

- Production experience shipping 3D game assets with professional engineering practices and version control

- Daily hands-on experience with AI image generation tools, prompt engineering, and automated asset pipelines

- Exposure to MCP design integrations, agentic workflows, and design-to-code pipelines most artists never touch

- Direct mentorship on a small team — no layers between you and decisions

- USD income with growth tied directly to company growth

- A real voice in how the art pipeline works and what tools we build next



How to Apply



Send your application with:

- Your portfolio or examples of 3D work you're proud of (Blender models, rendered scenes, game assets, 3D prints — anything)

- If you've used AI tools to generate or assist with visual assets (especially in Blender), tell us about your process — what tools, what worked, what didn't

- Your experience with Blender, AI image tools, and any game art or design system work

- Your availability (full-time or part-time)

- Your expected monthly rate (USD)

???? Tech Stack

- Tailwind CSS

title: Marketplace Manager (Amazon + eBay + Walmart) | Dropshipping + FBA + Multi-Channel Growth
description:
Marketplace Manager (Amazon + eBay + Walmart) | Dropshipping + FBA + Multi-Channel Growth

ABOUT US

We are a US-based commerce company, the American arm of an established European e-commerce and trading group operating across 29 countries with 650,000+ products across multiple brands in construction, home improvement, sustainability, and premium bath & kitchen.

We are building a scalable marketplace system — not just listing products.



THIS IS NOT A TYPICAL MARKETPLACE ROLE

We are not looking for someone who only uploads listings and waits for instructions.

We need a Marketplace Builder who can:

create structure,

move fast,

grow sales,

and build a pipeline of partners and dropshippers.

You will work directly with the CEO and Operations Manager.

Fast decisions. No bureaucracy.



WHAT YOU’LL WORK ON

Marketplace Account Management

Manage and grow Amazon, eBay, and Walmart accounts

Upload and optimize product listings (titles, bullet points, keywords, images)

Manage pricing updates and product availability

Handle compliance, account health, and performance issues

Dropshipping Partner Acquisition

Source and onboard new US-based dropshippers

Daily outreach and relationship building

Goal: 2 new dropshippers per day

Fulfillment Workflow Setup

Help implement tools like ShipStation

Support a fulfillment system where inventory is shipped from a private warehouse/garage setup

Coordinate fulfillment workflows and shipping performance

Sales Pipeline Execution

Ensure products are continuously listed and sold

Coordinate with operations for stock movement

Track marketplace KPIs and report weekly



TOOLS / PLATFORMS YOU MUST KNOW

Amazon Seller Central (must be strong)

eBay Seller Hub

Walmart Seller Center

ShipStation or similar fulfillment tools

Google Sheets / Excel

Basic reporting + KPI tracking



MUST HAVE

? Deep experience managing Amazon + eBay + Walmart

 ? Strong understanding of dropshipping operations

 ? Experience with FBA / FBM / shipping workflows

 ? Can troubleshoot listing issues and account restrictions

 ? Excellent English communication

 ? Highly proactive and organized (we move fast)



NICE TO HAVE

Experience with ShipStation setup and automation

Experience working with warehouse/3PL/garage fulfillment

Experience launching new accounts from scratch

Knowledge of product research tools (Keepa, Helium10, etc.)



WORK HOURS

20 hours per week (part-time)

Flexible schedule, but must be responsive and able to coordinate daily



PAY

Competitive hourly rate based on experience.

 (We pay for real expertise, not beginners.)



KEY PERFORMANCE TARGETS

???? List and optimize products consistently across channels

 ???? Improve sales velocity and account health

 ???? Build a dropshipper acquisition pipeline

 ???? Target: 2 new dropshippers/day (once system is running)



HOW TO APPLY

Send:

Your CV

Your experience managing Amazon/eBay/Walmart (short summary)

Links/screenshots of accounts you managed (if possible)

Your hourly rate expectation

Your earliest start date

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
We're looking for a detail-oriented virtual assistant to finalize marketing documents before they're sent to clients. Your core responsibilities will include:



1. Image sourcing — finding relevant images to accompany the document text

2. Link verification — confirming that all source links are accurate and topically relevant

3. Light copy editing — making minor text edits to improve readability



The workflow is highly templatized and consistent across all document types. You'll go through a short onboarding period to learn our internal SOP, after which you'll be expected to work independently. The average turnaround per document is approximately 2 hours.



The baseline workload is two documents per day, however volume may fluctuate depending on demand. You set your own work schedule



Requirements:

1. Fluent in English

2. Strong attention to detail

3. Proficient with Google Docs and Google Search



To apply, send us an
 to: 
 the
, explain why you're a good fit for this role. We're evaluating applicants based on how clearly and thoughtfully they present their relevance to the position. Selected candidates will move on to a paid test task, followed by a short online interview.

title: Video editor for Ecommerce
description:
We're looking for one skilled video editor to join our team and create short-form video ads for e-commerce products. Most of the work involves AI-powered video generation tools, so experience with tools like HiggsField, Runway, VEO, Kling, or similar is a big plus.



This is an ongoing role, not a one-time project.





WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



- Creating short-form video ads for e-commerce products

- Working with AI video generation tools as part of your daily workflow

- Editing and polishing AI-generated outputs into finished creatives

- Iterating on concepts based on feedback and performance data

- Adapting winning ad formats to new products and angles





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- Experience editing short-form video content (ads, reels, TikToks, etc.)

- Familiarity with AI video/image generation tools

- Strong attention to detail

- Ability to problem-solve independently — you'll be given goals, not step-by-step instructions

- Reliable internet and availability during EST hours (11 AM - 9 PM Eastern Standard time)





HOW TO APPLY



Please include ALL of the following in your application. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



1. Start your message with the word "sunrise"



2. Record a short Loom video (2 minutes max) where you:

- Show one video you've edited or created (screen share it)

- Briefly explain what you made and what tools you used

- Tell us one thing you would do differently if you made it again today

(If you don't have a Loom account, a Google Drive link to a screen recording works too.)



3. Answer this question in your application message:

What AI tools have you used for video or image creation, and what did you like or dislike about each one?



4. Include a link to your portfolio or samples of your work (Google Drive, YouTube, Vimeo, etc.)





WHAT HAPPENS NEXT



- We review applications and select a small number of candidates

- Selected candidates will receive a short paid test task ($30 USD)

- Based on the test results, we hire one editor for the ongoing role





COMPENSATION



Starting at $300/month, with room to grow past $
/month if you can handle the volume and put in hard work!

title: Experienced Copywriter (Direct Response) - $2,000–$4,000/month
description:
Work Hours: Full-time, Mon–Fri, day shift



ABOUT US



Young Publisher | 



- We’re an international digital publishing company

- We’ve been hiring Filipinos for over 5 years

- We offer long-term roles

- We don't disappear, we pay on time



ABOUT THE ROLE



We’re looking for an experienced Direct-Response Copywriter who can:



- Take full ownership of performance-driven campaigns

- Write
s that get opened, read, and clicked

- Create stop-scrolling ads

- Craft persuasive copy that drives readers to act



This is a full-time role with clear growth opportunities. You’ll start with
s and ads, and as you prove yourself, move into sales pages and VSLs.



RESPONSIBILITIES



- Write broadcast
s and automated sequences

- Create Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Help produce ebooks and lead magnets using AI tools

- Progress into sales pages and VSL scripts for launches



BENEFITS



- Get direct feedback from an 8-figure copywriter: a serious opportunity to sharpen your skills fast.

- Get access to premium courses and AI communities. We invest in our team because we want long-term growth.

- We encourage AI tools — but only with strong critical thinking. This is not a beginner role.



ROLE SUMMARY



- Full-time (Mon–Fri, 8 AM - 5 PM PH Time)

- Long-term position with growth into sales pages and VSLs

- $2,000 – $4,000 USD per month, depending on experience

- Fully remote

- Reliable, on-time payments every two weeks via Wise



REQUIREMENTS



- At least 2 years of direct-response copywriting experience (not blog or content writing)

- Proven results: open rates, CTR, conversions, ROAS

- Experience writing for coaches, course creators, or info product businesses

- Native-level English for US, UK, or Australian audiences

- Strong understanding of hooks, emotional triggers, objection handling, and CTAs

- Experience with Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Ability to adapt to different brand voices

- Comfortable using AI tools with critical thinking

- Strong communication skills and independence

- Reliable, responsive, proactive, and coachable



HIRING PROCESS



#1: Paid test task

#2: Interview

#3: Paid test month at 50% salary



We’re looking for professionals who know their craft and want long-term growth.



HOW TO APPLY



Apply via our Typeform here: 
/to/CZb9go1y



Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



Young Publisher



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Meta Ads Manager/Media Buyer — Roofing Lead Generation Agency (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
We are a fast-growing lead generation agency that helps roofing companies across the UK(primary focus rn) and USA get more customers through Meta 
/Instagram) advertising. We manage everything from ad creation to lead qualification using GoHighLevel CRM. We currently manage campaigns for multiple roofing clients and are scaling quickly — which is where you come in.



YOUR ROLE:

You will be our dedicated Meta Ads Campaign Manager, responsible for setting up, managing, and 
/Instagram ad campaigns for our roofing clients. This is a hands-on execution role, not a strategy-only position. You’ll be working inside Meta Business Suite and Ads Manager daily.

DAILY RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Set up new Meta ad campaigns from scratch (CBO and ABO structures)

-Create and manage ad sets with proper audience targeting (location, age, interest, lookalike, retargeting)

-Write ad copy variations using proven frameworks (AIDA, PAS, story-led, social proof)

-Monitor live campaigns daily — check CPL, CTR, CPC, frequency, relevance scores

-Make optimisation decisions: pause underperforming ads, scale winners, adjust budgets

-A/B test creatives, copy, audiences, and placements systematically

-Pull weekly performance reports for each client account

-Upload and manage creatives (images/videos) in Ads Manager

-Coordinate with our Client Success VA on lead quality feedback

-Flag any issues, anomalies, or account problems immediately



REQUIRED SKILLS (NON-NEGOTIABLE):

-1-3 years hands-on experience managing Meta/Facebook ad campaigns (not just boosted posts)

-Experience with lead generation campaigns specifically (Lead Forms and/or landing page conversions)

-Strong understanding of CBO vs ABO campaign structures

-Ability to write compelling ad copy in English (5th-grade reading level, conversational tone)

-Experience managing $1,000-10,000+ monthly ad budgets

-Comfortable with Meta Business Suite, Ads Manager, and Business Portfolio

-Basic image editing skills (Canva or similar) for ad creative adjustments



BONUS SKILLS (NICE TO HAVE):

-Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM

-Experience in home services, roofing, or construction niche

-Google Ads experience

-Basic video editing for short-form ad creatives

-Meta Blueprint Certification



WORK SETUP:

Full-time (40 hours/week), Monday–Friday

Flexible schedule but must have 4 hours overlap with UK business hours (8AM-5PM GMT)

100% remote — work from home

Must have reliable internet (minimum 25mbps) and a backup connection

Must have own laptop/computer with at least 8GB RAM



WHAT WE OFFER:

-Competitive salary with 90-day performance-based raise

-Performance bonuses tied to campaign results (CPL improvements)

-Full training on our systems, SOPs, and client processes via Loom video library

-Clear growth path — opportunity to become Team Lead as we scale to 10+ media buyers

-13th month pay (December bonus equivalent to 1 month salary)

-5 days paid time off after 6 months, 10 days after 1 year

-Stable, long-term role in a fast-growing agency



TO APPLY — YOU MUST ANSWER THESE QUESTIONS:

-Applications without answers to ALL of these will be automatically rejected:

-How many Meta ad accounts have you personally managed at the same time? What was the total monthly budget across all accounts?

-Describe a lead generation campaign you ran on Meta. What was the niche, the daily budget, and the average CPL you achieved?

-What is the difference between CBO and ABO? When would you use each?

-A roofing client’s campaign has been running for 5 days. The CPL is £35 (target is £15). CTR is 0.8%. What steps would you take to improve performance? Be specific.

-What is your internet speed? (Run a speed test at speedtest.net and share the result)

Include the word “ROOFTOP” at the start of your application so I know you read the full posting.

title: High converting social media ads
description:
OVERVIEW:



At Blue Zone Pets, we believe the single biggest lever you have over your dog's health is what you put in their bowl. We're a pet nutrition brand built around one mission: their longest life, back in your hands. Our food is 80% real meat, dried below 40°C to lock in maximum nutrients, with zero fillers, zero additives — just ingredients you can actually read and trust. We're building a brand that dog owners genuinely believe in, backed by a 4.6 Trustpilot rating and a growing community of owners who've seen the difference real nutrition makes. We're still early, moving fast, and looking for people who want to build something that matters. Join us as a Graphic Designer and help us become the standard for how dogs should be fed.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. Design high-performing creatives, static ads, and branded assets that are on-brand and built to convert — owning the visual output from concept to final file.

2. Use AI generation tools to produce raw assets, then refine them with enhancement tools (Magnific AI, Topaz, Photoshop AI) until quality is indistinguishable from a professional shoot.

3. Proactively pitch new content ideas, visual formats, and workflow improvements — you don't wait for briefs, you spot opportunities and ship.



REQUIREMENTS:

1. A sharp-eyed designer with deep command of layout, typography, colour, and composition — highly proficient in Figma (primary) and Adobe Creative Suite.

2. Skilled at AI-assisted design: you use generative tools to create base assets and enhancement tools to push them to production quality. One render is never your final output.

3. Self-managing, organised, and deadline-driven — you don't need hand-holding. You see what needs doing and do it.

4. A quick learner who adapts fast to new tools and workflows; experience with Notion for project management, WhatsApp for daily communication, and openness to tools like Gather for virtual collaboration as we scale.

5. Genuinely excited about what we're building at Blue Zone — you care about quality, you care about pets, and you want to be part of a brand that's changing how people think about dog nutrition.



WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT FROM US:

- A small, ambitious team where your work has direct impact — no layers, no bureaucracy, just ownership and 
ntum.

- A culture that rewards initiative. If you spot an opportunity and act on it, we'll notice.

- Real growth potential — we're scaling quickly, and the people who join now will shape how this company operates as it grows.

- Founders who are hands-on, transparent, and genuinely invested in your development — not just your output.



COMPENSATION:

- Part-time position. Monthly creative sprints

- Competitive rate based on experience and qualifications. Per project basis, $10 per project ? $300 p/m



APPLICATION PROCESS:

Here's how to apply:



Fill out this form ? Apply here: 
/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfpKsPzRTlRlBchmQGnBe44Ny5yJKk-vDUbNtUykxA_Ezm2aQ/viewform?usp=header



Only completed applications will be considered.



Once you've submitted, reply here with the subject line: "PAW"



We're looking forward to hearing from you. If you're the right fit, you'll be joining a team that's building something dogs (and their owners) actually deserve.



Best regards,

Dean

Co-founder of Blue Zone Pets

title: Amazon graphic designer + listing optimisation
description:
We’re a fast-growing eCommerce brand selling across multiple Amazon marketplaces, seeking a talented Amazon Listing Optimization & Creative Specialist to own both the strategy and design of our listings. You’ll combine data-driven SEO skills with high-impact visuals to boost visibility, conversions, and brand presence.



What You’ll Do



Create and manage listings via flat files across marketplaces (US, UK, SG, etc.)



Optimize titles, bullets, descriptions, and backend keywords using Amazon SEO best practices



Design high-converting product images, infographics, lifestyle shots, and A+ Content



Edit and enhance product photography, create mockups, and maintain brand consistency



Run A/B tests on titles, images, and pricing strategies to improve performance



Stay up-to-date with Amazon algorithms, trends, and creative requirements



What We’re Looking For



Proven experience in Amazon listing creation & optimization (SEO, keyword tools like Helium 10/DataDive)



Strong portfolio of Amazon design work (Photoshop, Illustrator, or similar)



Solid understanding of Amazon’s guidelines and marketplace best practices



Highly detail-oriented, creative, and data-driven



Bonus Points For



Amazon PPC knowledge, 3D rendering, or video editing



Experience with Amazon Stores, Brand Registry, and Enhanced Brand Content



Why Join Us?

Flexible work, a passionate team, and big growth potential.



Apply Now: Send your resume and cover letter starting with 'JOY', Amazon portfolio, and a short note on why you’re the right fit.

title: Insurance Virtual Assistant – Renewal
description:
We are a fast-growing insurance service provider supporting agencies and brokers in Florida. We are looking for a Virtual Assistant who will specialize in insurance policy renewals across Homeowners, Property, Commercial, and Auto lines.



This role is ideal for VAs who are detail-oriented, organized, and proactive in managing renewal timelines and client follow-ups. Insurance experience is preferred, but we provide paid training.



What You’ll Do

- Manage and track policy renewals for Homeowners, Property, Commercial, and Auto insurance

- Review upcoming expirations and prepare renewal quotes and options

- Follow up with clients, carriers, and internal teams to ensure timely renewals

- Review policies for accuracy, coverage limits, and changes prior to renewal

- Update client records, renewal status, and documentation in internal systems

- Help prevent lapses in coverage through consistent monitoring and follow-ups

- Perform administrative tasks related to the renewal process



What We’re Looking For

- At least 1 year VA or office support experience (insurance renewals experience preferred)

- Exposure to Homeowners, Property, Commercial, or Auto insurance is a strong advantage

- Familiarity with policy reviews, remarketing, or renewal workflows preferred

- Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple deadlines

- Good English communication skills

- Comfortable speaking with U.S.-based clients

- Organized, reliable, and able to work independently in a remote setup



Pay, Training and Work Hours

-Paid Training (3 months) at PHP 150/hour

-Regular Rate after Training: PHP 162/hour + benefits (paid SSS, Internet, Philhealth, PTO, Dental, 13th month and a lot more)

-Full-time:  9am-5pm US EST Mondays to Fridays, long-term role



Application Questions

Do you have experience working as a virtual assistant or in an office support role?

Are you comfortable speaking with U.S.-based clients over the phone?

Which of the following have you handled: Homeowners, Property, Commercial, or Auto insurance renewals? Please describe your experience.



Application Questions

1. Do you have experience working as a virtual assistant or in an office support role?

2. Are you comfortable speaking with U.S.-based clients over the phone?

3. Have you handled billing, payment tracking, or similar administrative tasks before?



Interested applicants please
 your resume and answer to the application questions to

title: Customer Support Representative
description:
Join the team behind Clipster.gg!



We help social media creators around the world earn money by connecting them with top brands in music, gaming, and entertainment. From TikTok to YouTube Shorts, our tools help creators monetize without compromising creativity — and that’s where you come in.



As Clipster continues to scale, we’re looking for a reliable, communicative, and detail-oriented Customer Support Representative to help creators get fast, clear answers and a smooth experience on our platform.



What You’ll Be Doing:



As part of our Creator Support Team, you’ll be the first point of contact for creators using Clipster.

Your main goal is simple: help creators quickly, clearly, and correctly.



You’ll handle incoming questions, resolve common issues, guide creators through campaigns, and escalate more complex cases when needed. This role is essential for creator satisfaction, retention, and trust.



This is a communication-heavy role that requires clarity, patience, and strong written English.



Daily Responsibilities:



Respond to creator inquiries via 
 and internal support channels.

Answer questions about campaigns, submissions, payouts, and platform usage.

Resolve common issues by following internal SOPs and support guidelines.

Escalate technical or complex cases to the appropriate internal team.

Track and document support cases using tools like Notion and Google Sheets.

Provide clear, friendly, and professional responses at all times.

Maintain a high response quality, even during busy periods.



Be available for weekend (every weekend one 8 hour shift or two 4 hour shifts) and night shifts and flexible hours as support volume changes.



Job Details:



Type: Hourly contract ($3/hour, paid monthly)

Hours: Flexible, with weekend and night availability required

Tracking: Hubstaff

Tools: Notion, Slack, 
, Gather, CreatorCore

Start: Short test task, paid 2-week trial, long-term collaboration if it’s a great fit



What We’re Looking For:



Excellent written English and strong communication skills.

A calm, structured, and solution-oriented mindset.

Ability to work independently and follow support processes.

High reliability and consistency in response quality.

Comfort using 
, Notion, Slack, and collaborative tools.

Willingness to learn platform details and adapt to changing workflows.



Bonus Points If…



You have experience in customer support, community support, or online platforms is required.

You enjoy helping people and explaining things clearly.

You’re familiar with TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, or creator workflows.





Why Clipster?



Clipster is trusted by thousands of creators worldwide to turn short-form content into real earnings.

By joining our Creator Support Team, you directly impact creator satisfaction, trust, and long-term success on the platform.

Expect a fast-moving, remote team culture that values ownership, clarity, and strong communication.



How to Apply:



Send us a short message including:

Why you think you’d be a great fit for a creator support role.

A brief example of how you would help a frustrated user with a problem.



Applicants with no similiar experience will not be considered.

title: Digital Operations & Automation Specialist
description:
We are a growing group of businesses looking for a proactive Digital Operations & Workflow Specialist to work closely with the owner and internal team. This role is central to improving how the business operates day to day.

You will help streamline workflows, support staff with systems and tools, maintain our websites, and gradually implement automation and AI solutions to improve efficiency across the business.

This is a long-term role for someone who enjoys problem-solving, helping people, and making businesses run better.



Key Responsibilities

- Workflow & Process Improvement.

- Review existing business processes and identify inefficiencies.

- Recommend and implement improved workflows.

- Automate repetitive tasks where possible.

- Help document processes and create simple SOPs.



Team Support:

- Assist staff with systems, tools, and technical issues.

- Act as a go-to person for operational and digital support.

- Set up and improve internal tools and integrations.

- Communicate clearly with non-technical tea
mbers.



Web & Technical Support:

- Build, update, and maintain company websites.

- Manage website security, backups, and performance.

- Create new pages or features as required.

- Troubleshoot website and technical issues.



Automation & AI (Ongoing Development):

- Assist with implementing automation tools (e.g. Zapier, Make)

- Help integrate AI tools into business workflows

- Research and suggest new tools or systems that improve efficiency

- Continuously learn and apply new technologies



Skills & Experience:

Required:

- Experience with website development or maintenance (e.g. WordPress or similar CMS).

- Strong problem-solving skills.

- Excellent written and spoken English.

- Ability to work independently and take ownership of tasks.

- Comfortable supporting non-technical tea
mbers.



Desirable (but not required):



- Experience with automation tools or APIs

- Familiarity with AI tools or workflow automation

- Operations, systems, or internal support experience

- SEO, performance optimisation, or analytics knowledge



Who We’re Looking For:

- Proactive and improvement-focused.

- Comfortable wearing multiple hats.

- Enjoys helping others and solving operational problems.

- Curious and eager to learn new tools and skills.

- Looking for a long-term role and growth opportunity.

title: Web Developer / Digital Solutions Specialist
description:
About the Role



We are a growing group of businesses seeking a motivated and adaptable Web Developer to work closely with the owner and internal teams. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys building and maintaining websites, problem-solving across multiple projects, and is excited about learning and implementing emerging technologies—particularly AI integrations and workflow automation.



This is a long-term opportunity to grow alongside our businesses and expand your skill set beyond traditional web development.



Key Responsibilities:

- Build, update, and maintain multiple business websites

- Ensure websites are secure, responsive, and optimised for performance and SEO

- Troubleshoot technical issues and implement improvements

- Collaborate on new website features, landing pages, and digital tools

- Assist with integrating AI tools into websites and internal workflows

- Help design and implement automated processes to improve business efficiency

- Stay up to date with web technologies, AI tools, and best practices



Skills & Experience:



Required:

- Experience with web development (e.g. HTML, CSS, JavaScript, WordPress or similar CMS)

- Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail

- Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects

- Clear communication and willingness to collaborate



Desirable (but not required):

- Experience with backend development, APIs, or cloud services

- Familiarity with AI tools, automation platforms, or workflow systems

- Experience with SEO, performance optimisation, or analytics



What We’re Looking For

- Someone proactive, curious, and eager to learn.

- Autonomous, willing to work alone and learn independently.

- A developer who enjoys working directly with business owners.

- Interest in expanding skills into AI, automation, and digital innovation

- A long-term mindset and desire to grow with the business



What We Offer



- Flexible working arrangements.

- Exposure to multiple businesses and industries.

- Opportunity to upskill in AI integrations and automation.

- Real influence over systems, tools, and technical direction.

- Supportive environment focused on growth and innovation.

title: AI Photoshop & Video Editor
description:
???? Part-Time AI Photoshop & Video Editor  

Remote | Flexible Hours | FanFaveMedia



?? IMPORTANT — PLEASE READ

This role is ONLY for editors actively using AI tools daily.  

If you are not experienced with the platforms listed below, this position is not a fit.



About the Role

FanFaveMedia is seeking a part-time AI-native Photoshop & Video Editor to help scale high-volume creator content using advanced AI workflows. This role combines traditional editing skills with cutting-edge AI generation, enhancement, and motion tools.



We are not training beginners. We are looking for someone who already understands how to move fast with AI while maintaining quality and consistency.



 ? REQUIRED TOOLS & EXPERIENCE (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

You must have hands-on experience using:

- Nanobanana Pro

- Kling 2.6 motion control 

- Wavespeed

- Higgsfield



Applicants without experience in these tools will not be considered.



### Required Skills

- Advanced Photoshop skills (retouching, compositing, AI-assisted workflows)

- Short-form video editing experience (vertical content preferred)

- Strong understanding of AI-generated visuals, motion, and consistency

- Ability to replicate styles and maintain brand continuity

- Fast, reliable turnaround times



### Responsibilities

- Edit AI-enhanced photos and short-form videos

- Generate and enhance assets using required AI platforms

- Maintain consistent visual quality across creator brands

- Optimize content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and
/X

- Work independently while meeting deadlines



 Bonus (Nice to Have)

- Creator or influencer content experience

- After Effects, CapCut, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

- Understanding of social media hooks and retention

- Experience with high-volume content pipelines



 Hours & Pay

- 10–20 hours per week

- Pay is competitive, based on skill, speed, and AI proficiency



How to Apply

Please send:

1. A short intro highlighting your AI editing experience

2. A portfolio or examples using Nanobanana / Kling / Wavespeed / Higgsfield

3. A brief breakdown of your current AI workflow
