title: Automotive Glass Sales Agent B2C
description:
Fix.Glass is a dynamic, customer-focused company in the vehicle glass replacement industry. We are looking for motivated Internal Sales Agents to join our remote team! You will handle high-volume inbound sales leads, answer and make calls, send messages, book jobs, and order parts and above all manage client expectations! If you thrive in a fast-paced environment and have excellent communication and negotiation skills, we want to hear from you!







Key Responsibilities:



Handle inbound and outbound sales calls professionally.

Respond to customer inquiries via phone and messaging platforms on our all in one customized platform which helps you in sales to keep perfect track over every single lead.

Process job bookings and coordinate part orders.

Convert leads into successful sales using negotiation and problem-solving skills.

Maintain accurate records and meet sales targets.

Ensure bookings are attended to and all communication and services are managed between all parties.

Order parts from our suppliers.

Able to work in a fast paced environment, all leads have a short life cycle.

Work Schedule And Compensation:

You will work under one of the following shift patterns - UK time 08:00am to 20:00pm

Choose your shift type:



Shift type 1: 3 days on, 1 day off (11 hour shift +1 hour lunch) 110 hours over two weeks  



Shift type 2: 3 days on, 2 days off (11 hour shift +1 hour lunch) 88 hours over two weeks



28 Paid Holidays accumulated per calendar year. We do not follow weekdays or national holidays. Holidays must be chosen manually yourself, and you can match them with national holidays if you wish.

Probation period is 6 months, during this time you can accumulate paid leave but can only use it on public holidays within your Country.

Payments made Wednesday every two weeks straight into your bank account.

Salary: Paid per hour £4.40, you will need to make more commission than hours worked to get a good production rate.





Requirements: ?



A quiet home workspace with a professional setup.

A PC and dual monitor, wired microphone, and cable fiber internet connection for seamless communication (WIFI not recommended).

Strong sales, negotiation, and problem-solving skills.

Self-motivated, goal-oriented, and able to work independently.

PC and technical knowledge is a must.

Attention to detail.

Why Join Fix.Glass?



Remote Work: Enjoy the freedom of working from the comfort of your home.

Innovative Environment: Be part of a forward-thinking company with a passion for excellence.

Supportive Team: Work alongside a collaborative team dedicated to your success.

On average our top Sales agent makes £800 - £1000+ or more every two weeks if you push to succeed!

title: Windscreen Technician
description:
We are hiring mobile windscreen technicians UK nationwide!



Join us today to become a part of our growing team as we expand.       







Self-employed, subcontractors, part-time and fully employed positions available nationwide.



Locations available: UK nationwide!







The Role:



Replace windscreens & door glass at customer locations in your area

Assist occasionally in the workshop

Maintain high-quality standards





Requirements:



1+ years of experience

UK/EU driving licence

Clear criminal record

Reliable, with a strong work ethic and a positive attitude 





For full term position:



Monday to Friday 8AM - 5PM with 1 hour lunch

Monday to Friday after hours pay is £40 per job

Weekend jobs can be accepted at an additional £60 per job





Compensation & Benefits:



Biweekly pay (every 2 weeks)

Brand new 2024 work van (cruise control, air con, lane assist, auto wipers, auto high beam, heated folding mirrors, reversing camera, front and rear parking sensors)

28 days holiday + paid birthday off

Ongoing training (window tinting, regulator replacement)

Clear and helpful job management app





Additionally:



Some days there are 5 jobs planned on schedule to be completed by 5pm and then drive home. Other days 3 jobs planned on schedule with longer driving time to be completed by 5pm and then drive home. Occasionally necessary to do 2 far travelling jobs. Any job booked after 5pm and accepted by technician will result in overtime pay. Our customized all in one platform calculates travel time, locations and job details for an easy and efficient work day.

title: Virtual Assistant & Technical Support Specialist
description:
TechToast Academy is a 25-week Arduino-based coding and electronics program for kids ages 8+. We're looking for a detail-oriented VA with hands-on Arduino experience to join our small but fast-growing team.



This is a dual role — you'll manage day-to-day admin tasks AND handle technical support
s from parents and kids working through our Arduino-based curriculum.



Responsibilities:

- Manage and respond to customer
s daily

- Troubleshoot Arduino-specific issues with customers (wiring, code, components, common errors)

- Handle order inquiries, returns, and general support

- Assist with admin tasks as needed



Requirements:

- Strong written English

- Hands-on Arduino experience (essential — you must have built projects with Arduino yourself)

- Highly organised and reliable

- Experience in customer service is a plus



This is a long-term role with room to grow as the company scales.

title: Video Editor / VA
description:
Video Editor – YouTube Channels (Full-Time)

We run YouTube channels in the educational/informational space and are looking for a skilled, reliable video editor to join us full-time. This is a long-term role with real growth potential as we scale.



What You'll Be Doing:

Editing videos in an educational/documentary style — stock footage, motion graphics, animated stats, graphs, and on-screen effects that bring information to life

Matching visuals to pre-recorded voiceover we provide

Maintaining consistency across 2-3 channels while bringing your own creative improvements to the editing



Reference videos to understand the style we're going for:







What We're Looking For:

Proven editing experience — previous work samples are required

Proficient in Premiere Pro, CapCut, or similar

Strong command of English — written and spoken, since we communicate daily

Reliable, organized, and self-directed — you follow the style guide but can also spot ways to make it better

Comfortable with full-time work Monday–Saturday

Stable internet connection



Compensation:

Month 1 (trial): $350/month

Month 2+: Around $500/month or higher based on performance and workload

Long-term role with team lead opportunity as we grow



How to Apply:

Send your resume

Include previous editing work (required)



Answer these questions:

What editing software do you use and how long have you been using it?

Describe a video you've edited that involved motion graphics or on-screen data/stats

How do you stay consistent and motivated doing repetitive work long-term?

Put "EDITOR READY" in your subject line. Hiring within the next week.

title: AMAZING FUNNEL BUILDER WANTED FOR 7-FIGURE ECOMMERCE BRAND
description:
Hey there,



My team and I are looking for a talented Funnel Builder to join our amazing 7-figure eCommerce dropshipping business!



We’re searching for someone who is passionate about building high-converting sales funnels, optimizing customer journeys, and creating beautiful, functional landing pages that convert visitors into loyal customers.



You’ll be responsible for one of the most important aspects of our business — designing and improving sales funnels that directly impact revenue.



It’s essential that you already have experience with:



Funnel platforms like Funnelish, ClickFunnels, GoHighLevel, Webflow, Shopify



Integrations using Funnelish and Shopify



Basic understanding of conversion psychology and marketing principles



You’ll work closely with our CEO and Process Manager to create funnel concepts, optimize existing flows, and make sure everything runs smoothly — from landing page to checkout.



ROLE:



You’ll be responsible for designing, building, and optimizing conversion-focused funnels for our products and campaigns.



RESPONSIBILITIES:



Create sales funnels



Integrate automations, payment gateways, and
 sequences



Continuously optimize conversion rates using A/B testing



Ensure brand consistency across all funnel designs



Work closely with the Process Manager to maintain funnel benchmarks



Keep all funnels live, functional, and mobile-optimized



RESULTS:



Build or optimize 5-7 funnels per week



Achieve or improve conversion rate targets (20%+ increase where possible)



Deliver fully functional, automated funnels with no technical errors



Continuously improve your skills and speed week by week



REQUIREMENTS:



Fluent in English (spoken & written)



Experience with Funnelish, Shopify, or similar tools



Familiar with automation tools



Understanding of conversion optimization and user experience



Able to use Canva, Photoshop, or similar tools for light graphic editing



Fast and stable internet connection



Detail-oriented, proactive, and reliable



WHAT WE OFFER:



A long-term position in a growing 7-figure brand



A collaborative and respectful remote team



Training opportunities to help you grow with the company



Performance-based bonuses and raises



A company culture focused on personal growth, communication, and freedom



HOW TO APPLY:



If this sounds like you, please complete the following steps carefully (only complete applications will be reviewed):



Take the free DISC Personality Test:

title: TikTok Outreach Representative (Remote) – Clipster
description:
JOB OVERVIEW



Join the team behind Clipster.gg.



We help social media creators worldwide earn money by connecting them with top brands in music, gaming, and entertainment.



To scale our platform, we are looking for a TikTok Outreach Representative who actively reaches out to creators and brings them onto Clipster.



Your goal is simple: find creators, message them, and get them to join.



This is a high-volume execution role. Consistency and output matter most.



---



What You’ll Be Doing



You will be responsible for identifying and messaging creators on TikTok to introduce them to Clipster.



* Find relevant creators on TikTok

* Send direct messages at scale

* Start conversations and generate interest

* Guide creators toward joining Clipster

* Keep outreach consistent and results-driven



---



Daily Responsibilities



* Send a high volume of TikTok DMs daily

* Identify creators that fit Clipster campaigns

* Use provided scripts and improve them over time

* Respond to interested creators and answer basic questions

* Track your outreach activity and performance



---



Job Details



* Type: Hourly contract

* Salary: $3/hour (paid monthly)

* Hours: Flexible (output-focused)

* Start: Short test task ? paid trial ? long-term if successful



---



What We’re Looking For



* Strong written English communication

* High reliability and consistency

* Comfortable with repetitive, volume-based work

* Self-driven and able to work independently

* Fast execution and attention to detail



---



Requirements



* Experience using TikTok

* Some Outreach experience

* Ability to work with proxies (we provide access)



---



Bonus Points If



* Familiar with the creator economy or TikTok growth

* You understand what makes creators respond



---



Why Clipster



Clipster is used by thousands of creators to turn short-form content into real earnings.



You will directly impact platform growth by bringing in new creators and scaling outreach.



We are a fast-moving, remote team focused on execution, ownership, and results.



---



How to Apply



Send us a short message including:



* Your experience with TikTok

* Why you are a good fit for this role

* Any experience with outreach, messaging, or similar work

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview:



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office.





Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents.





About Power Plus Systems:



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission.





Objectives:

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.





Competencies:

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.





Equipment Requirements:

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.





Physical Requirements:

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.



Benefits:

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply:



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below.




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply.



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Creative Strategist (Short-form video + Personal Brand)
description:
Looking for a part-time Creative Strategist for short-form video content.



Main goal: create engaging video ideas that attract attention and bring in clients.



This includes:

1. Real estate content (for agents)

2. Personal brand content (for a videographer)



Responsibilities:

- Create viral-style video ideas (Reels / TikTok)

- Write hooks and short scripts

- Suggest content formats that perform well

- Help build a content direction (not just random posts)



You are NOT required to edit or post.



Requirements:

- Strong understanding of short-form content (Instagram / TikTok)

- Ability to create attention-grabbing hooks

- Understanding of content that converts, not just looks good



To apply:

Send:

1. 5 ideas for real estate content

2. 5 ideas for a videographer personal brand

title: CSR: International Logistics & Order Fulfillment
description:
About the Role:



We are looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Logistics CSR to handle our day-to-day order fulfillment and international shipping. You’ll be the bridge between our Sales team and the Warehouse, making sure orders move out quickly and correctly.



This is a full-time, long-term position for someone who can work US Business Hours and is ready to start immediately.



What you’ll be doing:



Priority Fulfillment: Handling daily order batches

Shipping & Booking: Setting up international shipments via FedEx and UPS.

Paperwork: Managing all shipping documents

Compliance: Checking for Goods and knowing which countries have restrictions before things ship.

Problem Solving: Fixing address errors, ZIP code issues, and coordinating with IT or the Warehouse,

Communication: Handling logistics-related
s and taking incoming calls to update customers or Sales on their shipments.



What we’re looking for:



ERP Experience: You must be comfortable working in NetSuite or a similar system.

Logistics Knowledge: You actually know how to book shipments and prepare customs paperwork for international orders.

Communication: Clear, simple, and direct English (both written and over the phone).

Reliability: You have a stable internet connection and a quiet place to take calls.

Availability: Ready to work the US Night Shift and start as soon as possible.



Note: The rate for this position is based on your specific experience with international logistics and ERP systems.

title: Automation Engineer – Internal Systems
description:
We’re a Singapore-based digital marketing agency looking for an Automation Specialist to own and maintain our internal automation systems. You’ll be building the “connective tissue” that connects tools, automates workflows, and keeps our internal operations running smoothly.



Your work will directly support our SEO, marketing, and operations teams, helping them reduce repetitive tasks, improve efficiency, and focus on high-impact work.



Key Responsibilities:



- Design, build, and maintain internal automation workflows to support SEO, content, reporting, and operational systems.

- Integrate multiple tools and platforms using APIs, webhooks, and automation engines such as n8n, Make, or Zapier.

- Develop reliable systems with error handling, logging, retries, and fallback mechanisms.

- Structure and maintain databases (Airtable, Supabase, or relational databases) to support automation workflows.

- Extend automation capabilities with custom scripting (Python, JavaScript, or PHP) when low-code tools are insufficient.

- Collaborate with internal teams to understand requirements and design practical, scalable automation solutions.

- Work with AI/LLM tools (e.g., GPT, Claude, or similar) to enhance internal workflows.

- Apply SEO awareness to automation solutions, ensuring workflows support tasks like reporting, site audits, content pipelines, and keyword tracking.



Qualifications:



- 2+ years experience building automation workflows.

- Strong hands-on experience with n8n or similar platforms.

- Coding background required: HTML/CSS fundamentals, JavaScript familiarity; Python, PHP, or similar for scripting is a bonus.

- Comfortable working with REST APIs, webhooks, and authentication methods.

- Experience with databases (Airtable, Supabase, or relational DBs) including structuring data and preventing duplicates.

- Experience with AI/LLM integration in workflows is a plus.

- Understanding of SEO workflows and ability to design automations that support SEO reporting and content operations.

- Strong problem-solving, systems thinking, and ownership of end-to-end workflow development.

- Strong problem-solving skills and ownership of end-to-end workflow development.

- Understanding of AI/LLM integration in automation workflows is a plus.

- Experience working with SEO-related workflows or digital marketing operations is highly desirable.



Role Details:

- Part-time, on-demand (max 20 hours/week)

- Business hours: 9AM–6:30PM



How to Apply:



 
 with:



- Updated CV/resume

- Portfolio of automation workflows (n8n, Make, Zapier, AI workflows)

- Subject line: “Systems in Motion”

title: Chinese Translator
description:
We are a Singapore-based digital marketing agency looking for a Mandarin-speaking content creator to produce and localize digital marketing content.



If you understand SEO, blogs, and online marketing, and can write naturally in Chinese Mandarin, we'd love to hear from you.



What You'll Do



• Write original Chinese Mandarin content for blogs, landing pages, and social media

• Translate English marketing materials into localized Mandarin content

• Optimize content for SEO and search visibility

• Publish and manage content on WordPress

• Work with our marketing team to maintain consistent brand voice



Requirements



• Native or fluent Chinese Mandarin (written)

• Experience writing marketing or SEO content

• Familiar with WordPress or CMS platforms

• Basic understanding of digital marketing and SEO



Ideal Candidate



You are someone who:



• Understands Chinese audience behavior online

• Can turn English ideas into engaging Mandarin content

• Has experience with blogs, marketing copy, or SEO articles



Work Setup



• Part-time / on-demand

• PH hours



How to Apply



 
 with:



• Resume / CV

• Links or samples of Mandarin content you’ve written

• Short intro about your digital marketing experience



Subject: Mandarin Content Creator Application

title: Global Trade Operations & Documentation Specialist (Fuel Trading)
description:
Reports To: CEO (Australia &UAE)

Location: Remote (Global)

Role Overview

We are a new Oil and Gas trading startup headquartered in Australia & UAE, sourcing fuel products primarily from the Middle East and supplying to African markets.

This role is responsible for managing the execution and documentation of fuel trading deals from start to finish, ensuring all transactions are accurate, compliant, and completed without delays.

This is a high-accountability role focused on execution, not administration.

Key Responsibilities

1. Deal Execution Management

• Manage deals across all stages:

Lead ? ICPO ? POP ? SPA ? LC ? Shipment ? Completion 

• Track progress and ensure no delays in deal flow 

• Monitor deadlines, dependencies, and required actions 

• Escalate issues or bottlenecks immediately 

2. Trade Documentation

• Prepare, review, and verify: 

o ICPO 

o SPA 

o POP 

o TSR 

o Bill of Lading (BL) 

o Certificate of Origin (COO) 

o SGS reports 

• Ensure: 

o Accuracy and consistency across all documents 

o Alignment between supplier and buyer documentation 

o Compliance with international trade standards 

3. Supplier & Buyer Coordination

• Communicate with suppliers (Middle East) and global buyers 

• Follow up on: 

o Documentation 

o Agreements 

o Shipment readiness 

• Ensure timely responses and alignment between all parties 

4. Logistics & Shipment Tracking

• Track: 

o Vessel loading 

o Shipping schedules 

o Transit timelines 

o Port discharge 

• Coordinate inspections (SGS or equivalent) 

• Ensure documentation aligns with shipment progress 

5. System & CRM Updates

• Maintain accurate updates in CRM or deal tracker: 

o Deal status 

o Document progress 

o Next steps 

• Ensure all data is current and complete 

6. Reporting

• Provide daily updates on: 

o Active deals 

o Documentation status 

o Shipment progress 

o Risks and delays 

o Required actions 

Requirements

• Experience in one or more of the following: 

o Oil & Gas 

o Shipping / Logistics 

o Import / Export 

o Commodity Trading 

• Strong understanding of: 

o Trade documentation 

o Shipment coordination 

o Deal execution processes 

• Strong attention to detail 

• Good communication skills 

• Ability to manage multiple deals simultaneously 

• Experience with Excel / Google Sheets / CRM systems 

Performance Expectations (KPIs)

• Zero documentation errors 

• 100?curate and up-to-date deal tracking 

• No missed deadlines or follow-ups 

• Smooth execution across all deal stages

title: SEO Expert - Senior Position
description:
We’re looking for a Senior SEO Expert to join our core team. This isn’t just another SEO role… you will help shape how the agency runs, build workflows and SOPs, and eventually lead a team of SEO specialists while still staying hands on with strategy, implementation, and reporting each day. The role will require 40 hours work per week. 



What You’ll Do



• Develop and implement SEO strategies for client websites and internal projects.

• Perform on-page, off-page, and technical SEO optimisations.

• Conduct keyword research, competitor analysis, and backlink strategy.

• Use SEO tools (SEMrush, Screaming Frog, Google Analytics/Search Console, etc.).

• Stay updated on search engine algorithms and industry trends.

• Create SOPs and systems to scale SEO operations.

• Prepare to lead and mentor an SEO team as we grow.





What We’re Looking For



• 5+ years of SEO experience with proven results.

• Strong knowledge of on-page, off-page, and technical SEO.

• Experience with keyword research, link building, and content optimisation.

• Familiarity with Google Analytics, Search Console, and leading SEO tools.

• Ability to create and execute SEO campaigns end-to-end.

• Strong communicator, self-motivated, and comfortable taking initiative.

• Someone excited about stepping into a management role while staying hands-on.



Great to Have (but not essential)

• Background in digital marketing strategy.

• Experience collaborating closely with web developers and content teams.

• Familiarity with AI-driven SEO tools and automation.





Benefits



• Competitive salary paid fortnightly.

• 2 weeks paid annual leave (calculated pro-rata).

• Some Paid public holidays (can supply a list of holidays covered).

• Flexible roster.

• Long term stability and growth opportunities.



?? Important Note:

We use Hubstaff time-tracking and monitoring software for accountability and transparency.

If you are currently working multiple jobs or plan to juggle this position alongside another full time or demanding role, please do not apply. We are looking for someone who can fully commit their focus and time during agreed working hours.





How to Apply



Ensure that you meet the above criteria and have enough experience to be considered for the role.



Send us:

1. A short intro about yourself.

2. Your CV/resume.

3. Examples of successful SEO campaigns or results you’ve achieved (case studies, reports, rankings, etc.).



Be part of our core startup team and help shape the future of our agency!

title: Amazon PPC & Performance Manager (Senior)
description:
We are looking for a senior Amazon PPC & Performance Manager who can take full ownership of our advertising and help scale our business toward €20M+ revenue this year. 



This is not a basic campaign management role. You will be responsible for performance, profitability, and scaling across multiple Amazon marketplaces.



You think in systems, not tasks. You use data to make decisions and act fast.



What you will own:



– Full Amazon PPC management (Sponsored Products, Brands, Display)

– Budget allocation and scaling across ASINs and countries

– Improving TACOS, ACOS and overall profitability

– Launching and scaling new products

– Identifying inefficiencies and eliminating wasted spend

– Driving performance based on data, not assumptions



Data & performance mindset:



– Analyze performance per SKU (revenue, margin, TACOS, CVR)

– Translate data into clear actions

– Work with structured systems (not chaos)

– Continuously improve how performance is tracked and managed



What we expect from you:



– 3–5+ years hands-on Amazon PPC experience

– Proven results scaling Amazon accounts

– Strong analytical mindset (you understand the numbers behind decisions)

– High ownership: you don’t wait, you act

– Ability to think commercially, not just technically



Important:



We are not looking for:

– junior campaign managers

– people who only follow instructions

– basic data analysts



We are looking for someone who can own performance and drive growth.

title: Social Media Marketing VA
description:

Platforms: Instagram, X 
), TikTok, Pinterest, LinkedIn

About the Role



We are hiring full-time Social Media Marketing VA to manage and grow client social media accounts across Instagram, X 
), TikTok, Pinterest, and LinkedIn.

No bots. No automation tools. No shortcuts.



Each analyst manages approximately 10 client accounts and is responsible for executing daily growth activities, tracking performance, and maintaining full visibility through documentation and reporting.

Important Notes (Please Read Carefully)



No bots, automation tools, or third-party growth apps

All actions are manual and follow strict internal SOPs

Daily documentation, screenshots, and reporting are mandatory

This is a full-time role only (not freelance or part-time)



What You’ll Do

Follows / unfollows

Likes and comments

Story interactions, profile visits, community engagement

etings

About the Team



We are a fully remote team with members across different countries, including the Philippines.

Some tea
mbers have been with us for 6+ years, and we value long-term collaboration, consistency, and accountability.



How to Apply



If you are interested in this position and meet all the requirements above, please complete the application form below:






Qualified candidates will be invited to a Zoom video interview.



We are actively hiring and plan to onboard at least 3 analysts as soon as possible.



Apply only if you are serious about becoming a long-term, high-performing member of our team.

title: Senior TypeScript Developer (AI & Cloud Infrastructure)
description:
We are seeking an experienced Senior TypeScript Developer in the Philippines with strong AI development experience who understands that great software starts with architecture and systems thinking, not just code.



This role is for a developer who can:

* Architect scalable, production-grade TypeScript systems

* Design AI-powered workflows using modern LLM tools

* Translate business requirements into cloud-native technical solutions

* Deploy and manage infrastructure using AWS and Cloudflare

* Integrate AI coding tools such as Claude Code into real development workflows

You will be responsible for designing, building, and optimizing AI-enabled applications across backend systems, APIs, and cloud environments.



Key Responsibilities

* Design and implement scalable backend systems using TypeScript (Node.js preferred)

* Architect AI-integrated applications using LLM APIs and structured workflows

* Build and maintain cloud infrastructure on AWS (Lambda, EC2, S3, RDS, IAM, etc.)

* Configure and manage Cloudflare services (Workers, DNS, edge deployments, caching)

* Integrate and optimize AI development workflows using Claude Code and similar tools

* Design secure REST APIs and microservices architecture

* Implement CI/CD pipelines and DevOps best practices

* Optimize performance, reliability, and cost efficiency of AI workloads

* Collaborate cross-functionally to align technical solutions with business objectives



Required Skills & Experience

* 10+ years experience in software development

* Strong expertise in TypeScript (backend-heavy experience required)

* Proven experience building AI-driven systems or LLM integrations

* Experience working with AI APIs, prompt engineering, and automation pipelines

* Hands-on AWS experience (serverless, compute, storage, networking)

* Experience with Cloudflare infrastructure and edge computing

* Familiarity with Cursor, Antigravity, Claude Code or equivalent AI-assisted coding platforms

* Strong understanding of scalable architecture and clean code principles

* Experience with Git, version control workflows, and CI/CD pipelines

* Ability to work independently and take ownership of technical decisions



What We’re Looking For

* A systems thinker who designs architecture before writing code

* A senior engineer who proposes solutions, not just executes tasks

* Someone comfortable working in AI-first environments

* A developer who values performance, security, and long-term maintainability

* Strong communicator with clear technical documentation skills



Benefits

* Work in an AI-native environment building real production systems

* Opportunity to architect and influence core technical infrastructure

* Exposure to advanced AI tooling and cloud technologies

* Long-term collaboration with growth potential

* Competitive compensation based on experience



How to Apply

Please send us the following:

* Your updated CV / Resume

* A cover letter outlining an AI-powered system you designed (architecture, challenges, and outcomes) and what AI-assisted coding platform you used and for who and how long

* Links to GitHub or relevant production projects

* A short explanation of how you’ve used AWS and Cloudflare in real deployments

* A list of AI tools you’ve worked with and how they improved your development workflow

* Your expected monthly salary (in PHP)

* Your availability (hours per week). Ability to do Part time or Fulltime



And include the word code “AG9978” in your application to confirm you read the entire post.



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Market Research & Intelligence Specialist (Global Fuel Trading)
description:
Market Research & Intelligence Specialist (Global Fuel Trading)

Supplier & Buyer Sourcing | Deal Origination Focus

Reports To: CEO (Australia)

Location: Remote (Global)

Role Overview

We are a fuel trading startup headquartered in Australia, sourcing supply primarily from the Middle East and connecting with buyers across Africa, Asia, and global markets.

We are seeking a Market Research & Intelligence Specialist to build and drive our global trading pipeline.

This role is responsible for:

• Identifying real suppliers and real buyers 

• Initiating direct engagement with decision-makers 

• Generating qualified, actionable trading opportunities 

This is not a basic research role.

It is a sourcing and deal origination role with direct impact on revenue.

Role Purpose

You will act as the front end of the trading pipeline, responsible for connecting:

 Verified supply with real market demand

Your work directly feeds:

• Deal creation 

• Revenue generation 

• Market expansion 

Key Responsibilities

1. Supplier Sourcing (Advanced Level)

Identify and engage credible supply sources, including:

• Refineries 

• Allocation holders 

• Large trading companies 

• Direct mandate suppliers 

Responsibilities:

• Research and identify qualified suppliers 

• Gather: 

o Verified contact details (decision-makers only) 

o Product availability 

o Supply capacity and terms 

• Validate supplier credibility and legitimacy 

• Build a structured supplier database 

 Focus on real, active suppliers — not brokers or recycled contacts

2. Buyer Sourcing

Identify and validate real demand in target markets.

Target Buyers:

• Licensed fuel importers 

• Bulk fuel buyers 

• Oil marketing companies 

• Government or large-scale buyers 

Responsibilities:

• Research and identify qualified buyers 

• Validate: 

o Import capacity 

o Demand volume 

o Buying authority 

• Maintain accurate buyer database 

Focus on buyers with actual purchasing power

3. Outreach & Engagement (Critical Function)

Initiate and manage direct outreach to decision-makers.

Channels:

•
 

• LinkedIn 

• Direct business contact methods 

Responsibilities:

• Identify and approach senior contacts 

• Start professional conversations 

• Present the business clearly and confidently 

• Generate responses and engagement 

    You must be comfortable:

• Reaching out cold 

• Speaking with senior stakeholders 

• Positioning opportunities 

4. Market Intelligence & Analysis

Track and analyze key market data to support trading decisions.

Responsibilities:

• Monitor: 

o Fuel pricing trends (Platts-based markets) 

o Regional supply shortages 

o Demand fluctuations 

o Logistics and shipping disruptions 

• Provide insights that influence: 

o Sourcing strategy 

o Deal prioritization 

5. Opportunity Development

Convert research into actionable trading opportunities.

Responsibilities:

• Match: 

o Supply availability 

o Buyer demand 

• Prepare: 

o Opportunity summaries 

o Estimated pricing and margins 

o Priority ranking of deals 

• Present opportunities for review and execution 

Focus on quality opportunities, not volume

6. Reporting

Provide structured weekly reporting.



Reports Must Include:

• New verified suppliers 

• New verified buyers 

• Market insights and trends 

• High-value opportunities identified 

• Pipeline progress 

Required Experience

You must have experience in at least one of the following:

• Oil & Gas industry 

• Commodities trading 

• B2B sourcing or business development 

Must Demonstrate:

• Ability to find and verify suppliers and buyers 

• Experience initiating professional outreach 

• Exposure to international markets 

Required Skills

• Strong research and analytical ability 

• Confident and professional communication 

• Ability to identify decision-makers 

• Strong Excel / Google Sheets / CRM skills 

• Structured and disciplined working style 

Performance Expectations (KPIs)

• 5–10 verified suppliers per week 

• 5–10 verified buyers per week 

• 2–3 high-quality opportunities per week 

• Consistent engagement with decision-makers 

• Accurate and structured reporting 

Positioning

This role is:

• Commercially focused (not admin) 

• Pipeline-building and revenue-driven 

• Critical to business growth 

Growth Opportunity

This role can develop into:

Head of Sourcing / Business Development

With responsibility for:

• Managing sourcing teams 

• Driving global deal flow 

• Leading market expansion 

Why Join

• Direct impact on deal flow and revenue 

• Build a global supplier and buyer network 

• Work in a fast-growing international trading startup 

• High ownership and visibility

title: Cutter / Video Editor for Ecommerce Brand
description:
Summary

You’re not here to “just make something creative” – you want to create videos that perform.



You think analytically, work with focus, and have an eye for what really matters?



Then you’re exactly who we’re looking for.



In short:



We’re building a lean, performance-driven e-commerce brand – and we’re looking for someone who wants to learn how to turn videos into real revenue drivers.



Experience is a plus, but not a must – what matters is your drive.



Your role:



- You’ll produce short-form video ads for
 & Instagram with one clear goal: sales

- You’ll learn how to use hooks, cuts, text overlays & music to stop the scroll and trigger the click

- You’ll work closely with our performance team – no fluff, no games

- You’ll get direct feedback based on actual data – what works gets scaled

- You’ll bring in your own ideas, test, improve, and grow



What we’re looking for:



- You think in structure, not in chaos

- You want to master your craft – not just “try things out”

- You’re self-organized, don’t make excuses, and look for solutions

- You’ve got a visual eye and a sharp interest in marketing strategy

- You’ve worked with tools like Adobe Premiere, After Effects or CapCut – or you’ll learn them fast



Bonus: You’re interested in Direct Response, e-commerce, and online sales



What you can expect:



- A clear framework with lots of room for growth

- Efficient processes – no overhead, no unnecessary meetings

- Remote work, full responsibility, and a results-first culture

- Fair pay that grows with your output

- Direct collaboration with experienced marketers



Sounds like you?



Then reach out and apply – with a short intro and work samples if you have any.

Scriptwriter for Travel Documentaries on YouTube
Meta Ad Lister
description:
We are looking for a Meta Ads Lister to help us publish advertising campaigns for our growing e-commerce fashion brand.



Our store focuses on women’s fashion (40+), and we advertise primarily on
 and Instagram (Meta).



Your role will be to upload and organize advertising campaigns inside Meta Ads Manager based on clear instructions.



We work with structured workflows, SOP documentation, and tutorial videos, so the tasks are straightforward and easy to follow.



You will receive a Google Sheet that clearly shows:



Which products need ads created

Which products are already launched

When campaigns should go live



Your main responsibility is to follow the sheet, upload the ads correctly, and make sure campaigns are launched on the correct dates.



You will work closely with a Product Lister, who prepares the product pages and provides the necessary product links and details. Communication between roles will take place through our CRM system to ensure a smooth and structured workflow.



Responsibilities



Your main tasks will include:



Uploading advertising campaigns in Meta Ads Manager

Following our SOP and tutorial videos

Using our Google Sheet to track products that need to be launched

Scheduling campaigns for the correct launch date

Uploading creatives that are provided

Coordinating with the Product Lister via the CRM system



At the start, all creatives will be provided. After a working period, there may be opportunities to also create or edit creatives yourself.



This is a structured role, and everything is explained step-by-step.



Tools We Use



You will work with:



Meta Ads Manager

CRM System

Google Sheets

Canva

CapCut (basic video edits)

SOP tutorial videos



Everything is structured and clearly explained.



Requirements



We are looking for someone who:



Has some experience with Meta Ads Manager (especially ad listing/uploading)

Is comfortable using Google Sheets

Is organized and detail-oriented

Can follow structured workflows

Communicates clearly in English



Working Hours



We will start with approximately 2 hours per day.



As the store grows, this can increase to 3–4 hours per day.



During the first phase, expect around 2–3 hours per day of work.



I will personally provide support during the onboarding phase.



We will communicate mainly via WhatsApp and schedule weekly calls to review progress and answer questions.



What We Provide



Clear SOP documentation

Step-by-step tutorial videos

Structured campaign sheets

Direct support during onboarding

Opportunity for long-term collaboration



How to Apply



Please answer the following questions when applying:



Do you have experience with Meta Ads Manager?

We’re looking for a talented AI Video Creator to produce high-converting short-form ads for a telehealth brand. This role focuses on creating realistic, AI-generated UGC-style videos (8–30 seconds) designed for platforms like Meta Reels and Snapchat.

Develop lifelike, UGC-style avatars (e.g. relatable adults 30+) with accurate lip-syncing, paired with natural, trustworthy AI-generated voiceovers.



B-Roll Content Generation:

Ad Platform Compliance:

Requirements

1. Demonstrated experience creating AI-generated UGC ads (portfolio required)

3. Solid video editing skills using CapCut, Premiere Pro, or equivalent

title: Regional Sales Lead – Southeast Asia
description:
Regional Sales Lead – Southeast Asia



Retail & Licensed Consumer Products (D2C Brand Expansion)

Remote | $2,000 USD + Commission





About the Company



We are an 8-figure direct-to-consumer brand operating under a Singapore-based holding company. Our flagship brand generated ~$25M last year and is expanding aggressively into retail channels.



We hold global licenses with major entertainment brands (Disney, Warner, Universal) and are scaling our retail footprint across Southeast Asia.



We are now looking for a commercially sharp sales leader to take ownership of Southeast Asia retail expansion.





The Role



This is not an account servicing role.



You will own retail sales development across Southeast Asia (Philippines, Indonesia, Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam, Singapore), driving licensed product distribution into retail chains and key distributors.



You will build pipeline, structure outreach, close deals, and drive repeat orders.



This role is for someone who thinks in volume, margins, and retail mechanics.





Key Responsibilities



Own retail expansion across Southeast Asia

Build and manage a structured sales pipeline (CRM-driven)

Identify, approach, and close retail chains and key distributors

Follow up on license-driven introductions (Disney, Warner, Universal)

Prioritize direct-to-retail relationships where viable

Develop pricing and volume proposals aligned with margin targets

Conduct presentations and commercial pitches to buying teams

Manage repeat orders and long-term retail partnerships

Coordinate with HQ on product launches and licensing requirements





Product Category



Licensed consumer products including:

Wooden puzzles

Diamond painting kits

3D model kits

Licensed fando
rchandise

Impulse retail items ($2–$5 SKU strategy)



This is a high-volume, price-sensitive retail environment.







What We’re Looking For



Required:



5+ years in B2B sales (retail, FMCG, consumer products, or distribution)

Experience selling into retailers or working with distributors

Proven ability to build pipeline from scratch

Experience handling multi-SKU product catalogs

Strong negotiation and pricing strategy understanding

Comfortable operating without heavy internal systems (startup mindset)

Experience working in Southeast Asia markets





Strong Advantage:



Licensed product experience

Experience with price-sensitive markets

Exposure to major retail chains

CRM implementation experience







Success Metrics (First 6 Months)



Active retail pipeline across 3–5 SEA markets

Distributor engagement strategy defined

Minimum X new retail accounts opened

Repeat orders secured from initial placements





Compensation



$2,000 USD monthly base

Commission on closed deals

High upside based on regional performance

Long-term growth opportunity as SEA division scales







Who Will Thrive Here



Builders, not maintainers

Commercial thinkers

Hunters who can close

Operators comfortable in ambiguity

Sales professionals who understand margin, volume, and positioning







How to Apply

To be considered for the  role:



Complete our application form here:


tion.so/Regional-Sales-Lead-Southeast-Asia-31246cff294880f6b377eb6b89c33bf4?source=copy_link



Submit your updated CV (PDF format preferred).



Answer the 5 screening questions below in your application.



Screening Questions

Have you sold physical consumer products to retailers or distributors? Briefly describe the category and your role.

Describe one B2B deal you personally closed (deal size, sales cycle, and whether you sourced the lead).

Have you opened a new market or territory from scratch? What were your first steps?

Have you negotiated bulk or volume-based pricing? How did you protect margins?

Which Southeast Asia markets have you worked in, and what type of clients did you sell to there?

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 350 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.

title: Youtube Video Editor
description:
About the Role:

Looking for a talented and creative Video Editor to help grow a YouTube channel. I provide the raw, "talking-head" style footage, and your job is to transform it into highly engaging, polished content that keeps viewers watching. You will be responsible for editing both full-length YouTube videos and repurposing the best moments into dynamic Shorts and Reels.



Responsibilities:

- Edit raw talking-head footage into engaging long-form YouTube videos (approx. 10 minutes).

- Extract and edit compelling clips from the main videos to create high-performing short-form content.

- Enhance videos with dynamic pacing, B-roll, text animations, visual hooks.

- Clean up audio and ensure good sound quality throughout.



Requirements

- Good conversational English. You must be able to understand the flow, humor, and context of spoken English to edit the footage effectively.

- Proven experience editing for YouTube with a strong understanding of retention tactics.

- Proficiency in professional editing software (e.g., Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve).

- A good portfolio demonstrating your ability to make talking-head content visually stimulating.



How to Apply

Please send a brief introduction along with:

A 1-2 minute video of yourself introducing who you are.

Links to 2-3 examples of long-form YouTube videos you have edited.

Links to 2-3 examples of short-form content you have edited.

Your typical turnaround time.

title: Video Editor – Hook Iterations (Fast-Turnaround, Performance Ads)
description:
Can you swap a hook, nail the pacing, and make it feel like a completely different ad — in minutes?

We're looking for a sharp video editor who specializes in hook iteration edits. This is a focused, high-volume role: you'll be taking existing winning ads and cutting in new hooks — different angles, different openers, different energy — to help us test our way to better performance.

This is not a full production role. It's a specialist role for someone who's fast, creatively intuitive, and understands what makes the first 3 seconds work.



???? What You'll Be Doing



Take existing video ads and swap in new hook footage, voiceovers, or text overlays

Match pacing, tone, and visual style of the original ad seamlessly

Cut hook variants that feel native — not stitched together

Handle rapid iteration: multiple variants per asset, fast turnaround

Work from briefs that specify the new hook angle/script — you execute the edit





? Output Expectations

This is a high-volume role. You should be comfortable delivering:



10–20 hook swap edits per day

Clean, export-ready files — minimal back-and-forth



Speed and consistency are the job.



? Must-Have Skills



Fast, clean editing with seamless transitions between original content and new hooks

Strong instinct for pacing and attention — you know when a hook lands and when it doesn't

Comfortable matching existing visual style, font treatments, and energy

Confident in at least one of: Premiere Pro, Final Cut, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve

Good English comprehension (scripts and voiceovers are primarily in English)





???? Bonus (Nice to Have)



Experience editing Meta or TikTok performance ads

Familiarity with hook frameworks (pattern interrupt, bold claim, curiosity gap, etc.)

UGC editing background — you understand raw, native-feeling content





???? Who You Are



You think like a marketer — you know a hook isn't just an opener, it's a promise

You're fast and organized with a clean file workflow

You deliver ready-to-export edits without hand-holding

You're reliable and consistent — we're building a long-term working relationship





???? Job Details



Hours: 40 hrs/week 

Long-term position

Fully remote

Pay: per-edit rate or monthly retainer — based on speed and experience





???? How to Apply

Apply via OnlineJobs.ph only.

Your application must include:



Portfolio — ad edits or hook-style content (required)

Your rate — per edit or monthly

Availability — hours/week + timezone

title: Part-Time YouTube Channel Manager - Thumbnails, Titles & Publishing
description:
We run two YouTube channels in the crypto and geopolitics niches with a combined audience of 300,000+ subscribers. 



We're looking for a sharp, reliable person to manage the final stage of every video. That means creating the thumbnail, writing the title and description, and scheduling the upload.



You'll be publishing ~60 videos per month across both channels. You'll be given detailed style guides and SOPs for everything, so you won't be guessing. 



But you do need to be someone who gets YouTube. You understand why people click, what makes a good thumbnail, and how titles drive interest.



What You'll Be Doing



- Creating thumbnails for every video using Canva, Photoshop, or AI tools (Gemini, NanoBanna, etc.)

- Writing compelling YouTube titles that drive CTR

- Writing video descriptions following our style guide

- Scheduling and queuing videos for publish

- Making sure everything looks right before it goes live



What We're Looking For



- Experience with YouTube (either running your own channel or working on someone else's)

- Strong Canva and/or Photoshop skills

- Comfortable using AI tools like ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini as part of your workflow

- When you apply, start your message with the word "Raspberry" so we know you've read the full listing

- Good written English (you'll be writing titles and descriptions for an English-speaking audience)

- Reliable, consistent, and communicative. If something's off, you flag it, you don't just publish it

- Ability to follow SOPs closely while still applying judgment on what looks and reads well



Bonus (not required)



- Interest in or knowledge of crypto, finance, or geopolitics

- Experience with YouTube analytics / understanding CTR and AVD metrics

- Thumbnail portfolio you can show



Test Task (Required)



Before we move forward with any applicant, we need you to complete a short test. Go to this channel: 
 



Pick any one of our recent videos. Then send us:



- A new thumbnail you would use for that video (made in Canva, Photoshop, or any tool you prefer)

- An alternative title you'd give the video, plus a brief note on what the current title gets right and what it misses

- A short description (3-5 sentences) for the video



This should take no more than 10-30 minutes. Applications without a completed test task will not be reviewed.



To Apply



Send your test task, and a brief intro about your YouTube experience, If you have a portfolio of previous thumbnails, include that too.

title: Placement Coordinator
description:
We are seeking experienced candidates who are highly organized and capable of managing multiple tasks with precision and efficiency. The ideal candidate will be able to handle detailed documentation, coordinate between multiple parties, and ensure accuracy across all aspects of each placement. This role requires someone who can maintain a high level of attention to detail, follow structured processes, and communicate clearly and professionally. Candidates should be comfortable working in a fast-paced environment, handling feedback, and maintaining composure while resolving issues and moving tasks forward.



The Placement Coordinator will be responsible for managing move-ins from start to finish, ensuring all required documentation and communication are handled accurately and efficiently. This includes sending landlord onboarding packets (W9s, payment information, and contact details), collecting and verifying tenant information such as occupant names and pet details, and preparing and submitting lease agreements for approval. The role also involves tracking all placements, documentation, and approvals, maintaining organized records, and communicating consistently with landlords, tenants, and the internal team. Additionally, the Placement Coordinator will contribute to improving processes and developing systems to better track move-ins and move-outs.

Cloud & Hosting Management (Primary Focus)

Manage and maintain cloud servers, cPanel environments, and hosting platforms.

Oversee website hosting operations including optimization, performance monitoring, and uptime assurance.

Configure and manage DNS zones, domain records, SSL certificates, and name servers.

Administer cloud-based
 hosting solutions including Microsoft Office 365, Google Workspace, and third-party hosting such as InMotion Hosting.

Perform server updates, security patches, backup configuration, and resource monitoring.





Technical Support & Troubleshooting

Provide remote technical support via,
, phone, and remote access tools.

Troubleshoot issues related to hosting, DNS,
 deliverability, and connectivity.

Address hardware, software, and system-related problems as needed.

Take client calls for technical support, resolve tickets, and document resolutions.





Systems & User Administration

Manage user accounts, permissions, and security policies across systems (Active Directory, O365, Google Workspace, etc.).

Support virtual communications platforms and remote collaboration tools.

Perform routine system checks and implement IT security best practices.





Internal Coordination & Process Work

Maintain accurate ICT asset and system documentation.

Escalate complex issues to senior IT staff or external vendors.

Participate in ICT projects, system improvements, and operational optimizations.





Qualifications & Skills

Bachelor’s degree in information technology, Computer Science, or equivalent work experience.

Proven experience in ICT or IT support, with emphasis on cloud hosting/server management.

Strong knowledge of Windows, macOS, and Linux environments.

Understanding of networking fundamentals (TCP/IP, VPN, firewalls, Wi-Fi).

Experience using remote support tools such as TeamViewer, AnyDesk, or similar.

Familiarity with cloud platforms including Office 365, Google Workspace, and hosting dashboards like cPanel.

Solid troubleshooting, diagnostic, and problem-solving abilities.

Excellent communication skills, especially when assisting non-technical clients.

Certifications such as CompTIA A+, Network+, CCNA, Microsoft Certified, or ITIL are not required but are an advantage.





Key Attributes

Highly self-motivated and able to work independently.

Strong organizational and time-management skills.

Customer-focused with patience and empathy.

Reliable high-speed internet and suitable remote work setup.



Please include your resume and related work experience in your application.

title: Account Manager – Cleaning Services (Work From Home)
description:
Company: Clean Group (Australia-based Commercial Cleaning Company)

Location:** Work From Home (Philippines)

Employment Type: Full-Time

Working Hours: Monday to Friday, overlapping with Australian Eastern Standard Time (AEST)

Salary: 25,000 – 40,000/month (depending on experience)



About Clean Group



Clean Group is a leading commercial cleaning company based in Australia, providing professional cleaning services to offices, gyms, cafés, restaurants, and commercial facilities across the country. We pride ourselves on delivering high-quality cleaning services and exceptional customer care.



We are looking for a **detail-oriented and proactive Account Manager** to join our remote operations team and manage our Cleaning Case system — handling customer concerns, coordinating with cleaners, and ensuring every case is resolved efficiently.



### What You'll Be Doing



**Cleaning Case Management (Primary Responsibility)**



- Manage and resolve cleaning cases daily, including: Poor Cleaning complaints, No Show i
, Reschedule requests, Cancellation cases, Security/Access issues, Change Cleaner requests, Fix Cleaning coordination, and Temporary Cleaner assignments

- Create, update, and close cases in our Notion-based case management system

- Assign task lists per case and track completion

- Generate tasks and coordinate with internal departments (Cleaner Resource, Accounting, Scheduling)



**Customer Communication**



- Respond to client
s and messages regarding cleaning quality, scheduling, and service issues

- Draft and send professional acknowledgement
s, apology letters, and resolution updates

- Conduct courtesy calls and follow-up communications with clients

- Handle invoice disputes and coordinate credit adjustments with the Accounting team



**Cleaner Coordination**



- Communicate cleaning instructions to subcontract cleaners via WhatsApp

- Follow up on after-cleaning photo submissions

- Relay specific client instructions (CISI – Cleaning Instruction / Security Instruction) to assigned cleaners

- Coordinate with the Cleaner Resource team for cleaner changes, temporary replacements, and fix cleaning



**Reporting & Documentation**



- Document all actions, communications, and resolutions in each Cleaning Case

- Submit notifications via Slack upon case updates

- Maintain accurate records of completed dates, due dates, and case statuses

- Participate in fortnightly catch-up meetings and report on case progress



---



### Requirements



**Must-Have:**



- Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

- At least 1–2 years of experience in customer service, account management, or virtual assistant roles

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

- Ability to multitask and prioritize under pressure (you'll handle multiple cases simultaneously)

- Reliable internet connection and a quiet home office setup

- Willingness to work Australian business hours (AEST overlap)

- Comfortable using or learning: **Notion, Slack, Zoho Cliq, WhatsApp,
**



**Nice-to-Have:**



- Experience in the cleaning industry, property management, or facilities management

- Experience with Notion as a project/task management tool

- Experience handling customer complaints or dispute resolution

- Familiarity with Australian business culture and communication style



### Screening Process



1. **Application Review** — We review your resume and cover letter

2. **Skills Assessment** — A short practical test (case scenario +
 drafting)

3. **Video Interview** — 30–45 minute call to discuss your experience

4. **Paid Trial Week** — Handle real cases with supervision to see if it's a mutual fit

5. **Final Offer** — Full onboarding and training program begins



Please apply and fill out this form

Role Overview

s, ensuring timely and professional responses. You will help resolve issues, provide accurate information, and maintain high customer satisfaction while supporting our Amazon store operations.

s promptly and professionally

 support using FreshDesk, Zendesk, or similar platforms

title: AI Automation Builder (n8n + Telegram Agent) – URGENT
description:
I'm building a personal AI automation system where I send a voice note or text via
 and an 
 agent interprets it, executes tasks (booking, Slack messages, CRM updates, scheduling, etc.), and checks back with me for approval before firing. The foundation is partially built and accounts are already created.



I need someone to jump in immediately and help finish and expand it.



KEY REQUIREMENT: The
 agent must have persistent memory — it needs to remember past conversations, context, and ongoing tasks across sessions. This is non-negotiable.



You must know:

- n8n (workflows, webhooks, HTTP nodes)

-
 Bot API

- AI/LLM integration (OpenAI or similar)

- Persistent memory implementation (e.g. Supabase, Postgres, or similar)

- GoHighLevel API is a big plus — we also deal with Angi/Instagram AI

- MaidCentral or Twilio is a bonus



This is urgent. I need someone who can review what's already built, ask smart questions, and show me a working addition within 12 hours of us agreeing to move forward.



TO APPLY, tell me:

1. Have you built an n8n +
 workflow before and is a demo available?

2. Have you implemented persistent memory in an AI agent? How?

3. How quickly can you deliver a first working update after we align on scope?



Timeline on your first deliverable is how I will evaluate fit. Fast, clean, communicative wins.



Note: Anyone saying 2+ weeks will not be considered.

title: Espesyalista sa Pag-promote ng Turismo sa Pilipinas
description:
Bersyon sa Filipino

Posisyon

Espesyalista sa Pag-promote ng Turismo sa Pilipinas

Lokasyon ng Trabaho

Lokasyon ng Trabaho: Maynila, Pilipinas (Pwedeng magtrabaho mula sa bahay o opisina, napag-uusapan) — kinakailangang nasa Maynila ang empleyado.

Oras ng Trabaho

9:00 umaga - 6:00 hapon, 1 oras na pahinga sa tanghalian, 2 araw na pahinga bawat linggo

Mga Tungkulin sa Trabaho

1.Buong pananagutan sa pakikipag-ugnayan sa mga lokal na ahensya sa paglalakbay at institusyong panturismo sa Pilipinas, gumawa ng pang-araw-araw na komunikasyon sa negosyo at negosasyon, iparating nang mahusay ang mga bentahe ng mga produktong panturismo ng Tsina ng aming kumpanya at mga patakaran sa pakikipagtulungan, at itaguyod ang malalim na pakikipagtulungan sa pagitan ng dalawang panig.

2.Panatilihin ang mga umiiral na mapagkukunan ng ahensya sa paglalakbay na nakikipagtulungan, tumugon kaagad sa mga pangangailangan sa pakikipagtulungan at lutasin ang mga problema sa negosyo, sundan ang pagpapatupad ng pakikipagtulungan, tiyakin ang maayos na pagpapatuloy ng pakikipagtulungan, at palawakin ang mga matatag na pangmatagalang channel sa pakikipagtulungan sa lokal na turismo.

3.Tumulong sa pagkolekta ng impormasyon tungkol sa lokal na merkado ng turismo sa Pilipinas, mga pangangailangan ng mga turista at mga kilos ng mga katunggali, ayusin at ibalik ang impormasyon sa koponan sa loob ng bansa upang makatulong na mapabuti ang mga produktong panturismo at mga plano sa promosyon.

4.Tumulong sa cross-border na koordinasyon ng negosyo, pag-synchronize ng impormasyon at iba pang kaugnay na pantulong na gawain upang tiyakin ang walang hadlang na komunikasyon sa negosyo sa pagitan ng Tsina at Pilipinas, at tumugon kaagad at aktibo sa lahat ng komunikasyon sa trabaho.

Mga Kinakailangan sa Trabaho

1.Katutubong nagsasalita ng Filipino, bihasa sa Ingles (pakikinig, pagsasalita, pagbabasa at pagsusulat), kayang gumawa ng walang hadlang na komunikasyon sa trabaho, pagsusulat ng teksto at pasalitang negosasyon; Ingles ang pang-araw-araw na wika sa trabaho.

2.Pamilyar sa lokal na merkado ng turismo sa Pilipinas, sa paraan ng pagpapatakbo ng mga lokal na ahensya sa paglalakbay at mga kagustuhan sa paglalakbay ng mga turista; mas gusto ang mga aplikanteng may kaugnay na karanasan sa industriya ng turismo o koordinasyon ng negosyo.

3.May mahusay na kasanayan sa komunikasyon, negosasyon sa negosyo at pagpapanatili ng kostumer, proactive at responsable, may malakas na kakayahang magpatupad, kayang magsulong ng pagpapatupad ng negosyo nang mag-isa.

4.May pangunahing kakayahan sa pagsusulat ng teksto at pag-edit ng nilalaman, kayang mabilis na gumawa ng mga materyal sa promosyon ng turismo, at bihasa sa pangunahing operasyon ng software ng opisina.

5.Maingat at mahigpit sa trabaho, may malakas na kamalayan sa cross-cultural na komunikasyon, mataas na pakiramdam ng responsibilidad at mabuting espiritu ng koponan.

Suweldo at Mga Benepisyo

Batayang Suweldo: 30,000 Peso bawat buwan

Mga Patakaran sa Komisyon sa Pagbebenta

1.Gantimpala ng 200 Peso para sa bawat ahensya sa paglalakbay na matagumpay na nakontak at nairehistro sa sistema ng kumpanya.

2.Gantimpala ng 800 Peso para sa bawat wastong order ng grupo ng paglalakbay na ibinigay ng ahensya sa paglalakbay na nakikipagtulungan, kinakalkula batay sa huling bilang ng grupo na kinumpirma ng kumpanya.

Walang komisyon sa pagbebenta sa kasalukuyang buwan kung ang kabuuang bilang ng nairehistrong ahensya sa paglalakbay ay mas mababa sa 10 sa isang buwan.

title: Graphic Designer (AU)
description:
Graphic Designer – Exhibitions, Events and Brand Activations



About the Role

We are looking for a talented and highly detail-oriented Graphic Designer to support the creative development and

delivery of exhibitions, events and brand activation projects.



This role is ideal for someone who can take a concept or creative direction and turn it into polished, on-brand design

outcomes, while also preparing accurate production-ready artwork based on dimensions, technical drawings, mark-ups

and artwork schedules.



The role requires a strong eye for design, excellent technical artwork skills, and a practical understanding of how

graphics are applied across physical environments and live experiences.

Experience in exhibitions, events, signage, environmental graphics or brand activations is highly preferred.



Key Responsibilities

• Create graphic design concepts and visual layouts based on client briefs, references and creative direction

• Roll out approved concepts across multipole assets and formats including graphics, signage, counters, walls,

plinths, digital screens, print collateral and branded materials

• Prepare accurate production-ready artwork files for print, signage and digital outputs

• Put together artwork schedules including dimensions, mark-ups working from technical details and production

specifications

• Apply brand guidelines consistency across a wide range of touchpoints

• Adapt master creative across multiple sizes and formats while maintaining design quality and consistency

• Ensure all files are accurate and ready for issue, including checking spelling, alignment, image quality, scale,

bleed, colour settings and layout consistency

• Maintain organised file structures, version control and clear naming conventions

• Communicate clearly and professionally with internal tea
mbers via Outlook, Teams and project updates

• Work collaborative with creative and production teams to meet deadlines and project needs

• Respond to feedback and revisions efficiently and accurately

title: Brand & Creative Lead
description:
Brand & Creative Lead

(Wellness, Aesthetics & Premium Health)





We’re not looking for a social media manager.



We’re building a premium healthcare and aesthetics brand that sits at the intersection of wellness, cosmetics, and preventative medicine, and we’re looking for someone who can bring that to life visually, emotionally, and commercially.



This is about how the brand feels, not just how it performs. If you think in campaigns, visuals, and storytelling — not just posts, this will feel like home.



About the Role:



You will lead how Dripclub shows up across:

-Social media

-Website

-Campaigns



Brand touchpoints:

Including contributing to our premium brand magazine, where storytelling, education, and visual identity come together in a more elevated, editorial format.



You will take what we do — IV therapy, aesthetics, cosmetics, and precision health — and turn it into something people:

-aspire to

-trust

-talk about



What You’ll Own:



1. Visual Direction

-Define and maintain a premium visual identity

-Use our real imagery (not stock) to create a consistent, elevated look

- Ensure every touchpoint feels considered, cohesive, and on-brand



2. Content Creation

-Social content (Instagram / LinkedIn)

-Campaign visuals and launches

-Website imagery and layout direction

-Editorial-style content for our premium magazine

-Brand storytelling across all channels



3. Brand Elevation:

You’ll help transform how the category is perceived



From:

-clinical

-transactional



To:

-aspirational

-lifestyle-led

-trusted

-authoritative



4. Creative Strategy:



-Develop campaign concepts (not just execution)

-Create hooks, angles, and narratives

-Bring ideas that make people stop, feel, and engage



You’ll Work Alongside:

-A strong marketing & automation lead (funnels, GHL, systems)

-Founder-led vision and direction

-A business scaling nationally



What We’re Looking For:

-Strong portfolio (this is everything)



Experience in:

-wellness

-aesthetics / beauty

- lifestyle brands



Ability to:

-design and think

-create and direct



Website design experience (highly desirable)



Someone who understands:

-taste

-aesthetic

-restraint

-premium positioning



Experience working within regulated or compliant industries (e.g. healthcare or cosmetics) is advantageous, but not essential.



What This Role Is Not:

-Not a VA role

-Not a “post 3 times a week” role

-Not template-driven content



Why Join Our Team:

-Work directly with the Founder and Leadership Group

-Shape a premium brand at growth stage

-Real ownership of creative direction

-Opportunity to build something that scales nationally



Hours & Engagement:

This role will commence on a part-time basis, with an initial commitment of approximately 10–15 hours per week.



As Dripclub continues to grow nationally, there is a clear pathway for this role to expand in both scope and hours, for the right person who can evolve with the brand.



We’re looking for someone who sees this not just as a contract, but as an opportunity to build and shape something long-term.



If your work looks like a brand, not just content — we want to see it.



Looking forward to this collaboration!
