title: Remote Sales Service Executive (Online Lead Specialist)
description:
We are a fast-growing aesthetic clinic group based in Singapore, focused on delivering high-quality, doctor-led treatments. As we expand, we are building a dedicated online sales team to handle patient enquiries and convert them into clinic visits.



Role Overview

We are looking for a sales-driven, customer-focused individual to manage incoming WhatsApp/Social Media/other online enquiries and convert them into consultation bookings. You will be using our centralised CRM system to handle all incoming leads, and training will be provided.



Your main goal is to engage, follow up, and convert leads into paying patients. If you enjoy chatting with customers, closing sales, and being rewarded for performance, this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities

1. Lead Engagement

? - Respond to Whatsapp and other online enquiries promptly (within 5–15 minutes)

? - Understand customer concerns and recommend suitable solutions

2. Sales Conversion

? - Guide potential patients toward booking a consultation

? - Handle objections (pricing, concerns, hesitation) confidently

? - Follow structured sales scripts and frameworks

3. Follow-Up & Nurturing

? - Proactively follow up with leads (Day 1, Day 3, Day 7, Day 14, etc.)

? - Maintain consistent communication until conversion or closure

4. Appointment Booking

? - Offer and secure consultation slots

? - Coordinate with clinic schedules

5. Lead Tracking

? - Update lead status in CRM or tracking sheets

? - Ensure proper tagging and documentation



What We’re Looking For

Must-Have

? - Strong communication skills (clear, friendly, persuasive)

? - Sales-driven mindset (comfortable closing conversations)

? - Fast typing and ability to handle multiple chats

? - Responsible, disciplined, and able to work remotely



Good to Have

? - Experience in sales, customer service, or aesthetics industry

? - Experience handling WhatsApp / online enquiries

? - Familiarity with beauty or aesthetic treatments



Key Traits for Success

? - Proactive (you follow up, not wait)

? - Persuasive but not pushy

? - Organised and detail-oriented

? - Comfortable working with targets and KPIs



Compensation & Benefits:  

- Competitive base salary of 550USD - 650USD

- Performance-based incentives of 10 USD per lead that attend clinic session



? Remote working flexibility

? - Training and structured scripts provided



Performance Expectations

You will be measured on:

? - Response time

? - Booking conversion rate

? - Show-up rate

? - Revenue generated from leads



Why Join Us?

? - Be part of a growing aesthetic clinic group

? - Clear system and training provided

? - High earning potential with incentives

? - Opportunity to grow into senior sales or team lead roles



How to Apply

Please submit your resume along with a short message explaining why you are suitable for this role.



Note:

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Candidates with strong sales ability will be prioritised.

title: Off-Page SEO & Link Building Specialist
description:
Full-Time Position | Remote

Position Overview

We are seeking an experienced Off-Page SEO and Link Building Specialist to join our digital marketing team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing and executing comprehensive link building strategies that improve domain authority, increase organic traffic, and enhance our online visibility. This role requires expertise in white-hat link acquisition techniques, relationship building, and advanced SEO methodologies including the skyscraper technique.

Key Responsibilities



Develop and implement strategic off-page SEO campaigns focused on high-quality link acquisition from authoritative websites

Execute the skyscraper method by identifying high-performing content in target niches, creating superior versions, and conducting strategic outreach to secure backlinks from websites linking to competing content

Conduct comprehensive link gap analysis and competitive backlink research to identify link building opportunities

Build and maintain relationships with webmasters, bloggers, journalists, and industry influencers for ongoing link placement opportunities

Create compelling outreach campaigns and personalized
 pitches that generate positive responses and secure quality backlinks

Manage guest posting campaigns, including identifying target websites, coordinating content creation, and securing publication with proper link attribution

Monitor and analyze backlink profiles using tools such as Ahrefs, Moz, SEMrush, and Majestic to track performance and identify potential issues

Identify and disavow toxic or spammy backlinks that could harm domain authority

Collaborate with content and social media teams to create linkable assets such as infographics, research studies, tools, and comprehensive guides

Prepare monthly reports on link building performance, including metrics on new backlinks acquired, domain authority improvements, and referral traffic increases



Required Qualifications



3+ years of proven experience in off-page SEO and link building with demonstrable results

Expert knowledge of the skyscraper technique and its application in modern link building strategies

Proficiency with SEO tools including Ahrefs, Moz, SEMrush, Majestic, BuzzStream, or similar platforms

Strong understanding of Google's algorithm updates, ranking factors, and white-hat SEO best practices

Excellent written and verbal communication skills for effective outreach and relationship building

Demonstrated ability to analyze data and metrics to inform strategy and demonstrate ROI

Experience with content marketing and understanding of what makes content linkable and shareable

Self-motivated with excellent time management skills and ability to manage multiple campaigns simultaneously



Preferred Qualifications



Experience in digital PR and securing links from high-authority news and media outlets

Knowledge of technical SEO principles and how off-page factors integrate with on-page optimization

Familiarity with broken link building, resource page link building, and other advanced techniques

Experience working with international or multilingual SEO campaigns

Relevant certifications such as Google Analytics, HubSpot Inbound Marketing, or SEO-specific credentials

title: Part-Time Production Designer
description:
WE'RE HIRING — PART-TIME PRODUCTION DESIGNER

Remote • Cebu City preferred • Ongoing • Long-term







A LITTLE BIT ABOUT US



Hi! We're a married couple running a small Etsy print-on-demand business. I'm European and my wife is Filipino, and we live and work here in Cebu City.



We've been building our store together for the past two years, and things are now growing faster than our time allows.



Right now we run one store offering a range of products across different categories, and we're gradually shaping it more toward kids and families. At the same time, we're building a second store from scratch focused on adults, personalized home decor, and gift products. It's an exciting stage for us, which is exactly why we're looking for the right person to come on board.



We are not a big company or an agency. We're simply two people who care about what we create and how we work. We're hoping to find someone who enjoys doing good work and wants to grow with us over the long term.







WHAT THIS ROLE ACTUALLY IS



We want to be open about what this role involves so you have a clear understanding from the start.



This is primarily a production design role, not a concept design position.



We do the research, study trends, and gather references. Your role is to take those references and recreate designs inspired by them — original in execution, clean, and consistent.



If you are someone who takes pride in doing things well, follows a brief carefully, and delivers on time, this could be a great long-term fit.







WHAT YOU WILL DO



Each week you will receive a batch of design references from us. Your job is to work through them and deliver:



• Recreate designs in Canva, inspired by the reference, original in execution, never a direct copy

• Designs range from very simple (a quote on a frame, maybe 10 minutes) to more involved layouts using AI generated assets. It varies week to week.

• Deliver all files to our shared Canva folder within the agreed timeframe



Volume varies depending on what we find in our research each week. Some weeks more, some weeks less. You will always have a clear brief for each design so there is no guessing involved.







HOW WE WORK TOGETHER



We keep things simple, flexible and low stress. Here is what working with us actually looks like:



• We share references and briefs through Trello, our shared task board, so everything is clear and organised in one place

• Finished files go into our shared Canva folder, simple and organised

• You work through your tasks at your own pace and on your own schedule

• You have one week from when you receive the brief to deliver it

• We are responsive, clear and easy to work with. If something comes up just let us know. We are human too.



We genuinely want this to be a long-term working relationship. We have a second store launching, more products coming, and real growth ahead. If you are reliable and the work is good, there will always be more for you here. The right person could be working with us for years.







HOW WE GET STARTED



To make sure the role is a good fit for both sides, we start with a two-week paid trial period.



During this time you will receive a few small design batches so we can both see how the workflow feels. If everything works well for both sides, the role continues as a long-term position.



For shortlisted candidates we may also ask for a very small design task before the trial begins, just so we can see how you approach a typical production design. It will be short, simple, and we appreciate the time it takes.







TOOLS YOU WILL WORK WITH



Canva — Our primary tool. All designs and files live here. You will work inside our shared Canva account. Strong Canva skills are essential.



AI image tools — We expect you to be comfortable using AI image generation tools such as Gemini or Ideogram to create design assets. You use your own account. Both have free plans available.



Trello — Our task management tool. We use it to share briefs, track progress and keep everything organised. Easy to pick up if new to you.







WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR



• Comfortable recreating designs from references and following briefs precisely

• Organised, reliable and consistent with deadlines

• Good written English for communication

• Familiarity with Etsy, Amazon, or similar online platforms is a plus

• Examples of your design work are required



No prior print-on-demand experience is required. We will walk you through our workflow.







PAY



We pay per design, so your earnings reflect exactly what you deliver each month.



• Simple design (quick layout, text and frame style): $3 per design

• Standard design (more involved, AI generated elements): $5 per design



To give you a real example: 40 simple and 40 standard designs in a month equals $120 + $200 = $320 for that month.



A lighter month will be around $150 to $200. A busier month can reach $350 or more. It scales naturally with the work.



Payment is made monthly in Philippine pesos at the current exchange rate. A simple written agreement is provided before you start.







THE DETAILS



Location: Remote. Work from anywhere in the Philippines. Cebu City is preferred but not required.

Hours: Part-time, roughly 1 to 2 days of actual work per week. You choose your own hours and schedule.

Deadline: You have one week from when you receive the brief to deliver it.

Trial period: Two weeks paid, to make sure the role is a good fit for both sides.

Start date: As soon as possible. We are ready when you are.

Commitment: Ongoing and long-term. We want someone who grows with us.

Task sharing: Via Trello.

File delivery: Via shared Canva folder.

Payment: Monthly in Philippine pesos at the current exchange rate.







HOW TO APPLY



We do not need a long cover letter. Just send us a short message that includes:



• Examples of your design work in any format — a folder link, screenshots, a portfolio page, anything that shows what you can do

• Any relevant experience — for example working with online stores or e-commerce businesses, print on demand products, social media content creation, freelance design work for clients, or any employment related to graphic design. Even small or informal projects count.

• Your availability per week and when you could start



To help us see that you have read this post carefully, please start your message with the word Canva.



Applications without design examples cannot be reviewed.

We read every application personally and will respond to shortlisted candidates within 3 to 5 business days.



We are easy to work with, we pay on time, and we genuinely care about the people we work with.

If this sounds like the kind of setup you have been looking for, we would love to hear from you.

description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



We're looking for a versatile web developer to build and maintain client-facing websites, e-commerce stores, and custom web applications. You'll work across the full stack — owning everything from WordPress theme development to third-party API integration. No two days look the same.

title: SHORT FORM VIDEO EDITOR | Day Shift
description:
We’re hiring someone who knows how to turn long-form content into sharp, high-retention short videos for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



This role is for someone who understands pacing, hooks, and visual rhythm in short-form content, and knows how to edit with intention rather than just cutting clips.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just cutting together videos for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have strong creative instincts and know how to spot 
nts that make people stop scrolling? Are you proactive, adaptable, and detail-oriented? Do you have a sharp sense of pacing, an instinct for hooks, and a clear understanding of how short-form videos need to flow to hold attention? Do you take pride in clean edits and delivering videos that feel intentional and finished? Do our core values sound like a fit for who you are?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Short-Form Editing & Story Selection

- Review long-form videos, transcripts, or raw footage to identify short-form clip opportunities

- Select 
nts that are clear, engaging, and platform-appropriate

- Edit vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Create strong hooks, clean cuts, and natural pacing

- Deliver publish-ready videos that meet brand and platform standards



Captions, Visuals & Formatting

- Add on-screen captions (burned-in or SRT as required) with proper timing and readability

- Apply basic motion, zooms, punch-ins, and visual emphasis where appropriate

- Follow platform-specific formatting (aspect ratio, duration, safe margins)



Iteration & Workflow

- Implement feedback efficiently and meet agreed turnaround times

- Maintain clear file naming and folder organization

- Track edits, revisions, and delivery status as required



Requirements:

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION, REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Experience with Final Cut Pro X (or other editing software, such as Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro) is required

- Strong preference for MacOS users

- Experience editing short-form vertical content for social platforms, required

- Strong understanding of short-form pacing, hooks, and retention

- Experience working from transcripts or long-form content, required

- Clean file organization and understanding of post-production workflo

- Portfolio of completed short-form video projects, required

- General understanding of brand, content marketing, YouTube, etc, required

- GREAT interpersonal and communication skills, required

- Ability to self-start, work on a tight schedule, and manage multiple project deadlines, required

- Ability to follow directions and a LOVE of completing lots of projects according to consistent specifications, required

- Growth mindset, required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.


 



STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $20-40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Short Form Video Editor with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: Social media marketing assistant - small romance publisher
description:
I'm a romance author with several genres and pen names branded as a small publisher. I'm looking for someone to assist me with marketing. You should be able to manage posting to multiple
 pages, Instagram and Tiktok accounts. You need to be able to make book marketing reels, slideshows, stills and videos with great hooks from my books (use of ChatGPT or similar is encouraged to help you find them).



My books are translated into multiple languages including French, German, Italian, Spanish and Brazilian Portuguese, with Dutch, Swedish and Polish starting shortly. You need to be able to duplicate the social media products into these languages using ChatGPT for colloquial translations and respond to readers seeking to engage on social media platforms. You will need to use a VPN to post content to all channels in order to 'localise' each account to the appropriate country.



Ideally, you will have a good understanding of Bookstagram and Booktok already. You should be skilled in graphic design, have a good understanding of romance hooks and tropes, and have skills in short-form video content creation and creation of reels etc. Proficiency using bulk-create in Canva is required. You will need to build each language-specific Instagram account to a level where trial reels can be posted to the account and will then be expected to maintain 3+ reels/day on each account - bulk scheduling ahead.



References will be provided to FREE resources (created by other authors) to guide you in what sort of content I am looking for, but you will be required to 'use' Instagram and Tiktok in order to keep up with current trends in the book marketing world, find viral sounds, and make the accounts appear 'real' accounts.



Up to US$100 additional per month can be made available for software subscriptions etc; you will be asked to show receipts and explain use cases. You will be expected to have a paid VPN and Canva Pro account at a minimum; it is vital that all source graphics and other materials are legally cleared for use.



Other tools you might with to access: a bulk scheduler that's not Meta Business Manager; Kling or other video creation software, Gemini/Antigravity etc. If there are specific tools you wish to use instead, we can discuss on a case by case basis.



1-2 additional device (phone etc) may be required to keep up with all the international accounts; this matter will be discussed after 1-2 months depending on success in the initial languages.



You are encouraged to be a self-starter. I am hiring someone because I don't have time to do this myself: I also don't have time to hold your hand constantly. While in the first 2-4 weeks I will need a fair amount of oversight and pre-approval for what you are doing, once I start seeing results I will encourage you to work independently and touch base only when I have a new book/translation for you to add to marketing efforts.

title: IT Support
description:
We are a U.S.-based IT and AI consulting firm serving small-to-medium businesses across the nation. We are growing and need a reliable, experienced IT Support Specialist to join our managed services team. You will be working directly on real client environments, so you need to think on your feet, communicate clearly with non-technical business owners, and know your tools without needing to be walked through them.

About the Role

This is a full-time remote position supporting U.S. clients primarily during Eastern business hours. You will handle Tier 1–2 support across a mix of cloud and on-premise environments. Day-to-day responsibilities include managing and troubleshooting Azure Active Directory and Microsoft Entra ID, administering on-premise Active Directory including Group Policy and OU structure, configuring and supporting VPN connections for remote workforce environments, and providing general networking support covering DNS, DHCP, routing, switching, and connectivity issues. You will also support AWS environments at a working level including EC2, IAM, and VPC basics, administer Microsoft 365 across Exchange Online, Teams, and SharePoint, and assist with DigitalOcean and Linux server environments used in client deployments. VoIP and FreePBX support is a plus. You are expected to document everything and communicate resolution clearly to clients without burying them in technical jargon.

What We're Looking For

You should have at least two years of hands-on experience in IT support or systems administration with direct exposure to Azure AD, Active Directory, VPN setup and troubleshooting, and Microsoft 365 administration. A solid understanding of TCP/IP networking fundamentals is non-negotiable. Experience with AWS, PowerShell scripting, Linux server management, or FreePBX is a strong advantage but not required. Relevant certifications such as CompTIA A+, Network+, Security+, or Microsoft AZ-104 are a plus. Most importantly, you need to be self-directed — we are not looking for someone who needs constant supervision. You should be able to take a problem, own it, and close it.

title: Newsletter Specialist - beehiiv, Email Marketing & Claude AI
description:
beehiiv Newsletter Writer -
 Marketing Expertise & AI Proficiency Required



We are Nest Marketing, a full-service
 and SMS retention marketing agency managing 60+ DTC and e-commerce brand clients. We've generated $175M+ in
 revenue for 250+ brands, and now we're looking for a skilled Newsletter Writer who can translate our deep
 marketing expertise into high-quality content.



What You'll Be Doing



You'll be creating 30 newsletters per month on our beehiiv platform, covering
 marketing strategy, retention tactics, DTC insights, and real-world case studies from our work with health supplement brands, peptide companies, and consumer goods clients.



These aren't generic newsletters. They need to be well-informed, tactical, and rooted in real expertise — the kind of content that
 marketers, agency owners, and DTC founders actually want to read.



The Role



- Write and publish 30 newsletters monthly on beehiiv

- Topics:
 marketing strategy, Klaviyo tactics, SMS marketing, retention optimization, subscription growth, segmentation, flows, campaigns, creative testing, and DTC trends

- Use Claude AI to research, draft, and refine content (you must know how to prompt effectively)

- Manage the full beehiiv platform: scheduling, formatting, audience segmentation, analytics tracking

- Collaborate with our team to pull real insights and case studies from client work

- Maintain a consistent voice: direct, anti-guru, tactical, no fluff



Requirements



Must-Haves:

- Proven experience using beehiiv (platform navigation, newsletter creation, audience management, analytics)

- Strong understanding of
 marketing fundamentals (flows, campaigns, segmentation, deliverability, metrics)

- Deep familiarity with Claude AI and how to use it for content creation (prompting, editing, research)

- Excellent English writing skills — clear, concise, engaging

- Ability to turn complex marketing concepts into digestible content

- Self-starter who can manage deadlines independently

- Available to work weekdays and weekends as needed



Bonus Points:

- Experience with Klaviyo, 
, or other
 platforms

- Background in DTC, e-commerce, or retention marketing

- Familiarity with health/supplement brands

- Experience writing for marketing agencies or B2B audiences

- Knowledge of AI tools beyond Claude (ChatGPT, Perplexity, etc.)



Getting to Know You



Please answer these questions in your application:



1. Have you used beehiiv to create and manage newsletters before? If yes, for how long?

2. Can you share examples of newsletters or marketing content you've written? (Please include links)

3. How do you currently use Claude or other AI tools in your writing process?

4. What's your experience with
 marketing? (Platforms used, types of campaigns, etc.)

5. How would you approach writing a newsletter about "advanced Klaviyo segmentation strategies" for an audience of
 marketers?

6. Can you commit to producing 30 newsletters per month (roughly 1 per day)?

7. Are you available to start immediately?

8. What's your timezone and preferred working hours?



About Nest Marketing



We're a team of 50+
 and SMS specialists working with top DTC brands in health supplements, peptides, and consumer goods. Our work is data-driven, creative-first, and focused on retention and LTV growth.



Learn more: nestmarketing.co



Growth Opportunity



This role is perfect for someone who wants to build their reputation in the
 marketing space while working with a fast-growing agency. As we scale, there's opportunity for increased responsibility, salary growth, and deeper involvement in our content strategy.



Compensation: TBD based on experience

Volume: 30 newsletters/month

Start Date: Immediate

Contract Type: Part-time contractor (with potential to scale)



To Apply: Please submit your answers to the questions above along with relevant writing samples and beehiiv experience. Only applications with newsletter/email marketing samples will be considered.

title: Email Agency Content Copywriter Needed
description:
We're a full-service
 and SMS retention marketing agency working with DTC and ecommerce brands across health, supplements, beauty, wellness, and skincare. Klaviyo is our primary platform. Our approach is rooted in real data, real strategy, and zero fluff. You can learn more about us at nestmarketing.co.



We're looking for a sharp content copywriter to own our agency's beehiiv newsletter, which goes out to 10,000+ ecommerce brand owners and founders. This is not client work for a single brand. This is our own content engine, and your writing will represent the voice and authority of the agency.



**The Role**



You'll be writing in-depth, high-value newsletter content that positions us as the go-to retention marketing agency in the DTC ecommerce space. Your audience is brand owners, founders, and marketing leaders who are running real businesses and want actionable insight they can use immediately.



You'll work directly with our founder and content team to align on editorial direction, topic selection, and cadence.



**What You'll Do**



- Write and publish weekly newsletters through beehiiv to our audience of 10,000+ ecommerce brand owners and founders

- Manage and operate beehiiv as a platform, including list growth, segmentation, scheduling, analytics, and optimization (or bring strong recommendations on alternative newsletter platforms if applicable)

- Produce in-depth articles and long-form content pieces that go well beyond surface-level advice

- Write from the perspective of an agency that manages retention marketing at scale across dozens of brands

- Research trending topics, platform updates (especially Klaviyo), and timely industry angles that matter to brand owners

- Learn and internalize key internal SOPs so your content reflects how a high-performing
 agency actually thinks and operates

- Craft subject lines and preview text that drive opens in a crowded inbox

- Maintain a consistent brand voice that is direct, opinionated, conversational, and anti-guru



**What You Must Bring**



- A deep, working understanding of Klaviyo, including flows, campaigns, segmentation, analytics, deliverability, and platform features

- Hands-on experience managing beehiiv or similar newsletter platforms (Substack, ConvertKit, etc.), with the ability to own the full publishing workflow

- Proficiency with Claude (Opus 4.6) or a willingness to learn quickly. This is our primary writing and research tool, and we expect you to become fluent in using large language models as part of your workflow

- Strong knowledge of how
 marketing agencies operate, including client workflows, strategy processes, and the challenges of managing retention across multiple brands

- Proven ability to write in-depth, long-form content and articles about
 marketing, specifically in the DTC ecommerce space

- The ability to quickly learn and absorb internal SOPs, frameworks, and processes, then translate them into clear, authoritative content that speaks to brand owners

- Experience writing for an audience of founders, operators, or decision-makers (not consumers)

- Strong research skills and the ability to turn complex strategy into engaging, readable writing

- Deadline reliability and the ability to work independently with minimal hand-holding



**Bonus Points**



- Experience working inside or alongside an
 marketing or retention agency

- Familiarity with 
 or Iterable in addition to Klaviyo

- Existing knowledge of DTC verticals like supplements, health, beauty, skincare, and wellness

- Comfortable referencing real campaign data, case studies, or platform analytics in your writing

- Experience using AI tools beyond Claude (ChatGPT, Perplexity, etc.) for research, outlining, or content production



**To Apply**



Send 2 to 3 writing samples (long-form newsletter or editorial content preferred) along with short answers to the following five questions:



1. Our audience is ecommerce brand owners doing $1M to $10M+ in revenue. Write a sample newsletter intro (3 to 5 sentences) about why most brands underutilize their post-purchase flow in Klaviyo.



2. What is one common mistake you see ecommerce brands make with their
 marketing? How would you frame that into a newsletter topic that positions an agency as the authority?



3. If we handed you an internal SOP on how we build and optimize welcome flows for new clients, how would you approach turning that into a piece of content for our audience of brand owners?



4. Name a DTC ecommerce brand that you think does
 marketing exceptionally well. What specifically are they doing right, and how would you turn that into a newsletter breakdown?



5. How do you stay current on Klaviyo platform updates,
 marketing trends, and the DTC ecommerce space? List your go-to sources.

title: Outbound Sales Representative (Work From Home)
description:
About Us



We’re a high-energy team driven by big goals and real results. We’re looking for motivated individuals who are ready to take ownership of their careers, thrive in a fast-paced environment, and turn effort into measurable success. If you’re ambitious, driven, and enjoy seeing your hard work pay off, this could be the right opportunity for you.



About the Role



As an Outbound Sales Representative, you will engage potential customers through outbound cold calls, introducing them to our premium products and services. Your role is to understand each customer’s needs, explain how our solutions can add value, and guide them toward the right fit.



This position is about real conversations, active listening, and building trust—whether you’re connecting with a new prospect or following up with an existing lead.



What You’ll Be Doing



Learning and mastering our premium products and services



Conducting outbound cold calls and follow-ups with confidence and professionalism



Creating positive, lasting impressions with every interaction



Representing the company as a reliable and trustworthy brand ambassador



Building genuine relationships with customers



Consistently meeting and exceeding sales targets with the support of our training and team



What We’re Looking For



Strong Communication Skills: Clear, confident, and persuasive



Positive Attitude & Professionalism: Friendly, approachable, and polished



People-Oriented: Naturally builds rapport and trust



Quick Thinker: Able to adapt, problem-solve, and stay calm under pressure



Organized & Goal-Driven: Excellent time management and self-discipline



Results-Motivated: You are driven by performance-based earnings and career growth



Requirements:



Personal PC or laptop



Professional headset



Stable, reliable internet connection



Why Join Us?



Work From Home: Fully remote position—save time and commuting costs while working comfortably from home



Career Growth: We promote from within and are looking for future leaders and team managers



Attractive Compensation: Uncapped commissions, performance bonuses, and incentives for top performers



Training & Mentorship: Ongoing support to help you succeed and grow



Positive Team Culture: Supportive environment that celebrates wins and values collaboration



To Be Considered for an Interview



Please submit a voice recording introducing yourself and answering the following:



Why should you be considered for this position?



What experience do you have with cold calling or outbound sales?



Do you have any background in the telecommunications industry?



If you’re ready to challenge yourself, grow quickly, and be part of an exciting, results-driven team, we’d love to hear from you.

Apply now and our HR team will be in touch shortly.

title: Client Account Manager - Direct Hire
description:
Location: Remote

Time-Zone: U.S. Central Time (CST)

Terms: Full-time, Independent contractor

Compensation: $7/hr, negotiable based on experience



ABOUT THE ROLE: 



We are a privately-held overseas staffing startup based in the U.S. We help top U.S. businesses (from celebrity-backed CPG firms to Y Combinator-backed AI startups) hire exceptional remote talent overseas without going through BPOs. We care deeply about providing dignified, redemptive work for people in the Philippines.



We are looking for a Client Account Manager to own the client journey from consultative sales (led by our Founder) through recruitment delivery to onboarding to retention and upsells / overall client success. This role is critical to our growth strategy: allowing our founder to focus on closing new business while you work on delivery + retention. There will be step-up opportunities to define the function, help close deals, and work cross functionally with our awesome teammates. 





ABOUT YOU:  



Are you client-focused, proactive, and process-driven? Do you enjoy building order, systems, and consistency while managing multiple stakeholders? The right person will take ownership of client delivery, anticipate challenges, and maintain high client satisfaction. You will work cross-functionally with Recruiting, Operations, and Finance to ensure a seamless, world-class experience for every client.



RESPONSIBILITIES:  



Client Onboarding & Post-Sales Delivery

- Lead client kick-off calls to align expectations, define roles, and clarify hiring needs.

- Own the client experience immediately after engagement and deposit.

- Communicate the recruitment process step-by-step, including timelines, communication cadence, and deliverables.

- Coordinate with the Recruitment team to ensure sourcing and shortlisting begin promptly.



Recruitment Process Management

- Serve as the main point of contact between clients and internal teams.

- Ensure candidate shortlists are delivered, interviews are scheduled, and feedback is collected timely.

- Follow up persistently with clients to prevent delays while maintaining a professional, friendly tone.

- Coordinate offer extensions, pre-boarding paperwork, and candidate logistics.

- Client Success & Retention



Conduct 30/60/90-day check-ins post-placement to ensure alignment and satisfaction.

- Monitor and escalate client issues before they become critical.

- Identify growth opportunities within accounts, including additional headcount or new roles.

- Oversee smooth onboarding with clients and internal operations (Miya).

- Internal Coordination & Process Improvement



Align daily with Recruitment and Operations teams on client priorities and feedback.

- Maintain accurate records in 
, Workable, and internal CRM/ATS.

- Contribute to refining client-facing SOPs and playbooks.



Requirements

- 3+ years of experience in Client Account Management, Recruitment Account Management, or B2B Customer Success.

- Proven ability to manage multiple clients and processes simultaneously.

- Experience working with U.S. start ups

- Exceptional written and verbal English communication skills (native/bilingual level).

- Comfortable using CRM/ATS/Collaboration tools (Workable, 
, Slack, Zoom/Fathom).

- Ability to work full U.S. Central or Pacific time zones reliably.

- Ability to work reliably and independently in a remote setting with minimal supervision.

- Bachelor Degree or higher (summa, magna or cum laude and/or Academic Scholar from a reputable college preferred) 



Preferred Requirements 

- Experience managing recruitment pipelines in a remote staffing or BPO environment.

- Familiarity with U.S. startup culture, particularly Series B/C companies.

- Bonus: Experience with ATS or CRM integrations, scaling client delivery processes.



To Apply send your resume and a short introduction
 to: 

Subject: Your Name – Applicant for Client Account Manager

Example: Maria Santos – Applicant for Client Account Manager



Please submit your application to the
. DMs are not monitored.

YouTube + Content Growth Virtual Assistant (Remote)

Overview

We’re looking for a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support our YouTube channel growth end-to-end: video editing, uploads, SEO optimisation, repurposing into Shorts for multiple platforms, and proactive improvement suggestions.

This role is for someone who understands YouTube as a search and recommendation engine (not just editing), and can spot growth opportunities, content blindspots, and lead-generation angles.



Key Responsibilities

1) YouTube video editing + publishing

Edit long-form videos (clean cuts, pacing, captions/subtitles when needed, simple motion graphics, audio levelling)

Prepare thumbnails (basic design + A/B-ready variations if possible)

Upload and publish videos on schedule

Add end screens, cards, chapters, and pinned comments



2) YouTube SEO + optimisation

Do keyword research and topic validation (search intent + competition)

Optimise titles, descriptions, tags, categories, and hashtags

Recommend playlists and channel structure improvements

Maintain consistent metadata standards across the channel

Track what’s working and iterate (CTR, retention, watch time, traffic sources)



3) Repurposing into Shorts + cross-posting

Create YouTube Shorts from long-form content (hook-first, tight pacing, captions)

Repurpose and format for:

Instagram Reels

TikTok

XHS (Xiaohongshu)

Ensure correct aspect ratios, safe zones, and platform-native best practices



4) Blog + web link maintenance (SEO support)

Maintain blog posts that support video topics (basic formatting + internal linking)

Update web links and embed videos where relevant

Implement simple on-page SEO hygiene (headings, meta title/description drafts, keyword placement, alt text suggestions)



5) Growth monitoring + proactive recommendations

Watch for channel growth opportunities (trending topics, competitor moves, content gaps)

Identify blindspots in content strategy (what we’re not addressing, weak hooks, unclear positioning)

Suggest lead-generation improvements (CTAs, lead magnets, link-in-bio structure, pinned comment strategy)



Required Skills

Proven experience managing and optimising YouTube channels

Strong understanding of:

Keywords, search intent, and YouTube metadata

Playlists, channel organisation, categories, and content positioning

Analytics basics (CTR, retention, AVD, traffic sources)

Video editing skills (any of: CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, DaVinci Resolve)

Shorts editing with strong hooks and pacing

Comfortable repurposing content for IG/TikTok/XHS

Solid written English for titles/descriptions/blog formatting



Nice-to-Have

Thumbnail design skills (Canva/Photoshop)

Basic SEO knowledge for blogs (internal linking, on-page optimisation)

Experience with lead-gen funnels (simple landing pages, lead magnets,
 capture)

Tools You Should Be Comfortable With

YouTube Studio

Google Docs/Sheets

Canva (or similar)

Video editing software (state what you use)

Optional: TubeBuddy/VidIQ (if you use them)

Deliverables & Workflow

Weekly output targets will be agreed (e.g., X long-form videos + Y Shorts)

You will maintain a simple tracker of:

Video status (editing ? review ? upload ? published)

SEO checklist completion

Shorts created and cross-posted

Notes on performance + next actions



How to Apply (Important)

To confirm you read this post, use the keyword “LEOPARDCRUST” in your
 subject line.

In your application, include:

2–3 examples of YouTube channels you’ve worked on (link + what you improved)

A short description of your YouTube SEO process (keywords ? title ? description ? tags/playlists)

Your editing tool stack

Your expected hourly rate and weekly availability

Screening Task (Shortlisted Applicants)

We will provide a raw clip and ask you to:

Create 1 YouTube-ready long-form edit (or a sample segment)

Create 2 Shorts

Propose an SEO title + description + keyword plan



Role Details

Remote, part-time to start (potential to expand)

Must be responsive and proactive with updates

Strong attention to detail is required

title: Community Operations Specilist
description:
MUST SUBMIT A VIDEO INTRODUCTION TO APPLY FOR THIS POSITION. IN YOUR VIDEO, PLEASE SHARE WHO YOU ARE, YOUR EXPERIENCE, AND SPECIFICALLY HOW YOU WILL BRING VALUE TO OUR COMMUNITY, SUPPORT OUR MEMBERS, AND CONTRIBUTE TO OUR COMPANY’S GROWTH. APPLICATIONS WITHOUT A VIDEO INTRO WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED.



We are a fast-growing Digital Product Creators company dedicated to helping entrepreneurs turn their knowledge, skills, and ideas into profitable digital products using our all-in-one system powered by Go High Level. We are seeking a driven, energetic, and results-oriented Community Operations Specialist who is passionate about helping people win and thrives in a high-performance, fast-paced environment.



In this role, you will be responsible for onboarding new members, delivering exceptional customer support, hosting trainings and Q&A sessions, and guiding members step-by-step as they build and launch their digital products. You will play a critical role in increasing engagement, retention, and overall community success by conducting outreach, monitoring member progress, celebrating wins, and providing hands-on coaching.



This position also includes managing support communications, assisting with certification programs, leading implementation-based trainings, and supporting revenue growth through recommending and upselling relevant products and services. From time to time, you may also be required to conduct training classes, lead workshops, or step in as a trainer to ensure our community continues to receive high-quality education and support.



We are looking for someone who is confident, proactive, tech-savvy, and able to lead with both strategy and heart—someone who can motivate, educate, and hold members accountable to results. If you are excited about personal growth, digital products, and being part of a company that is scaling rapidly, this is an opportunity to grow with us.



Additional details regarding responsibilities, expectations, and performance metrics will be reviewed during the interview process.

title: IT Support Specialist (MSP) — Work From Home
description:
About Us



We Fix IT is a Managed Service Provider (MSP) based in Darwin, Australia. We look after IT for businesses across the Northern Territory — everything from helpdesk and Microsoft 365 to security, networking, and cloud infrastructure. We're growing and need someone sharp to join the team remotely.



What You'll Be Doing



• Handling helpdesk tickets and providing remote support to Australian business clients

• Managing and troubleshooting Microsoft 365 environments (Exchange, SharePoint, Teams, Entra ID)

• Endpoint management via Microsoft Intune (device policies, compliance, deployments)

• Supporting and configuring Microsoft Copilot and AI tools for clients

• SharePoint site administration, permissions, and migrations

• Assisting with onboarding/offboarding users, licensing, and security policies

• Documenting processes and maintaining client knowledge bases

• Escalating and collaborating with the on-site Darwin team



What We're Looking For



• Experience working in an MSP or IT support environment

• Strong knowledge of Microsoft 365 administration

• Microsoft certifications preferred (MS-900, MD-102, MS-102, AZ-900, AI-900, or similar)

• Familiarity with AI tools (Copilot, ChatGPT, automation workflows)

• Excellent English — you'll be speaking directly with Australian business clients

• Reliable internet connection and a proper home office setup

• Available to work Australian business hours



???



?? Before You Apply — Please Answer These 5 Questions



Rate yourself 1–10 for each (1 = no experience, 10 = expert) and give a brief example or explanation for each:



1. Customer Communication — How would you rate your ability to deal with non-technical business clients? (phone,
, tickets) Rate 1–10 and give an example.

2. Microsoft 365 — How experienced are you with M365 admin and Entra ID? Rate 1–10 and describe what you've managed.

3. SharePoint — How would you rate your SharePoint experience? (sites, permissions, migrations, lists) Rate 1–10 and give an example.

4. AI & Microsoft Copilot — How much hands-on experience do you have with AI tools like Copilot, ChatGPT, or Power Automate AI? Rate 1–10 and describe how you've used them.

5. English Proficiency — How would you rate your spoken and written English? Rate 1–10. Bonus: link a short voice recording or video if you have one.

6. Intune — How experienced are you with Intune endpoint management? Rate 1–10 and describe what you've managed.



Also tell us:



• Your expected monthly salary in PHP

• Your current internet speed (screenshot from speedtest.net (http://speedtest.net/) appreciated)

title: Credit Repair Specialist / Credit Dispute Expert (Consumer Law)
description:

We are not looking for someone who only sends generic templates — you must understand how to analyze reports and apply the correct dispute strategy.

title: Part-Time Meta Ads Operator
description:
How To Apply



Please reply to this job post with the following:

1. A brief summary of your Meta Ads experience, including typical monthly budgets.

2. Screenshots or summaries of 2 to 3 campaigns you have managed (goal, budget, structure, and results).

3. One paragraph on how you normally set up tracking (pixel, events, CAPI) for a lead gen funnel.

4. Your part-time hourly rate and full-time monthly rate, respectively. 



About Us

We’re a programming education company that helps experienced software engineers build real-world Rust projects and land Rust roles. We run a high-ticket, cohort-based accelerator plus self-paced training, and reach engineers through YouTube,
, and partnerships.



Role Overview

We are looking for a part-time Meta Ads Operator to implement and maintain our
 and Instagram campaigns. This is an execution-focused role: you will take clear targeting and creative direction from the founder and marketing team, then handle setup, tracking, and ongoing optimizations inside Meta Ads Manager.



Ideal for someone who enjoys clean accounts, accurate tracking, and making data-driven tweaks, not sitting in branding meetings.



Key Responsibilities

1. Implement and maintain Meta Pixel and Conversion API across our funnels (waitlist, applications, bookings, purchases).

2. Set up campaigns, ad sets, and ads according to provided specs (objectives, budgets, audiences, and creatives).

3. Create and manage custom and lookalike audiences from our traffic,
 list, and engaged users.

4. Monitor performance daily on weekdays and execute simple rules: pause obvious losers, keep winners within defined guardrails, and flag issues quickly.

5. Run basic A/B tests on creatives and audiences following our testing framework.

6. Ensure tracking events fire correctly on all key steps and troubleshoot when they do not.

7. Produce a concise weekly report (spend, cost per waitlist opt-in, cost per application, cost per call, cost per student) with 2 to 3 clear recommendations.



You Are A Good Fit If

1. You have 1 to 3 years of hands-on experience running Meta Ads (lead gen or info/education experience is a plus).

2. You are comfortable with Meta Ads Manager, Pixel, standard events, and basic CAPI.

3. You can read numbers and make simple performance-based decisions without drama.

4. You are organized, responsive, and document what you do so others can follow it.

5. You can overlap at least 2 to 3 hours per day with US time zones.

6. You’re currently freelancing or working part?time and want a long?term core client, not just a one?off project.



This Role Is Not

1. Not a creative director or copywriter (we have a content and
 team).

2. Not a CMO or growth strategist d
 offers, funnels, or pricing.

3. Not a general social media manager (no organic posting, community management, or influencer work).



Scope & Engagement

1. Part-time contractor.

2. We’ll start at 5–10 hours/week for the first 60–90 days while we validate and scale Meta.

3. We guarantee a minimum of 20 hours/month, paid monthly, so your time is predictable.

4. If performance is strong and we scale ad spend, this role can grow into 15–20+ hours/week and potentially a full-time PH position.

5. Remote, flexible schedule as long as SLAs are met and campaigns are monitored on weekdays.



How To Apply



Please reply to this job post with the following:

1. A brief summary of your Meta Ads experience, including typical monthly budgets.

2. Screenshots or summaries of 2 to 3 campaigns you have managed (goal, budget, structure, and results).

3. One paragraph on how you normally set up tracking (pixel, events, CAPI) for a lead gen funnel.

4. Your part-time hourly rate and full-time monthly rate, respectively.

title: YouTube Queer Family Channel SMM & Video Editor
description:
We're a queer family YouTube vlogging channel with 140k subscribers, creating content about LGBTQ+ life, relationships, travel and neurodivergence. We're a two-mom family based in Europe, returning to regular content creation after a break, and we're looking for the right person to help us grow sustainably, particularly with repurposing our long form content to short form and community management (filtering and responding to comments).

We're looking for someone who genuinely connects with what we do and wants to be part of it long term.



A good eye for aesthetic and visually pleasing content is a must, it's part of what our audience loves about us.





What you'll be doing:

Short form content

— Watching our long form YouTube videos and identifying the best 
nts for short form clips

— Editing those clips into vertical format for YouTube Shorts and TikTok

— Adding captions, basic graphics and formatting so they feel native to each platform



Community management

— Reading all YouTube and social media comments before they reach us

— Responding warmly to straightforward comments in our voice and tone

— Compiling a weekly digest of meaningful, positive comments for us to read

— Filtering out negative, harmful or unconstructive comments without passing them on to us

— Flagging anything genuinely important that needs our attention



Could also turn into editing our long form content eventually.



Bonus if you can also:

- help with thumbnails and SEO

- give us inspiration for what kind of content to create next, advise on strategy etc.



What we're looking for:

— Strong written English — warm, natural and conversational

— Real understanding of or personal connection to LGBTQ+ community and content — this is important to us, not just a nice to have

— Experience editing short form video content from original horizontal format — please share examples

— Familiarity with TikTok, Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts formats

— Someone who watches YouTube creators for fun and genuinely understands creator culture

— Reliable, proactive, and comfortable working independently

— Someone who wants a long term working relationship, not a short term gig



Practical details:

— Part time, approximately 10-15 hours per week to start

— Fully remote, flexible hours

— Rate: $
/month depending on experience and hours

— Payment via Wise, twice monthly

— Potential to grow the role as we grow



To apply, please send us:

- A few sentences about why this role appeals to you specifically and why we should pick you

- Examples of short form video content you've edited or managed

- Any experience with YouTube or social media community management





Applications without a personal note will not be considered.

title: Video Editor
description:
We are looking for a talented FULL-Time Video Editor to join our team.



Please provide the link to your resume and portfolio when you apply.



**Responsibilities**



-Edit short-form video ads and content for social platforms 
, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

**Expected Output**

**Expected Expertise**



Fast and reliable internet

title: B2B Appointment Setter / Outbound SDR (LinkedIn + Cold Email) | SME & Accounting Firms
description:
I am the founder of Onwards Capita, a fractional CFO and finance execution firm helping SMEs improve cash visibility, working capital discipline, and short-term financial control.

I am hiring one disciplined outbound SDR / appointment setter based in the Philippines to help me generate qualified meetings.

This is not a strategy role.

This is not a closing role.

This is not a content-writing role.

I will provide:

• the target personas

• the outreach strategy

• the message scripts

• the one-pagers / sales material

• the qualification logic



Your role is to execute with discipline:

• identify the right targets

• run outbound on LinkedIn and cold

• follow up consistently

• manage replies and booking flow

• keep the CRM and tracking clean



Scope split

• 80% of your work: outreach to SME founders / decision-makers for a cash control / liquidity offer

• 20% of your work: outreach to accounting firm partners in Singapore and Malaysia for an early-stage pilot offer



What you will do

• Build and verify targeted prospect lists using LinkedIn Sales Navigator and other approved tools

• Identify decision-makers in our target markets and ICPs

• Run structured outbound sequences across:

o LinkedIn connection requests and follow-ups

o cold
 outreach and follow-ups

• Manage responses and keep communication professional, concise and accurate

• Handle basic replies using our pre-approved frameworks

• Escalate nuanced conversations to me

• Push qualified prospects to book a 10–15 minute intro call on my calendar

• Keep records clean in our CRM / tracker

• Report clearly on:

o prospects added

o touches sent

o positive replies

o meetings booked

o meetings held

o pipeline quality



Important

You will not use my personal LinkedIn account.

You will conduct LinkedIn outreach from your own professional profile and use a company
 address for cold
.



Ideal profile

You are a good fit if:

• You have real experience booking B2B meetings through LinkedIn and cold

• Your written English is strong and professional

• You are comfortable reaching out to founders, partners, recruiters, and senior decision-makers

• You know how to research and target properly instead of blasting low-quality lists

• You are organized, responsive, and reliable

• You understand CRM hygiene and follow-up discipline

• You do not need hand-holding every day

Strong advantage if you have

• Experience in B2B SaaS, financial services, consulting, accounting, or high-ticket services

• Experience prospecting Singapore, Malaysia, or US-based businesses

• Experience using LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo, HubSpot, Zoho, or similar tools



Contract structure

• initial 4-week paid test engagement

• 20–25 hours/week

• If performance is strong, this will become a longer-term retainer

Compensation

• Base during 4-week trial: $400–$600/month equivalent, depending on experience, quality, and availability

• Hours: roughly 20–25 hours/week to start

• Bonus: $30 for each qualified meeting held

• Bonus: $200 for each SME client you sourced that signs and pays the first invoice

• Bonus: $30 for each qualified accounting firm partner meeting held

• Bonus: $300 when an accounting firm enters into a formal pilot contract discussion 



What success looks like

In the first 4 weeks, I expect:

• disciplined execution

• strong targeting quality

• clean tracking

• professional communication

• steady follow-up

• qualified meetings, not junk meetings



To apply

Start your application with the words: CASHCONTROL

Then include the following:

1. A short summary of your outbound experience

2. Which tools you have used: Sales Navigator, Apollo, Lemlist, Instantly, HubSpot, Zoho, etc.

3. Two examples of B2B outbound messages you personally sent that led to a booked meeting

4. Which geographies and seniority levels you have prospected before

5. Your availability over the next 4 weeks

6. Your expected monthly compensation for a 20–25 hour/week trial

Low-effort, generic applications will be ignored.

title: Appointment Setter & Sales Support
description:
Do you love speaking with people, creating 
ntum, and opening doors for meaningful business conversations?



Dale Carnegie Australia is looking for a confident, energetic, and proactive Appointment Setter to join our team. This is an outstanding opportunity for someone with a strong phone manner, genuine people skills, and the drive to turn interest into qualified appointments.



In this role, you will be a key part of our growth engine — following up warm leads generated through workshops, events, and marketing activity, building rapport quickly, and booking appointments for our Senior Sales Consultants. You will also help keep our CRM and databases accurate, organised, and up to date.



Reporting directly to the Managing Director, this position suits someone who is resilient, highly motivated, and thrives on 
ntum. If you enjoy making calls, handling conversations with confidence, and staying persistent without losing professionalism, this could be an exceptional fit.



What you’ll be doing:

- Following up leads from workshops, campaigns, and marketing activity

- Calling prospective clients and contacts with confidence and professionalism

- Booking qualified appointments for our Senior Sales Consultants

- Building rapport and creating a strong first impression of Dale Carnegie Australia

- Maintaining accurate notes and updates in our database and CRM

- Supporting the sales process by keeping lead activity organised and moving forward



What we’re looking for:

- A professional and engaging phone manner

- Confidence initiating and leading conversations

- Strong customer service and people skills

- A resilient, positive, and persistent attitude

- High attention to detail and strong follow-through

- Someone who enjoys being part of a team and takes pride in doing great work



What you’ll get in return:

- A supportive team environment where your contribution matters

- A generous bonus structure tied to successful appointments booked

- Ongoing training and development for the right person

- The opportunity to grow with a respected global brand

- A workplace that values loyalty, effort, and long-term contribution



At Dale Carnegie Australia, we genuinely value our people. We are proud to have Virtual Staff who have been with us for more than 5 years — a reflection of the respect, support, and opportunity we aim to provide.



If you are looking for more than just a job, and want to be part of a team where your effort is recognised, your growth is supported, and your work makes a real impact, we would love to hear from you.



How to apply:



Please send us a short video message telling us:

- Why you would like to be considered for this role

- Why you want to join Dale Carnegie Australia

- What makes you a strong fit for this position



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Senior Helpdesk Engineer
description:
HOW TO APPLY:



If you feel this position aligns with your skills and experience, please fill out the application form here:


/bepartofourteam.





We’re looking for a hands-on senior IT professional who can support clients at all levels while also leading or assisting with IT projects and driving innovative solutions.

Our senior tea
mbers are critical to supporting our awesome clients and their users. They leverage industry-leading tools and expertise to resolve complex issues, prevent future problems, and improve client IT environments.

This role is perfect for someone who enjoys solving challenging technical problems while also designing and implementing improvements that make a real impact.



Key Responsibilities:



Client Support (All Levels)



Provide technical support to clients via phone,
, and remote access—handling everything from basic troubleshooting to advanced escalations.

Diagnose and resolve hardware, software, and network issues for multiple clients.

Perform O365 and Windows administration, user account management, and access provisioning.

Support and troubleshoot VOIP systems (e.g., 3CX).

Manage and maintain RMM and PSA tools (e.g., Datto, Halo).

Mentor junior engineers and provide guidance to improve team troubleshooting skills.





Projects & Innovation



Lead or assist with IT projects, e.g cloud migrations, system upgrades, deployments, and process automation etc.

Identify and implement solutions to reduce recurring issues and improve efficiency.

Develop and maintain PowerShell scripts to automate routine tasks and streamline operations.

Collaborate with vendors and clients to plan, test, and deliver new IT solutions.



Documentation & Communication



Log issues and resolutions accurately for future reference.

Communicate effectively with clients and vendors to ensure smooth resolutions and project delivery.



Requirements



Previous experience working in an MSP environment is a plus.

Excellent communication skills – able to have comfortable, friendly conversations in English without being overly formal or technical.

Strong attention to detail and follow-through – “never let it go until it’s solved.”

Demonstrable experience working with Windows systems (client/server) and O365 administration.

Proficiency in advanced troubleshooting methodologies.

Scripting skills, particularly in PowerShell, to automate tasks and improve efficiency.

Experience with VOIP systems and a solid understanding of network infrastructure.

Familiarity with RMM and PSA platforms used in MSP environments (e.g., Datto, Halo).

We are heavy users of Office 365 and Azure, so you’ll need to have solid experience and know the fundamentals or demonstrate skills in something very similar..

Ability to handle difficult tasks, set proper expectations, and deliver solutions within a reasonable timeframe.

Out-of-the-box thinker – proactive, creative, and always looking to improve processes.

Willingness to go the extra mile to ensure client satisfaction.

Ability to “figure things out,” even when facing new or unfamiliar technologies.

Mentor junior engineers and provide guidance to improve team troubleshooting skills.





Projects & Innovation



Lead or assist with IT projects, e.g cloud migrations, system upgrades, deployments, and process automation etc.

Identify and implement solutions to reduce recurring issues and improve efficiency.

Develop and maintain PowerShell scripts to automate routine tasks and streamline operations.

Collaborate with vendors and clients to plan, test, and deliver new IT solutions.



Documentation & Communication



Log issues and resolutions accurately for future reference.

Communicate effectively with clients and vendors to ensure smooth resolutions and project delivery.



Requirements



Previous experience working in an MSP environment is a plus.

Excellent communication skills – able to have comfortable, friendly conversations in English without being overly formal or technical.

Strong attention to detail and follow-through – “never let it go until it’s solved.”

Demonstrable experience working with Windows systems (client/server) and O365 administration.

Proficiency in advanced troubleshooting methodologies.

Scripting skills, particularly in PowerShell, to automate tasks and improve efficiency.

Experience with VOIP systems and a solid understanding of network infrastructure.

Familiarity with RMM and PSA platforms used in MSP environments (e.g., Datto, Halo).

We are heavy users of Office 365 and Azure, so you’ll need to have solid experience and know the fundamentals or demonstrate skills in something very similar..

Ability to handle difficult tasks, set proper expectations, and deliver solutions within a reasonable timeframe.

Out-of-the-box thinker – proactive, creative, and always looking to improve processes.

Willingness to go the extra mile to ensure client satisfaction.

Ability to “figure things out,” even when facing new or unfamiliar technologies.

title: Content & Production Coordinator (Live Shows & Podcast | Remote)
description:
Content & Production Coordinator (Live Shows & Podcast)

Full-time | Remote | CST hours



Take note: This is a FULL-TIME role, so if you're looking for an additional work on top of your current employment, this might not be the best fit for you.



We’re looking for a highly organized Content & Production Coordinator to manage guest coordination, show preparation, and backend execution across multiple weekly live shows and a podcast.



What You’ll Do

• Coordinate guest booking, scheduling, and onboarding

• Manage production calendars for 5 weekly live shows + 1 podcast

• Prepare show assets (scripts, slides, graphics coordination)

• Set up and manage live broadcasts (e.g. Streamyard)

• Support live shows (timing, transitions, backend execution)

• Organize files, workflows, and recurring processes

• Coordinate post-production and content publishing



?



What We’re Looking For

• 2+ years experience in coordination, production, or project management roles

• Experience supporting podcasts, live shows, or content production workflows is required

• Strong organizational and time management skills

• Comfortable managing multiple recurring deadlines

• Clear and professional English communication

• Familiar with tools like Google Drive, Calendly, ClickUp, or similar

Please answer the screening questions below along with your updated resume.

5. How do you ensure accuracy and consistency when handling repetitive weekly tasks like show prep and scheduling?

title: Backend Developer. Geospatial / Mapping App
description:
THE PROJECT



We're building a map-first mobile exploration app for the Australian market. The real-world travel becomes a mapped, gamified, shareable journey.



The frontend is built in React Native (Expo). The map renderer is Mapbox. We have a detailed data architecture spec and a two-layer mapping data strategy ready to implement. The frontend developer is actively building screens.



We need a backend developer who specialises in geospatial data to build the engine from the ground up. The backend is greenfield, no legacy code, no existing database to inherit. You're building it clean from a detailed spec.



---



WHAT YOU'LL BUILD



- PostgreSQL database with PostGIS, full schema design and implementation for users, locations, challenges, badges, journeys, and social content

- Mapbox Search Box API integration, civilisation layer (fuel, food, accommodation, services, entertainment) served via live API calls

- OpenStreetMap + government data import adventure layer (campgrounds, lookouts, trails, dump points, rest areas, national parks) bulk imported from OSM extracts and Australian government open data sources into PostGIS

- RESTful API layer endpoints for map queries (nearby POIs, bounding box searches, category filtering, route data), user auth, challenge management, badge logic, journey tracking

- Spatial query optimisation, efficient indexing and query patterns for serving map tile data to a mobile client at speed

- Mapbox integration, Map Matching API for road-snapped routes, static map previews for sharing, coordinate handling between client and server

- Auth system,
, Google, and Apple sign-in

- Object storage setup, Cloudflare R2 for images, avatars, and media storage

- WebSocket layer, real-time messaging and notifications (
 or equivalent)

- Deployment on Render, backend hosting, environment management, CI/CD pipeline



---



TECH STACK



Required:

- PostgreSQL + PostGIS (non-negotiable, the entire data architecture is designed for this)

- Node.js / Express or equivalent backend framework

- Experience importing and working with OpenStreetMap data or government geospatial datasets

- Spatial query design, bounding box, radius search, nearest-neighbour, geometry operations

- REST API design for mobile clients

- Git workflow (GitHub)



Preferred:

- Mapbox GL JS / Mapbox APIs

- React Native (Expo) understanding of mobile client needs

- Cloudflare R2 or S3-compatible object storage

- Render or similar PaaS deployment

- OAuth2 / social login implementation

- WebSocket experience (
)



---



WHAT WE PROVIDE



- Detailed data architecture specification (database schema, import pipeline, API endpoints, category taxonomy all documented)

- Mapbox style configuration (custom dark satellite theme, ready to use)

- Frontend developer building screens in parallel ready to wire up as endpoints become available

- Product Director available daily for decisions and direction

- Clear scope, clear priorities, no ambiguity



---



ENGAGEMENT STRUCTURE



- Type: Contract. initial 6-8 week engagement with potential to extend. 

- Start: Immediate

- Working style: Remote, async-friendly, but must overlap with Australian Eastern time for at least 2-3 hours daily for check-ins. Front end dev located in PH.

- Communication: WhatsApp + GitHub



---



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



Sprint 1: PostgreSQL/PostGIS stood up on Render. Auth working. Core schema deployed. First OSM data import running. Mapbox Search Box API wired for civilisation layer.



Sprint 2: API endpoints serving location data to the mobile app. Map queries performing well. Challenges and badge logic implemented.



Sprint 3: Journey tracking, social features, and real-time messaging wired up. Frontend fully connected to live backend.



Sprint 4: Integration testing, performance tuning, beta-readiness.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Send us:

1. A brief intro, who you are, where you're based, your availability

2. Examples of previous work with PostGIS or geospatial data (this is the most important thing, show us you've done spatial work before)

3. Your rate (hourly or weekly)

4. How quickly you can start



---



We're not looking for a generalist who "can probably figure out PostGIS." We need someone who's already built with it. If you've imported OSM data, written spatial queries, or built a mapping backend before, we want to hear from you.

description:

 Nice to Have
