title: Real Estate Social media strategiest
description:
Social Media and Digital Marketing Operations

About Me: I am a seasoned real estate agent in Los Angeles, California.

Your Role: You will manage my complete digital presence across YouTube, Instagram,
, LinkedIn,
, Google Business, and paid advertising channels, plus blog content development. You will create short-form content from listing videos, develop cohesive marketing strategies that showcase properties and build my personal brand as an agent.

Responsibilities: Developing and executing a 30–60–90 day account growth strategy targeting defined client avatars — luxury sellers age 50+ and second-generation affluent Asian buyers age 20–35. Creating and managing content calendars, editing video content from listing materials and creating short-form clips for all platforms, scheduling posts across all channels, automating workflows, optimizing Google Business and LinkedIn profiles, managing paid ad campaigns, create and manage
 blast campaign. leveraging AI tools for content enhancement, monitoring analytics, and providing strategic recommendations based on market trends and performance data.

4 posts/week Instagram

• 2 Reels minimum

-1 Story every day

-1 Weekly
 Newsletter on Friday. Timely
 campaign for open houses

• Weekly YouTube upload

-Optimize posting time

What We Need: Strong knowledge of social media platforms, scheduling and automation tools, video editing software, AI productivity tools, and blogging platforms. Real estate market understanding is essential, or ability to quickly develop fluency by studying successful agent content.

The Right Fit: Self-directed, detail-oriented, comfortable working independently in a fast-paced environment. This is a long-term, stable position.

Success Metrics — 30, 60, 90 Day Plan: Follower growth. Listing video views increasing monthly. Private inquiries tracked and reported weekly.CKPIs (How You’ll Be Measured) Content Performance — average video views per post, Reel plays, and YouTube watch time increasing month over month.

Engagement Rate — likes, comments, shares, and saves as a percentage of followers. A healthy target for real estate is two to three percent.

Google Business — profile views, click-through rates, and direction requests growing monthly.

Lead Generation — number of direct messages, profile link clicks, and contact form submissions tracked weekly.

Content Consistency — hitting the posting schedule with zero missed weeks, maintaining the four-post weekly cadence.

Paid Ad Performance — cost per click and cost per lead decreasing as campaigns are optimized over time.

YouTube — subscriber growth and average watch duration improving monthly.

To Apply: Please send your resume and a portfolio with social media content and videos you have created.

title: Influencer Marketing Role | Direct Client |PH / Morning Shift
description:
Who Are We?

Nordic Quality is an extremely awesome, up-and-coming, online-based company selling physical products under several of our brands. The main one of which is in the gym and fitness category.



Who are we looking for?

We are looking for an Influencer Marketing Manager with some familiarity in Social Media Management to play a crucial role at Nordic Quality, a company specializing in gym equipment and weight-lifting products. This role involves managing and expanding partnerships with fitness influencers, as well as overseeing the brand’s social media presence across platforms like Instagram, TikTok, and
. The ideal candidate is passionate about health and fitness, stays up to date with social media trends, and has experience building engaging content and communities in the gym and weightlifting space.



WHAT WOULD THE TASK BE?



-Build all processes for acquiring new digital influencers, as well as maintaining existing ones.

-Identifying the most relevant influencers in the industry on major and minor social media channels such as YouTube,
, Instagram, Slickdeals, etc., by doing research and/ or using tools.

Form relationships with influencers before asking them to advocate for the products or the company in general.

- Persuade digital influencers to promote our products with little to no upfront cost;

- Ensure that all possible measures have been taken to retain existing influencers.

- Establish a Sponsored Athlete Program, affiliate programs, and partnerships with influencers, and manage everything related to these.

- Set up and take charge of activities surrounding the Influencer page on the company website;

- Boost the brand's online presence on relevant forums/message boards by responding to comments and subtly promoting our products.

- Lead the department dedicated to influencer marketing, once set up, and collaborate with other team members of other departments whenever necessary.

- Come up with a marketing plan/strategy on a weekly/monthly basis (work alongside the marketing manager to do this, especially for our product promotions);

- Tally UGCs for content posting on social media, including Instagram,
, YouTube, and TikTok.

- Social Media Management: Plan, coordinate, and schedule social media content on
, Instagram, and TikTok at least two weeks (14 days) in advance while also managing real-time updates and promotional posts in collaboration with the Marketing team/Marketing Assistant to keep calendars accurate, timely, and aligned with campaign priorities.

- Manage some Amazon Ads or work on other Amazon-related tasks in Amazon US, Amazon UK, and Amazon Japan (using ChatGPT whenever needed);

- Create an attribute link for promotions and influencers and analyze them as part of the KPI every month.

- Create and manage campaigns and influencers on Amazon Creator Connections regularly.

- Create and maintain updated SOPs for the Influencer Team.

- Regularly review existing SOPs and make adjustments as needed.

- Other related tasks or tasks in the marketing department.

- Slack (communication tool) visibility during the contractor’s working hours.



Qualifications:

- Proven experience in lead generation, influencer outreach, and social media management. Preferably in the e-commerce or fitness industry (but not necessarily)

- Familiarity with lead generation tools and CRM systems (is a plus!)

- Strong written and verbal communication skills.

-Has experience with Canva

- Has an interest in creating compelling social media posts

- Ability to multitask, prioritize tasks, and meet deadlines.

- Knowledge of basic marketing principles and techniques.

- Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.



You must also have the following;

- With a perfectly working device (additional backup is a plus)

- With a reliable internet connection (additional backup is required)

- Headphones/earphones (for meetings)



HOW TO APPLY?

Congratulations on making it this far in the job application process! Interested? We'd be delighted to hear from you.

Please carefully follow all of the instructions below to send an application:



1. Use the following as the subject of your message:

Influencer Marketing - (Insert Your Full Name Here)

Example: Influencer Marketing - Maria Santos



2. Cover Letter - The body of your message will serve as your cover letter, so discuss your experience and persuade me to add you to the team while highlighting your writing abilities.



3 The link to your CV/ resume (strictly with your picture)





Thank you & Best of luck!

Set up and monitor
 drip campaigns, action plans, and multi-channel follow-up sequences

s responded to within 4 business hours; urgent matters flagged and escalated immediately

title: Online Arbitrage (OA) Sourcer - Amazon Germany
description:
Compensation: $5.00 USD / Hour (~€4.50 EUR / 50,000 PHP Monthly) + Performance Bonuses

Location: Fully Remote

Schedule: Monday to Friday, Flexible Hours

Employment Type: Full-time

Pay Frequency: Bi-Weekly

 

Job Overview

We're hiring an experienced Online Arbitrage (OA) Sourcer for a growing Amazon FBA business based in Germany currently doing €60-80K/month in revenue. Sourcing is your primary job, the majority of your time will be spent finding and evaluating profitable leads on a consistent daily basis. If you're someone who's great at sourcing and can work independently without being micromanaged, this role is for you.

 

Responsibilities?

Source profitable OA leads daily using Keepa and seller storefronts

Evaluate leads using sales rank history, price trends, offer counts, and margin analysis before submitting

Hit daily and monthly spend targets with minimal supervision (starting goal: €10K/month)

Work confidently with German product listings using Chrome translator and AI tools to verify product details and sizing

Keep lead quality consistent and make sure submitted leads meet the criteria set by management

Flag and inform management of any red flags such as sudden price drops, spiking offer counts, or anything that could affect lead quality or account health

Bring your own sourcing approach to the table, if something works better than what we're doing, we want to know

 

Requirements

2+ years of hands-on OA sourcing experience for Amazon FBA

Strong proficiency with Keepa, able to read charts and predict where price and offer count are heading

Knows how buy box rotation works and how FBA vs FBM affects it

Able to spot red flags right away such as brands selling on their own listing, misbranded products, and IP complaint-prone items

Experience using Seller Amp (SAS) or similar tools for profit and ROI calculations

Experience with multiple sourcing methods such as storefront stalking, reverse sourcing, and brand sourcing

Able to use Keepa Product Finder with the right filters to find leads from scratch

Knows how to use coupon code extensions and newsletter signups to maximize discounts when sourcing

Able to estimate rough profitability without a tool, just from the buy box price and buy cost

Comfortable working with non-English listings using translation tools and AI

Self-directed: you show up, do the work, and don't need someone checking in on you constantly

Reliable internet connection and a distraction-free work setup

 

Nice to Have (Not Required)

Experience sourcing specifically for Amazon European marketplaces

Familiarity with German product categories and seasonal trends



To Apply


/4uUUJMS

All we do is scam people so if you want to work and not get paid this is the place to be.

Responsibilities:



Answer inbound calls and make outbound follow-ups.



Gather customer information and moving details.



Provide excellent customer service with fluent, confident English communication.



Transition into a closer role to handle complete sales calls and secure bookings.

Qualifications:



Fluent in spoken and written English (clear and natural accent required).



Strong communication and listening skills.



Sales background preferred but not required (training provided).



Must have a reliable computer, stable internet connection, and quiet workspace.



Motivated, coachable, and eager to grow into a closer role.

Shift 1: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM (1-hour lunch break)



Shift 2: 3:00 PM – 12:00 Midnight (1-hour lunch break)



Compensation & Benefits:



Base Pay: PHP 31,000 monthly



Commission: 5% per sale – top performers can earn up to PHP 240,000 monthly total (base + commissions)



PLEASE SUBMIT A VOICE RECORIDNG EXPLAINING YOUR WORK AND SALES EXPERIENCE, YOUR CURRENT WORK STATUS AND AVAILABILITY.



Daily training and support provided via Zoom



Referral program: We are hiring 50 people in total – if you have fluent English-speaking friends, you are encouraged to refer them

title: Online English/World History Teachers (Near-Native Accent)
description:
bout Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, offering individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced near-native English-speaking online teachers with strong backgrounds in English and/or World History. Candidates may specialize in one subject (English or History) or be able to teach both. The ideal teachers will have experience working with young learners and be committed to creating a supportive and engaging online classroom.



Responsibilities

• Provide instruction in English and/or World History to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

• Utilize international-standard curricula.

• Create and deliver engaging lesson plans tailored to each student’s needs.

• Monitor and assess student progress, providing regular feedback to students and parents.

• Foster a positive and encouraging learning environment.



Qualifications

• Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12) and verifiable teaching certifications such as TESOL, TEFL, etc.

• Near-native English accent.

• Strong academic background in English and/or World History (additional experience in Science/Economics is a plus).

• Ability to work between 17:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 09:00–22:00 (Weekends) GMT+8.

• Experience teaching in public/international schools.

• Skilled at working with young learners aged 5–18

• Familiarity with ClassIn and digital literacy (Microsoft Suite and other educational platforms).

• Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10/Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits

• Flexible working hours.

• Opportunity to teach using internationally recognized curricula.

• Work with an international team of educators.

• Professional development and training opportunities.

• Regular enrollment system (not booking-based), ensuring a stable and consistent teaching schedule.

* Support cloud platforms,
 systems, and business applications

 troubleshooting (Outlook, Gmail)

title: Sales and Live Stream Associate
description:
Position: Sales and Live Stream Associate (Japan Operations)

Location: Remote

Salary: PhP 25,000 / month (Fixed)

Employment Type: Full-time

Working Hours: 10 AM to 7 PM JST, 5 days a week



ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a high-energy, persuasive Sales and Live Stream Associate to join our team. You will be the "on-camera" face of our refurbished gadget business in Japan, specifically targeting the OFW market. While the product videos are prepared by our Japan team, your job is to "sell" them by bringing life to the specs, engaging with the audience, and converting viewers into buyers.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

• Live Sales Presentation: Host "Video Live" events using pre-recorded footage. You will provide the face-to-camera commentary, highlight gadget "flexes" (specs, condition, price), and maintain high energy to keep the audience engaged.

• Active Engagement: Monitor and reply to every comment during and after the live sessions. You are responsible for the "vibe" of the comment section.

• Sales Conversion (The Close): Proactively message customers who expressed interest. You will handle inquiries in the DMs, explain gadget conditions, and close the sale.

• Customer Support & Sales Admin: Assist with general customer service inquiries and coordinate with the team to ensure buyer information (address, contact details) is accurately recorded for shipping.



QUALIFICATIONS

• On-Camera Personality: You are charismatic, articulate in Tagalog/English, and can sell with confidence.

• Sales Drive: 1–2 years of experience in Sales or Customer Service. You must be comfortable "asking for the sale" and following up with leads.

• Gadget Knowledge: Basic understanding of smartphone and laptop specs (e.g., Battery Health, SSD vs HDD, RAM).

• Resilience: Ability to handle a fast-paced environment and manage multiple customer chats simultaneously.



WHY JOIN US

You’ll be a vital part of a streamlined team working directly with a Japan-based company. This role offers a guaranteed monthly service fee (not commission-based) and a remote work environment. You won't just be a voiceover; you will be the face and driver of our sales.



TO APPLY

Please send the following via OLJ message:

• Updated Resume (PDF preferred).

• A 1-Minute Sample Video: Use your phone to "sell" the phone you are currently holding. Show us your energy, how you "flex" the features, and how you’d invite a customer to "Mine" it.

• Screenshot of your current internet speed test.

• Photo of your work-from-home setup.

Upload the above in your cloud service provider (OneDrive, Google Drive, Dropbox, etc.) of choosing.

title: AI Video Editor for Ecommerce Ads (Higgsfield, CapCut, ElevenLabs)
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce company producing high-converting video ads for DTC brands in industries such as supplements, footwear, and lifestyle products.



We are looking to hire 2 AI Video Editors to start immediately by the end of this week.



The ideal candidate can create extremely realistic AI-generated video ads that are indistinguishable from real footage, with strong editing and creative skills for direct-response advertising.



This role is ideal for someone who understands performance marketing, high-volume creative production, and AI video generation tools.





What You'll Do

• Produce 20–50 fully AI-generated video ads per week for multiple ecommerce brands

• Create AI talking heads, UGC-style ads, and b-roll scenes using advanced AI tools

• Edit and assemble all video content in CapCut with expert-level precision

• Analyze competitor ads on Meta Ads Library and Google to develop high-converting ad variations

• Concept, build, and iterate multiple creative angles and hooks that drive conversions

• Assist with script refinement or hook optimization when needed (scripts usually provided)





What We're Looking For

• Proven experience creating AI-generated video ads for DTC ecommerce brands

• Strong proficiency with AI tools such as Higgsfield and ElevenLabs

• Expert-level CapCut editing skills with a strong portfolio

• Ability to create extremely realistic AI visuals of people, products, and environments

• Strong understanding of direct-response ad creative and what makes ads convert

• Ability to work independently and produce high-volume creative output





Nice to Have

• Experience with Midjourney, Runway, Kling, or Sora

• Familiarity with Meta Ads Library or competitor research tools

• Experience creating UGC-style ads for paid social





Role Details

• Part-time role (32 hours per week)

• Flexible schedule Monday–Saturday

• Remote position

• We are hiring 2 editors immediately and expect onboarding by the end of this week





How to Apply

To confirm you read this entire post, start your application with the phrase:



AICreator492



Then answer the following questions:



1. Walk us through your workflow for creating a fully AI-generated UGC-style video ad from start to finish. From receiving a script to delivering the final edit in CapCut. 

2. Which AI tools do you currently use for video generation, image generation, and voice generation? Rate your proficiency with each tool (beginner / intermediate / advanced). 

3. How do you ensure that AI-generated talking heads and visuals look realistic enough to be used in paid ads? What techniques or tools do you use to avoid the typical "AI look"? 

4. When analyzing competitor ads for inspiration, what specific elements do you look for that indicate high conversion potential? 

5. How long does it take you to create a single 25-second short-form video ad that is fully AI-generated, from start to finished edit? 

6. Please share your portfolio of extremely realistic AI-generated ecommerce video ads that demonstrate your ability to create converting content.





If you're passionate about AI video creation, performance marketing, and high-volume creative production, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Funnel and marketing strategist
description:
We are looking for a high-level Marketing Strategist for our performance marketing agency.



This is not a basic VA role.

This is not just a content or creative role.

This is for someone who understands marketing strategy as a whole — from angles and ad concepts to funnels, lead forms, conversion flow, and follow-up logic.



You will work closely with:



our founders

our media buyer

our creative designer

and sometimes directly with clients



Your job is to look at the full marketing system and improve it.



That means understanding:



what offer should be pushed

what angle should be tested

what message fits which audience

where the funnel is breaking

and what should be changed next



We mainly work with SaaS and some e-commerce brands.



What you’ll do

Develop marketing angles, campaign concepts, and testing hypotheses

Turn market research and competitor insights into clear strategic direction

Help shape offers, messaging, and funnel positioning

Connect ads to the right funnel stage and customer awareness level

Review performance data with our media buyer and d
 what to iterate next

Guide our creative designer with clear strategic input

Analyze competitor ads, funnels, positioning, and messaging

Spot whether the problem is in the ad, hook, offer, landing page, lead form, funnel logic, or follow-up

Monitor funnel performance and identify drop-off points

Improve lead form logic and qualification flow

Review campaigns and funnels before launch

Translate data and observations into a clear action plan

This role is for you if…

You understand marketing strategy beyond just ads

You know how offers, messaging, funnels, and follow-up all affect results

You can diagnose problems instead of guessing

You can look at performance and d
 what should happen next

You think in terms of customer journey, not isolated tasks

You can lead strategic direction for both creatives and funnel improvements

You are proactive, sharp, and independent

You care about business results, not just ideas

Requirements



You must have strong experience with most of the following:



Marketing strategy

Funnel strategy

Offer positioning

Messaging and angle development

Direct-response thinking

Competitor research

Ad strategy

Landing page logic

Lead form logic

Conversion flow analysis

Performance analysis and iteration

Working with designers and media buyers

Client communication

Strong bonus if you have experience with:

SaaS marketing

B2B lead generation

E-commerce direct response

Meta ads

Sales funnels

WhatsApp or follow-up flows

Diagnosing lead quality issues

Improving conversion rates across the funnel

Who is not a fit



This is not for you if:



you only know graphic design

you only know copywriting

you only know media buying

you need step-by-step instructions all the time

you cannot explain why a strategy should work

you only suggest “test more creatives” without deeper thinking

you do not understand funnels and conversion logic

What we care about most



We do not want average.

We want someone who can think like a strategist.



You should be able to answer questions like:



What is the real bottleneck in this funnel?

Is the issue the ad, the offer, the lead form, or the follow-up?

What should we test first, and why?

Which competitor patterns are worth reacting to?

What message fits this audience best?

Where in the customer journey are we losing people?

Communication



You must have:



excellent English

strong written communication

clear strategic thinking

confidence in giving recommendations



Hours



Flexible depending on fit, but we are looking for someone long-term who can become an important part of our team.



Pay



$9–$18/hour, depending on experience and level.



We will pay more for someone who is truly strong.



To apply



Send us a message with:



Your best 3 examples of work relevant to this role

A short explanation of a funnel or marketing problem you diagnosed and how you solved it

Your answer to this question:

If a campaign gets clicks but poor lead quality, what are the first 3 things you check and why?

Your answer to this question:

How do you d
 whether a problem comes from the ad, the offer, the landing page, the lead form, or the follow-up?

Put the words “Blue Funnel” in the first line of your application so we know you read everything



Applications without detailed answers will be ignored.

title: Senior Analytics Engineer / Data Engineer for E-commerce BI Project (BigQuery / dbt / Airbyte)
description:
Hi there!



I run a growing e-commerce business where around 90% of revenue and day-to-day operations are Amazon-focused. I also sell on eBay and via our own brand website, but Amazon is the core engine.



I am looking for an Analytics Engineer / Data Engineer to take over an existing BI project for my e-commerce business. My current BI freelancer has been absent for an extended period due to illness, so I am now looking for someone who can step in, understand the current setup, and complete the project.



This is not a project starting from zero. A large part of the foundation is already built. This is a hands-on build role for someone who can combine technical execution with practical business thinking. After the initial project is completed, there will be ongoing work, maintenance, and new projects. The intention is for the right person to become an embedded part of my company, not just a temporary freelancer.



CURRENT PROJECT STATUS



Milestone 1 is approximately 80% complete already.



What is already done:

• Amazon APIs are connected through Airbyte

• We use dbt on my local TrueNAS system

• Historical Amazon data has been cleaned and imported into BigQuery

• The warehouse foundation is largely in place



What still needs to be done first:

• Import the remaining Amazon ads data

• Finish an accurate P&L model

• Validate outputs against the current business logic



So I am looking for someone who can take over the project, not someone who only wants to start from zero.



BUDGET AND LONG-TERM OPPORTUNITY



For the initial project, I am offering the same pay structure already agreed for this build (see pay per milestone below). Additional contingency buffer: $500 for extra work if needed and agreed.



After the initial project is finished, there will be ongoing maintenance and new BI projects.



For that longer-term work, the hourly rate will be in the range of $6 to $10 USD/hour depending on experience, reliability, and ownership.



I am not looking for a temporary freelancer only. I want the right person to become an embedded part of my company. As the business grows, the plan is to increase hours, responsibility, ownership and pay. 



CURRENT STACK



• Airbyte for ingestion

• Google BigQuery as warehouse

• dbt for transformations and KPI logic

• Looker Studio or similar for dashboards

• Google Sheets only for manual inputs where needed



PROJECT DESCRIPTION AND MILESTONES



Milestone 1: Foundation + Amazon Replacement



Timeline: ~3–4 weeks

Budget allocation: $400



• Channel-agnostic warehouse foundation

• Amazon fully implemented end-to-end (sales, ads, fees, core profit KPIs)

• dbt models as the single source of truth

• Full replacement of my current Amazon Google Sheets logic

• Side-by-side validation against existing Sheets



Milestone 2: Multi-Channel Ingestion



Timeline: ~2–3 weeks

Budget allocation: $300



• WooCommerce ingestion (orders, refunds, products)

• eBay ingestion (orders, fees, refunds)

• All channels mapped into the same schema as Amazon

• KPIs reused from Phase 1 (no duplicate logic, no redesign later)



Milestone 3: Cross-Channel KPIs and Dashboards



Timeline: ~1–2 weeks

Budget allocation: $200



• Cross-channel KPI tables (Amazon vs Woo vs eBay)

• Looker Studio dashboards built on curated dbt models

• No business logic in dashboards



Milestone 4: Product Matching, Currency and Handover



Timeline: ~1 week

Budget allocation: $100



• Product matching across Amazon, WooCommerce, and eBay

• Currency handling implemented in the warehouse

• Lightweight documentation and final walkthrough



The goal is that by the end of Phase 2, Amazon, WooCommerce, and eBay all feed into the same warehouse model, with KPIs defined once and reusable for future platforms without rework.



WHAT I'M LOOKING FOR

• Strong SQL skills

• Strong data modeling skills

• Experience with BigQuery

• Experience with dbt

• Experience with ELT / ETL pipelines

• Able to take over and improve an existing setup

• Practical and cost-conscious

• Able to explain things clearly

• Reliable and organized



NICE TO HAVE

• E-commerce analytics experience

• Amazon data experience

• Ads data and P&L experience

• Looker Studio experience

• Experience replacing spreadsheet reporting with a proper warehouse setup



NOT A FIT IF

• You are a VA or data-entry profile

• You only build dashboards

• You put business logic inside BI tools or spreadsheets

• You prefer over-engineered or expensive SaaS-heavy setups

• You only want a very short freelance project



CONFIDENTIALITY

You will have access to confidential company data, including sales data, financial data, advertising data, product data, and internal metrics.



All data, models, transformations, dashboards, and project outputs created during this work remain the exclusive property of my company.



TO APPLY, PLEASE ANSWER

1. What experience do you have with BigQuery, dbt, and Airbyte?

2. Have you ever taken over a partially completed BI or data project before?

3. How would you approach reviewing and completing an existing setup like this?

4. What is your expected timeline for finishing the remaining work?

5. What hourly rate would you want for ongoing work after the initial project?



Please keep your reply clear and concise.



Thanks in advance for your application.



Cheers,

Friso

title: Project Manager / Account Executive
description:
Project Manager / Account Executive

Part-time · Remote-friendly · Freelance-Led Agency



???? About this role

I'm a freelance creative director who runs my own agency — meaning I lead every client relationship, every campaign strategy, and every creative decision personally. This is not a large corporate setup. It's tight, intentional, and close to the work.



I'm bringing someone in to work directly under me in a close mentorship dynamic. You'll see how campaigns are built from brief to execution, how clients are managed, and how a creative agency thinks — because I'll be walking you through it. In return, I need someone I can rely on to hold the operational side together while I focus on the creative and strategic work.



???? What you'll do

Working closely with me day-to-day, you will manage timelines and deadlines across active client accounts, coordinate with the design and video team to make sure they have what they need and when they need it, track project progress and flag anything at risk before it becomes a problem, assist in preparing and distributing creative briefs based on my direction, handle scheduling and basic coordination with client contacts, and keep our project management workspace clean and up to date.



You won't be making creative or strategic calls independently — I'll be leading and guiding you. Your job is to make sure everything I set in motion actually lands on time and nothing slips.



You'll only be in charge of 1 client for now and depending on performance, there will be a discussion of an increment of retainer and also clients. 



???? Who this suits

- You have at least 1.5 years of experience in marketing — this is a firm requirement. 

- You understand how social media content works, what a creative brief is, and why deadlines matter in a campaign environment. 

- Agency experience is preferred and will be weighted strongly, but if you come from a brand, content, or marketing team and you're sharp and organised, we'd still like to hear from you.

- You're someone who learns well under mentorship, follows direction precisely, communicates early when something's unclear, and takes pride in keeping things running smoothly behind the scenes. 

- You don't need the spotlight — you're the person who makes sure the person in the spotlight never drops the ball.



???? Working arrangement

Part-time to start, around 15–18 hours per week. Remote-friendly. You'll be onboarded closely — and most of the work dynamic will be on regular calls and check in.  The time stated is an average, however I doubt we will be utilising 3 hours/day - it depends on how fast you do since it's coordination work + basic/daily check in.



???? To apply

Send a  short introductory -  a paragraph
 to 
 with the subject titled [ACCOUNT EXECUTIVE] covering: your marketing background and what kind of work you've handled, whether you've worked with or alongside a creative team before, and how you prefer to receive direction. Please include your portfolio (we'll be prioritising candidates with portfolio)



Please note this will be a retainer role suitable for people who already have basic digital marketing skills with a strong marketing sense.

title: Game Developer (Arcade / Casino Games)
description:
We're a fast-moving startup building engaging, high-quality game experiences with a focus on arcade and casino-style gameplay. Our team is small, highly autonomous, and obsessed with shipping quickly. We believe in leveraging modern tools including AI/LLMs to accelerate development, iterate rapidly, and stay ahead of the curve.



We're looking for a Game Developer who can take ideas from concept ? prototype ? production with minimal oversight. You'll be responsible for building polished, performant games while working independently or within a very small team. This is a high-ownership role where speed, creativity, and execution matter.



What You'll Do

- Build and ship arcade / casino-style games (slots, mini-games, etc.)

- Rapidly prototype and iterate on gameplay mechanics

- Own the full development lifecycle: design ? development ? testing ? deployment

- Collaborate on game design, UX, and player engagement strategies

- Optimize performance across devices (primarily mobile)

- Leverage AI/LLMs to accelerate development and improve workflows

- Continuously refine gameplay based on feedback and metrics



What We're Looking For

- Experience building games (arcade, casual, or casino-style preferred)

- Strong proficiency in Unity (or similar engines like Unreal, Godot, etc.)

- Solid understanding of game mechanics, physics, and UI/UX

- Ability to work independently and ship quickly with minimal guidance

- Experience using AI tools / LLMs to improve development speed and productivity

- Strong problem-solving skills and bias toward action

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced startup environment



Nice to Have

- Experience with slot mechanics, RNG systems, or reward loops

- Background in game design or player psychology

- Experience shipping games to App Store / Play Store

- Familiarity with backend systems (leaderboards, in-game economy, etc.)

- Experience with monetization strategies (ads, IAPs)



What Makes This Role Exciting

- High ownership - you'll directly shape the product

- Fast iteration cycles - no red tape, just building

- Work at the intersection of gaming + AI

- Fully remote with flexible working hours

- Work on products that reach real users quickly

title: Amazon Account VA
description:
We are seeking a highly organized, commercially minded Amazon Brand Manager to take end-to-end ownership of our Amazon account health, listings and reimbursements. The role is central to ensuring operational excellence across Amazon marketplaces while coordinating closely with our internal team for PPC and graphic design, to ensure all assets are in place for successful product launches and ongoing listing performance.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



1. Inventory & Supply Chain



Ensure no stockouts on top SKUs

Manage demand planning and reorders

Coordinate with suppliers and freight forwarders

Maintain clean tracking of inventory



2. Amazon Account Management



Manage listings, variations, and backend issues

Handle cases and resolve account problems

Maintain account health and listing accuracy



3. PPC & Performance Monitoring



Monitor ad performance (TACOS, CVR, CPC)

Identify inefficiencies and improvement opportunities

Maintain overall account performance



4. Data & Reporting



Maintain accurate daily and monthly reporting

Track key KPIs

Highlight anomalies early



STRATEGIC RESPONSIBILITIES (HIGH IMPACT)



1. International Expansion



Launch products into new marketplaces (EU, UK, etc.)

Handle localization (listings, keywords, compliance)

Coordinate inventory and logistics

Monitor and optimize performance



2. Listing Optimization & Growth



Run structured A/B tests on images, titles, and content

Analyze conversion rate and performance changes

Work with designers to improve listings



3. Product Launch Support



Coordinate new product launches

Ensure listings, inventory, and ads are aligned

Track performance and iterate



4. Business Ownership



Identify problems without being told

Propose solutions and take action

Take ownership of outcomes



Systems & Process Improvement



Build SOPs

Reduce inefficiencies

Improve operational reliability



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



No stockouts on top products

Problems solved before escalation

Clean and accurate reporting

Continuous improvement in listings and ads

Reduced founder involvement



REQUIREMENTS



Experience with Amazon Seller Central

Strong attention to detail

High ownership mindset

Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills

Good written English

Ability to work independently



STRONG PREFERENCE



Inventory planning and forecasting experience

Experience working with Chinese suppliers

Experience launching products or marketplaces

Strong analytical thinking

AI-Literate

title: AI Automations (Crypto + Full Stack Developer) — Long-Term Role
description:
Long-term role working directly with the founder of multiple crypto-focused social media brands. You're not learning AI automations, you're already deep in it.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

— Build and ship multi-agent AI automations for content, social media, and trading workflows

— Architect agent pipelines using OpenClaw (AgentSkills, ClawHub, multi-agent routing, cron workflows)

— Scrape, monitor, and automate X/Twitter using Xquik, Playwright, Browser Use, or custom CDP setups

— Integrate and orchestrate LLMs via API (Anthropic, OpenAI, DeepSeek, Kimi, local models)

— Build real-time data pipelines: webhook listeners, WebSocket feeds, event-driven automations



MUST-HAVES:

— Hands-on OpenClaw experience (Gateway, SKILL.md authoring, ClawHub, multi-channel routing)

— Multi-agent orchestration (CrewAI, LangChain, LangGraph, or custom)

— MCP servers and tool-use patterns

— X/Twitter data extraction (guest token rotation, doc_id tracking, stealth browser automation)

— Full stack: Python, Node.js, TypeScript, React/Next.js

— Deep understanding of crypto markets, DeFi, and on-chain data

— Deep understanding of social media growth and content mechanics

— You ship first, refine later. No overthinking. No hand-holding.



WHO YOU ARE:

— You already run your own agent setup

— You browse ClawHub, HuggingFace, and GitHub trending daily

— You ship MVPs in hours, not weeks

— You know what model to use for what task without being told



Salaray: $1,000 up to $1,500 per month depending on experience.



If you had to Google what OpenClaw is to read this post, this role isn't for you.



Apply with examples of AI agent automations you've built.

title: Medical Receptionist
description:
We are seeking a highly organized and professional Receptionist / Referral Coordinator to manage incoming referrals and support our patient intake process. This role is responsible for receiving referrals from healthcare providers, reviewing basic information for accuracy, and forwarding them to the verification team for insurance eligibility and processing. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, responsive, and able to communicate effectively with providers, patients, and internal staff.



Key Responsibilities:



Answer incoming calls from patients, providers, and partner agencies professionally and courteously.



Receive and review incoming referrals via fax,
, or electronic systems.



Forward referral documents to the insurance verification team for eligibility review.



Ensure referral information is complete, including patient demographics, insurance details, and physician orders.



Communicate with referring offices if additional documentation or clarification is needed.



Assist with patient intake and coordinate with the scheduling team upon referral approval.



Maintain accurate records of referrals and update internal tracking systems.



Provide general administrative support to the operations and clinical teams.



Qualifications:



Must be a licensed Physical Therapist or a graduate of a Bachelor of Physical Therapy.



Previous experience as a receptionist, in a medical office, or in healthcare administration is preferred.



Strong organizational and multitasking skills.



Excellent verbal and written communication skills.



Basic knowledge of medical referrals, insurance verification, or healthcare intake processes is a plus.



Proficient in
, electronic fax systems, and basic office software.



Ability to handle sensitive patient information with confidentiality and follow HIPAA guidelines.



Skills:



Attention to detail

Professional phone etiquette

Time management

Ability to work independently

Strong communication and coordination skills



About the company



We provide high-quality in-home physical therapy services to patients, helping individuals recover safely and comfortably in their own homes.

title: Innovative Accountant
description:
Job Description:

We are looking for a smart, innovative, forward-thinking, detail-oriented, and tech-savvy Accountant to join our team. This role is ideal for someone who combines strong Australian accounting experience with a natural interest in technology, automation, and AI-powered accounting system.



This role is focused on using, guiding, and improving our internal accounting tool and improving and streamlining accounting processes, particularly in reconciliation and financial workflows, while contributing to the development of smarter, more efficient AI-powered accounting system.



You will not be building automation from scratch, but you will play a key role in ensuring the system performs accurately by validating outputs, refining workflows, and helping train the system over time.



Key Responsibilities:

•Perform bookkeeping and accounting tasks using our internal AI-powered system

•Review, verify, and validate outputs (e.g., reconciliations, financial data) for accuracy

•Identify errors, inconsistencies, or edge cases and provide feedback for improvements

•Help “train” the system by refining instructions, workflows, and use cases

•Ensure high accuracy in Australian accounting processes and compliance

•Collaborate with the team to continuously improve system performance



Requirements:

•Minimum 2–3 years of experience in Australian accounting and bookkeeping

•Strong understanding of Australian accounting standards and practices

•Tech-savvy with the ability to quickly learn and use new tools and platforms

•Comfortable working with modern digital tools (e.g., ChatGPT or similar platforms, or basic coding knowledge is a plus)

•Analytical, creative, and solution-oriented mindset

•Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills



Nice to Have:

•Experience working with accounting software (Xero, MYOB, QuickBooks)

•Exposure to AI tools or workflow-based systems

•Background in QA, auditing, or process validation



Application Instructions:

To confirm you’ve read this post carefully, please include the word “AI” at the top of your application.

Also, attach your latest resume/CV and briefly highlight your experience in Australian accounting and any tools or technologies you’ve used.

title: Senior TypeScript Developer (AI & Cloud Infrastructure)
description:
About Us 

We are Agentive (
), an AI-native delivery platform building intelligent systems that combine modern cloud infrastructure with advanced AI capabilities. Our focus is on delivering scalable, production-ready solutions that integrate automation, large language models, and real-world business workflows.



We design and deploy AI-powered applications, cloud-native systems, and high-performance APIs that help organizations operate faster, smarter, and more efficiently. Our work is built on strong engineering principles, clean architecture, and measurable outcomes.



Role Overview

We are seeking an experienced Senior TypeScript Developer in the Philippines with strong AI development experience who understands that great software starts with architecture and systems thinking, not just code.



This role is for a developer who can:

* Architect scalable, production-grade TypeScript systems

* Design AI-powered workflows using modern LLM tools

* Translate business requirements into cloud-native technical solutions

* Deploy and manage infrastructure using AWS and Cloudflare

* Integrate AI coding tools such as Claude Code into real development workflows

You will be responsible for designing, building, and optimizing AI-enabled applications across backend systems, APIs, and cloud environments.



Key Responsibilities

* Design and implement scalable backend systems using TypeScript (Node.js preferred)

* Architect AI-integrated applications using LLM APIs and structured workflows

* Build and maintain cloud infrastructure on AWS (Lambda, EC2, S3, RDS, IAM, etc.)

* Configure and manage Cloudflare services (Workers, DNS, edge deployments, caching)

* Integrate and optimize AI development workflows using Claude Code and similar tools

* Design secure REST APIs and microservices architecture

* Implement CI/CD pipelines and DevOps best practices

* Optimize performance, reliability, and cost efficiency of AI workloads

* Collaborate cross-functionally to align technical solutions with business objectives



Required Skills & Experience

* 10+ years experience in software development

* Strong expertise in TypeScript (backend-heavy experience required)

* Proven experience building AI-driven systems or LLM integrations

* Experience working with AI APIs, prompt engineering, and automation pipelines

* Hands-on AWS experience (serverless, compute, storage, networking)

* Experience with Cloudflare infrastructure and edge computing

* Familiarity with Cursor, Antigravity, Claude Code or equivalent AI-assisted coding platforms

* Strong understanding of scalable architecture and clean code principles

* Experience with Git, version control workflows, and CI/CD pipelines

* Ability to work independently and take ownership of technical decisions



What We’re Looking For

* A systems thinker who designs architecture before writing code

* A senior engineer who proposes solutions, not just executes tasks

* Someone comfortable working in AI-first environments

* A developer who values performance, security, and long-term maintainability

* Strong communicator with clear technical documentation skills



Benefits

* Work in an AI-native environment building real production systems

* Opportunity to architect and influence core technical infrastructure

* Exposure to advanced AI tooling and cloud technologies

* Long-term collaboration with growth potential

* Competitive compensation based on experience



How to Apply

Please send us the following:

* Your updated CV / Resume

* A cover letter outlining an AI-powered system you designed (architecture, challenges, and outcomes) and what AI-assisted coding platform you used and for who and how long

* Links to GitHub or relevant production projects

* A short explanation of how you’ve used AWS and Cloudflare in real deployments

* A list of AI tools you’ve worked with and how they improved your development workflow

* Your expected monthly salary (in PHP)

* Your availability (hours per week). Ability to do Part time or Fulltime



And include the word code “AG9978” in your application to confirm you read the entire post.



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

description:

I’m looking for a fast and reliable video editor for a 2d style YouTube channel about animal psychology.



Videos are 9–10 minutes long.

 • Full script

title: Medical Referral Specialist / Referral Coordinator
description:
We Are Hiring: Medical Referral Specialist / Referral Coordinator

Work From Home | Full-Time | Immediate Start



Start immediately and work full-time from home!



Position Overview:



We are seeking an experienced Referral Specialist / Referral Coordinator with strong medical administrative skills to support our medical Referral Department. The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing the end-to-end referral process, ensuring accurate coordination between providers, insurance companies, and patients to facilitate timely access to care.



Key Responsibilities:



1.Process and manage incoming and outgoing medical referrals from initiation to completion



2.Coordinate referrals between primary care providers, specialists, and facilities



3.Verify insurance eligibility and referral requirements



4.Obtain authorizations when required for referred services



5.Follow up on pending referrals and approvals to prevent delays in patient care



6.Communicate with insurance companies, provider offices, and patients regarding referral status



7.Accurately document referral information and outcomes in the EMR/EHR system



8.Handle inbound and outbound calls professionally



9.Respond to patient and provider inquiries related to referrals



Requirements:



1.Must be a Nurse Graduate



2.Minimum 2 years of experience in a Referral Department, Referral Coordination, or similar medical administrative role



3.Strong understanding of medical terminology



4.Experience working with EMR/EHR systems (e.g., ECW or similar platforms)



5.Experience with insurance verification, referral eligibility, and payer communication



6.Experience handling patient and provider calls professionally



7.Fluent in English, both spoken and written



8.Available to start immediately



9.Must have own computer/laptop, stable internet connection, noise-canceling headset, and backup equipment



10.Confident in handling inbound and outbound calls

title: SOCIAL MEDIA OUTREACH FOR BOOK LAUNCH SUPPORT NETWORK
description:
We are looking for a skilled and dependable Social Media Outreach VA to help grow a free
 Messenger-based support network for publishers and book launch professionals.



The purpose of the group is simple: members support each other’s launch-day campaigns by buying books on launch day in a spirit of mutual support.



Experienced applicants are highly encouraged to apply.



This is not a general networking role.

This is not a webinar, product launch, or internet marketing role.

This is not a role for inviting random authors who only want to promote their own book.



This role is for someone who is strong at natural outreach, relationship-building, identifying the right people, and starting real conversations that lead to action.



This is not a mass messaging job.

This is not a copy-paste spam job.

This is not a one-message close job.



This role is specifically about book launches for authors and publishers. It is not about software launches, webinar launches, product launches, or internet marketing funnels.



WHAT THE GROUP IS



This is not just a general networking group.



It is a free Messenger-based mutual-support group for publishers, launch marketers, promo admins, launch team organizers, and similar professionals involved in the book launch ecosystem.



The main purpose is simple:



Members can share launch-day book campaigns and support other members’ launches by buying books on launch day, with the expectation of mutual support in return.



So the value is not random conversation. The value is being part of a focused group of people who understand book launches and participate in reciprocal launch-day support.



This role is not about inviting random people. It is about finding people in the book launch ecosystem who understand and value that kind of support.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



You will find qualified people on
 and similar platforms, start natural conversations, qualify the right people, and help move them toward joining the group.



This role requires:

-- good judgment

-- clear written communication

-- correct targeting

-- comfort with relationship-based outreach

-- the ability to follow a process



WHAT MATTERS MOST



This role is results-based.



The main goal is qualified people actually joining the group.



We are not mainly measuring:

-- message volume

-- generic lead generation claims

-- activity without results

-- hours without meaningful progress



We care most about:

-- quality of targeting

-- quality of outreach

-- process-following

-- qualified conversations

-- qualified joins



HOW THIS ROLE WORKS



This role uses a staged trial process.



The stages are:

-- a 2-hour paid micro-trial

-- then a 1-day paid trial

-- then a 1-week paid trial

-- then a 1-month probation

-- then a full-time offer if it is a strong fit



At each stage, you will be evaluated on:

-- following instructions

-- targeting the right people

-- communicating clearly

-- tracking your work correctly

-- producing reasonable results for the time worked



This role is simple for the right person and frustrating for the wrong person. We are looking for the right person.



TRACKING AND ACCOUNTABILITY



If selected, you will be required to:

-- use the OnlineJobs time tracker during paid trial work

-- use simple forms to log your outreach and prospect updates

-- follow an approval process before invites are sent



This is not busywork. It is how we verify quality, accuracy, and performance.



WE OFFER



-- weekly pay

-- paid trial stages

-- opportunity for ongoing work if the fit is strong

-- clear expectations

-- direct communication

-- honest and fair working relationship

-- room to grow if you perform well

-- a role where results matter more than empty activity

-- a chance to work with a business owner who values communication, reliability, and long-term fit



IMPORTANT APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS



To show that you read this post carefully, put the phrase quiet blue rocket in the subject line of your application.



Keep your application under 150 words.



In your application, include:

-- one sentence explaining the main purpose of this group

-- one short first message you would send to a publisher, launch marketer, or promo admin

-- one sentence explaining why you believe you fit this role



Do not use AI to generate a generic application for this role. I review applications carefully for fit, specificity, and real understanding of the work. Generic, overly polished, or off-target responses will not move forward.



Shortlisted applicants may be invited to a short text-based screening step before trial.



TO APPLY



Apply through OnlineJobs.ph and follow the instructions above carefully.



We are looking for someone who wants more than just a job. We want someone who wants to do good work, communicate well, and be part of something that can grow over time.



Looking forward to hearing from you.
